summary: The trustworthiness of a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system depends on more than the answer it returns, yet many black-box uncertainty methods still read agreement among sampled answers as confidence. That inference fails when repeated samples condition on the same defective retrieval state. The state may be empty, with the model falling back on parametric memory, or populated by a coherent but wrong neighbourhood. In either case, the answers agree because the error is stable. The problem is recognised in deployed RAG, but it has lacked a name, a measurable signature, and a prevalence bound. We supply all three. We name the failure retrieval-state lock-in and diagnose it by separating the three objects a single confidence score conflates: the answer surface, the retrieved evidence, and the retrieval state itself. In an inspectable, ontology-guided knowledge-graph RAG (KG-RAG) system across six question-answering snapshots, we measure the agreement blind spot directly: at five samples per question, 42% of KG-RAG errors and 59% of dense-retrieval errors carry zero answer dispersion, so agreement has nothing to rank, while evidence- and retrieval-state checks still flag most of them. The decomposition supports an auditable decision rule: accepting an answer only when answer, evidence, and retrieval checks all agree that it is low-risk reaches 91.9% pooled precision against a 69.7% accept-all rate. The cost is coverage: it certifies only 7.7% of answers as low-risk. On the clinical calibration domain it reaches 100% precision under an automated judge; this is an in-domain automated-label upper bound, not a clinical safety claim, and still needs human validation. Confidence in RAG is object-specific: when answers agree, the useful question is which part of the pipeline to distrust.
title: When Confidence Takes the Wrong Path: Diagnosing Retrieval-State Lock-In in RAG
title_translated: 当信心走向错误路径：诊断RAG中的检索状态锁定问题
summary_translated: 检索增强生成（RAG）系统的可信度不仅取决于其返回的答案，但许多黑箱不确定性方法仍将多个样本答案的一致性视为置信度。当重复采样依赖于相同的缺陷检索状态时，这种推断会失效。该状态可能为空，导致模型退回到参数化记忆；也可能被一个连贯但错误的邻域填充。在这两种情况下，答案一致是因为错误是稳定的。尽管该问题已在实际部署的RAG系统中被察觉，但此前缺乏名称、可测量的特征指标以及出现频率的上限。本文为此提供三者：我们将其命名为‘检索状态锁定’，并通过分离单一置信度分数所混淆的三个要素——答案表面、检索证据和检索状态本身——来诊断该问题。在六个问答快照的可解释、本体引导的知识图谱RAG（KG-RAG）系统中，我们直接测量了一致性盲点：每题五次采样下，42%的KG-RAG错误和59%的密集检索错误呈现零答案离散度，即一致性无法用于排序；而证据和检索状态检查仍能标记大部分错误。该分解支持可审计的决策规则：仅当答案、证据和检索状态检查均表明低风险时才接受答案，可达到91.9%的合并精确率，远高于69.7%的全接受率。代价是覆盖率：仅有7.7%的答案被认证为低风险。在临床校准领域，该规则在自动评判下达到100%精确率，这是领域内自动化标签的上限，而非临床安全声明，仍需人工验证。RAG中的置信度是对象特定的：当答案一致时，真正的问题是应怀疑流水线中的哪个环节。

summary: Although Large Language Models (LLMs) excel in many tasks, their assessment in Portuguese has received less attention, particularly for open-ended, discursive tasks that demand deeper reasoning and generation capabilities. While the original BLUEX benchmark addressed the scarcity of Portuguese evaluation datasets through multiple-choice questions from Brazilian university entrance exams, it did not cover the more challenging second-phase examinations, which require free-form written responses. In this work, we introduce BLUEX v2, a benchmark derived from the second-phase entrance exams of Brazil's two leading universities: UNICAMP (Comvest) and USP (Fuvest), spanning exam years 2022-2025. Our dataset comprises 395 questions unfolding into 919 graded subquestions, with 55.7% of questions containing associated images. Each question is annotated with subject area, official reference answers, LLM-generated rubric criteria, and six cognitive capability tags. We evaluate 21 state-of-the-art LLMs using an LLM-as-a-judge protocol. Results reveal a 4.92-point performance spread across models (4.18-9.10 on a 0-10 scale), with Mathematical Reasoning and Image Understanding emerging as the hardest capability dimensions. The dataset, evaluation code, and model outputs are publicly available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/BLUEXv2.
title: BLUEX v2: Benchmarking LLMs on Open-Ended Questions from Brazilian University Entrance Exams
title_translated: BLUEX v2：基于巴西大学入学考试开放问题的LLM基准测试
summary_translated: 尽管大语言模型（LLMs）在诸多任务中表现优异，但其在葡萄牙语环境下的评估仍受关注不足，尤其是需要深度推理与生成能力的开放性、论述性任务。虽然原始的BLUEX基准通过巴西大学入学考试的多项选择题缓解了葡萄牙语评估数据集稀缺的问题，但未涵盖更具挑战性的第二阶段考试——后者要求自由作答。本文提出BLUEX v2，该基准源自巴西两所顶尖大学（UNICAMP Comvest 和 USP Fuvest）第二阶段入学考试（2022–2025年）。数据集包含395个问题，衍生出919个评分子问题，其中55.7%的问题配有相关图像。每个问题标注了主题领域、官方参考答案、LLM生成的评分标准及六类认知能力标签。我们采用LLM作为裁判协议评估21个前沿LLM。结果显示，模型间性能差距达4.92分（0–10分制，4.18–9.10），数学推理与图像理解成为最困难的能力维度。数据集、评估代码和模型输出已公开发布于 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/BLUEXv2。

summary: Encoder-only transformer models remain essential for production NLP pipelines. We introduce moBERTo, a Portuguese adaptation of ModernBERT obtained through continued pretraining of the ModernBERT-base checkpoint on 60 billion tokens (5 epochs over a 12-billion-token corpus curated from FineWeb2 and filtered with educational and STEM classifiers). We preserve the original architecture, including rotary positional embeddings, alternating local-global attention, flash attention, and unpadding. We evaluate moBERTo across information retrieval (including long-context retrieval at up to 8,192 tokens), document classification, named entity recognition, and natural language understanding. Our best variant, which combines a Portuguese tokenizer with subword-matching embedding transfer and long-context post-training, achieves the highest average reranking nDCG@10 across three Portuguese retrieval benchmarks and the best results on PLUE-PT. Through ablation studies, we show that (i) continued pretraining is strongly preferable to training from scratch, particularly for preserving long-context capabilities; (ii) tokenizer adaptation improves token-level tasks but degrades long-context retrieval; (iii) a dedicated long-context post-training phase at 8,192 tokens further improves reranking and NER; and (iv) encoder-only architectures remain competitive with larger decoder-only alternatives for discriminative tasks. We publicly release the model weights at https://huggingface.co/Tropic-AI/moBERTo and training data at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Tropic-AI/moberto-pretraining-dataset-c4-compatible on Hugging Face.
title: moBERTo: A Modern Encoder for Portuguese via Continued Pretraining of ModernBERT
title_translated: moBERTo：通过ModernBERT持续预训练构建现代葡萄牙语编码器
summary_translated: 仅编码器的Transformer模型在生产级NLP流程中依然至关重要。我们提出moBERTo，这是基于ModernBERT-base检查点，在600亿token（5轮，基于FineWeb2筛选并经教育与STEM分类器过滤的120亿token语料库）上进行持续预训练的葡萄牙语适配版本。我们保留了原始架构，包括旋转位置嵌入、交替局部-全局注意力、Flash注意力和非填充处理。我们在信息检索（含长达8,192 token的长上下文检索）、文档分类、命名实体识别和自然语言理解任务上评估moBERTo。最佳变体结合葡萄牙语分词器、子词匹配嵌入迁移和长上下文后训练，在三个葡萄牙语检索基准上实现了最高的平均reranking nDCG@10，并在PLUE-PT上取得最优结果。消融实验表明：(i) 持续预训练显著优于从头训练，尤其有助于保持长上下文能力；(ii) 分词器适配提升词级任务表现，但损害长上下文检索；(iii) 在8,192 token长度上的专用长上下文后训练进一步提升重排序与NER性能；(iv) 对于判别性任务，仅编码器架构仍可与更大规模的解码器-only模型竞争。模型权重已公开发布于Hugging Face：https://huggingface.co/Tropic-AI/moBERTo，训练数据见：https://huggingface.co/datasets/Tropic-AI/moberto-pretraining-dataset-c4-compatible。

summary: Multi-hop question answering remains challenging for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) because existing approaches either propagate errors across iterative retrieval rounds or over-generate reasoning steps, increasing cost without improving accuracy. We propose Grounded Delta Planning RAG (GDP-RAG), a plan-based framework that targets only the information delta based on three simple design choices: (1) preliminary retrieval to ground planning before execution, (2) a gap-conditioned planning prompt that asks only for missing information, and (3) a skeletal trajectory that pairs each subquery with a Thought capturing evidence from preliminary retrieval and carrying it through to the final answer. GDP-RAG focuses computation on unresolved gaps, yielding concise, reliable reasoning trajectories. Extensive experiments on HotpotQA, 2WikiMultiHopQA, and MuSiQue show that GDP-RAG achieves the highest accuracy (60.63%) among all compared systems while maintaining a cost-of-pass of 0.51, 22% lower than PAR-RAG (0.65) and 68% lower than KnowTrace (1.57), with no method achieving both higher accuracy and lower cost.
title: Only Ask What You Don't Know: Grounded Delta Planning for Efficient Multi-step RAG
title_translated: 仅询问你不知道的内容：基于 grounded delta planning 的高效多步 RAG
summary_translated: 多跳问答对检索增强生成（RAG）仍具挑战性，因为现有方法要么在迭代检索过程中传播错误，要么过度生成推理步骤，增加成本却未提升准确率。我们提出基于计划的 grounded delta planning RAG（GDP-RAG），通过三个简单设计选择聚焦信息差异：（1）预先检索以在执行前锚定规划，（2）基于差距的计划提示仅请求缺失信息，（3）骨架式推理轨迹将每个子查询与一个包含预检索证据的 Thought 相关联，并传递至最终答案。GDP-RAG 将计算集中在未解决的差距上，生成简洁可靠的推理路径。在 HotpotQA、2WikiMultiHopQA 和 MuSiQue 上的大量实验表明，GDP-RAG 在所有对比系统中达到最高准确率（60.63%），同时保持每轮成本为 0.51，比 PAR-RAG（0.65）低 22%，比 KnowTrace（1.57）低 68%，且无方法能同时实现更高准确率和更低耗时。

summary: Knowledge editing aims to efficiently update factual information in Large Language Models (LLMs) without full retraining. However, existing methods still suffer from performance degradation in batch knowledge editing. We identify that semantic representation entanglement, such as overlapping concepts and shared syntactic patterns, accumulates interference in the representation space and reduces editing precision. To bridge this gap, in this paper, we propose Orthogonal Representation Editing (ORE), which performs edits in the hidden representation space of LLMs by constructing a general semantic subspace and enforcing orthogonal constraints on edit vectors, effectively decoupling semantic entanglement. Furthermore, we introduce a gated non-linear representation head to enable adaptive learning of editing locations and precise control over knowledge injection. Extensive experiments show that ORE outperforms existing methods and achieves superior performance in cross-lingual knowledge editing scenarios. We release our code at https://github.com/YVVH/ORE.
title: Orthogonal Representation Editing: Decoupling Semantic Entanglement in Batch Knowledge Editing of LLMs
title_translated: 正交表示编辑：解耦大语言模型批量知识编辑中的语义纠缠
summary_translated: 知识编辑旨在无需完整重训练即可高效更新大语言模型（LLMs）中的事实信息。然而，现有方法在批量知识编辑中仍存在性能下降问题。我们发现，语义表示纠缠（如概念重叠和共享句法模式）会在表示空间中累积干扰，降低编辑精度。为此，本文提出正交表示编辑（ORE），通过在 LLM 的隐藏表示空间中构建通用语义子空间并施加正交约束于编辑向量，有效解耦语义纠缠。此外，引入门控非线性表示头，实现编辑位置的自适应学习和知识注入的精确控制。大量实验表明，ORE 超越现有方法，在跨语言知识编辑场景中表现更优。代码已开源：https://github.com/YVVH/ORE。

summary: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong relation extraction (RE), but their computational demands and reliance on proprietary APIs limit deployment in resource-constrained or privacy-sensitive settings. We investigate how far small language models (SLMs) can close this gap across general-domain and literary text. We evaluate five models from 360M to 3B parameters under three domain-composition regimes and two prompt-conditioned tuning styles (30 configurations), comparing them with zero-shot frontier LLMs and a discriminative RoBERTa baseline. Across nine benchmarks, the best sub-billion model, Qwen2.5-0.5B fine-tuned on pooled general-domain data, achieves a general-domain positive-class micro-F1 of 0.83, versus 0.69 for GPT-5.4 and 0.66 for Claude Sonnet 4.6 evaluated zero-shot. This does not imply that SLMs are intrinsically stronger; rather, targeted task adaptation enables 4-bit models deployable on a single consumer GPU to outperform general-purpose frontier systems under this protocol. An in-domain RoBERTa baseline also exceeds both frontier models, indicating that the gain stems from task adaptation rather than generative decoding. On literary RE, tuned SLMs reach 0.92 on the human-annotated Biographical benchmark versus 0.83 for GPT-5.4, and 0.833 versus 0.578 on the two-benchmark literary average. A targeted domain-adaptive pretraining case study yields no practically meaningful gain over supervised fine-tuning, while the cleanest within-family scale comparison shows only marginal improvement. These results show that, when task-specific data are available, compact task-adapted models can provide accurate, private, and hardware-efficient RE.
title: Sub-Billion, Super-Frontier: Small Language Models Rival Zero-Shot Frontier LLMs on General and Literary Relation Extraction
title_translated: 亚十亿参数，超前沿：小语言模型在通用与文学关系抽取中媲美零样本前沿大模型
summary_translated: 大语言模型（LLMs）在关系抽取（RE）任务上表现强劲，但其计算需求和对专有 API 的依赖限制了在资源受限或隐私敏感环境中的部署。我们研究小语言模型（SLMs）在通用领域和文学文本中能缩小这一差距的程度。我们在三种领域构成模式和两种提示条件微调风格下评估了五种参数量从 3.6 亿到 30 亿的模型（共 30 种配置），并与零样本前沿 LLMs 及判别式 RoBERTa 基线进行比较。在九个基准测试中，最佳亚十亿模型 Qwen2.5-0.5B 在 pooled 通用领域数据上微调后，达到通用领域正类 micro-F1 为 0.83，优于 GPT-5.4 的 0.69 和 Claude Sonnet 4.6 的 0.66（均为零样本）。这并非说明 SLMs 本身更强，而是特定任务适配使 4-bit 模型可在单个消费级 GPU 上超越通用前沿系统。域内 RoBERTa 基线也超过两个前沿模型，表明收益源于任务适配而非生成解码。在文学关系抽取中，微调后的 SLMs 在人工标注的传记基准上达到 0.92，优于 GPT-5.4 的 0.83；在两个文学基准平均值上分别为 0.833 和 0.578。针对领域自适应预训练的案例研究未带来实际增益，而家族内规模对比显示改进有限。结果表明，当具备特定任务数据时，紧凑的任务适配模型可提供准确、私密且硬件高效的 RE。

summary: We extend our prior work on Text2DSL automatic generation of domain-specific language (DSL) code from natural language descriptions along two complementary axes. First, we replace prompt-only synthetic generation with context-aware distillation, in which a teacher large language model (DeepSeek-V4-Flash) operates under an explicitly defined structured context comprising a BNF grammar, an API specification, and a closed identifier vocabulary; the resulting corpus is verified by a two-tier pipeline combining AST validation through esprima and runtime acceptance through the production polkitd daemon and the pkcheck client. This scales the verified PolkitBench corpus from 4,204 to 10,073 natural-language-to-Polkit-rule pairs at 100.0% AST validity and 99.7% runtime pass rate. Second, we conduct the per-component factorial ablation of structured context that was identified as future work in the precursor study: eight conditions C0-C7 are evaluated on GigaChat-10B-A1.8B with the new corpus. Three findings emerge. (i) The new harder corpus collapses the baseline mode (Syntax Valid 97.6% -> 58.5%, Combined Score 0.482 -> 0.252), whereas the context-enhanced mode degrades only marginally (Syntax 98.6% -> 97.4%, Combined 0.801 -> 0.750), confirming that structured context is not a cosmetic improvement but a load-bearing mechanism. (ii) The best absolute condition is the full context C7 across all metrics, while the strongest partial conditions (C5 = BNF + Vocabulary, C6 = API + Vocabulary) both contain the vocabulary. (iii) A Shapley-style decomposition assigns the largest semantic-quality effect to the vocabulary (Combined +0.198), the largest structural-validity effects to API (+24.7 pp) and BNF (+22.3 pp).
title: Context-Aware Distillation and Ablation for Text2DSL
title_translated: 上下文感知的蒸馏与消融：面向 Text2DSL 的优化
summary_translated: 我们扩展了先前关于从自然语言描述自动生成领域特定语言（DSL）代码的工作，沿两个互补方向推进。首先，用上下文感知蒸馏替代仅靠提示的合成生成：教师大模型（DeepSeek-V4-Flash）在显式定义的结构化上下文（包括 BNF 语法、API 规范和封闭标识符词汇表）下运行；生成语料经两层管道验证，结合 esprima 的 AST 验证和生产环境中 polkitd 守护进程与 pkcheck 客户端的运行时接受度测试。该方法将验证后的 PolkitBench 语料库从 4,204 扩展至 10,073 对自然语言到 Polkit 规则，AST 有效性达 100.0%，运行时通过率为 99.7%。其次，对前序研究中识别出的未来工作——结构化上下文的组件进行全因子消融分析：在 GigaChat-10B-A1.8B 上评估八个条件 C0-C7。三项发现如下：(i) 新的更难语料库使基线模式严重退化（语法有效率 97.6% → 58.5%，综合得分 0.482 → 0.252），而上下文增强模式仅轻微下降（语法 98.6% → 97.4%，综合 0.801 → 0.750），证实结构化上下文并非装饰性改进，而是核心支撑机制。(ii) 最佳绝对条件为完整上下文 C7，最强部分条件（C5 = BNF + 词汇表，C6 = API + 词汇表）均包含词汇表。(iii) 类 Shapley 分解显示，词汇表对语义质量影响最大（综合得分 +0.198），API 和 BNF 对结构有效性影响最大（分别 +24.7 个百分点和 +22.3 个百分点）。

summary: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a promising framework for enhancing the reasoning ability of large language models. However, much of the existing work is guided by heuristic intuition, leading to divergent algorithmic choices, even contradictory ones that nevertheless report empirical gains. To better understand this phenomenon, we conduct a theoretical analysis of RLVR updates. Our study reveals that differences in off-policy degree, determined by the number of gradient steps per rollout, substantially affect the distribution of importance sampling ratios and their clipping behavior, thereby altering which tokens dominate the update. Building on this insight, we characterize gradient expectation as the central quantity governing update dynamics and analyze the roles of token probability, advantage, and importance sampling ratio. Motivated by these findings, we propose Adaptive Clip Policy Optimization (ACPO), which adjusts clipping boundaries across token groups according to the empirical variance of their importance sampling ratios. Experiments on 3B and 7B models across diverse reasoning benchmarks, spanning mathematical problem solving, tabular QA, and logic puzzles, demonstrate that ACPO outperforms strong baselines such as DAPO and CISPO. These results demonstrate that principled, analysis-driven approaches yield more robust and effective RLVR methods. Code is available in: https://github.com/Control-derek/ACPO
title: What are Key Factors for Updates in RL for LLM Reasoning?
title_translated: 强化学习用于大语言模型推理的关键更新因素是什么？
summary_translated: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）已成为提升大语言模型推理能力的有前景框架。然而，现有大部分工作依赖启发式直觉，导致算法选择分歧，甚至出现相互矛盾的方法却仍报告经验收益。为更好理解此现象，我们对 RLVR 更新进行了理论分析。研究揭示，由每轮 rollout 中梯度步数决定的离策略程度，显著影响重要性采样比率的分布及其裁剪行为，从而改变主导更新的 token。基于此洞察，我们指出梯度期望是控制更新动态的核心量，并分析了 token 概率、优势和重要性采样比率的作用。受此启发，我们提出自适应裁剪策略优化（ACPO），根据各 token 组的重要性采样比率的经验方差动态调整裁剪边界。在 3B 和 7B 模型上，跨越数学问题求解、表格问答和逻辑谜题等多样推理基准的实验表明，ACPO 显著优于 DAPO 和 CISPO 等强基线。结果表明，基于分析的原理性方法可产生更鲁棒、高效的 RLVR 方法。代码已公开：https://github.com/Control-derek/ACPO。

summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) has become a standard method for improving reasoning capabilities in large language models (LLMs) by eliciting step-by-step thinking, but its effectiveness in multimodal tasks remains unclear. In this paper, we aim to systematically investigate the key question: What can multimodal Chain-of-Thought reasoning do, and where and why does it fall short? To this end, we evaluate 12 multimodal tasks across perception and reasoning categories using both 14 non-reasoning models and 8 reasoning models. Our analysis reveals several important findings: (1) CoT is not a free lunch and should be used selectively depending on the specific requirements of each task. For perception tasks, CoT can lead to undesirable side effects, such as reduced performance in visual grounding and object counting. In contrast, it proves effective for reasoning tasks involving mathematical, scientific, and multi-image reasoning; (2) Compared to original models, existing open-source multimodal reasoning models often yield only marginal overall improvements, possibly due to an overemphasis on mathematical reasoning at the expense of broader capabilities; (3) Visual reasoning remains a key bottleneck for current multimodal CoT, as models exhibit a Look Light, Think Heavy pattern where verbal reflection rises and falls during reasoning, whereas visual reflection consistently diminishes. These findings suggest that while multimodal CoT handles verbal reflection relatively well, it lacks the ability to maintain deep visual introspection throughout the reasoning process.
title: Look Light, Think Heavy: What Multimodal Chain-of-Thought Reasoning Can and Cannot Do
title_translated: 看轻，思重：多模态思维链推理的能力与局限
summary_translated: 思维链（CoT）已成为提升大语言模型（LLMs）推理能力的标准方法，通过激发逐步思考来增强推理效果，但其在多模态任务中的有效性仍不明确。本文系统地探究了一个核心问题：多模态思维链推理能做什么，以及在何处和为何会失效？为此，我们使用14个非推理模型和8个推理模型，在12个涵盖感知与推理类别的多模态任务上进行了评估。分析揭示了几个重要发现：（1）CoT并非免费午餐，应根据具体任务需求选择性使用。对于感知任务，CoT可能导致不良副作用，如降低视觉定位和物体计数性能；而在涉及数学、科学及多图像推理的推理任务中则表现有效；（2）相较于原始模型，现有开源多模态推理模型的整体提升有限，可能是因为过度强调数学推理而忽视了更广泛的能力；（3）视觉推理仍是当前多模态CoT的关键瓶颈，模型表现出‘看轻，思重’的特征——即在推理过程中语言反思上升又下降，而视觉反思却持续减弱。这些发现表明，尽管多模态CoT在处理语言反思方面相对良好，但在整个推理过程中缺乏维持深层视觉内省的能力。

summary: In open-ended generation, LLMs frequently fall into the "likelihood trap", marked by repetitive degeneration and vocabulary dullness, creating a discrepancy between machine-generated and human-written text. While post-hoc tail truncation (e.g., Top-$p$, Min-$p$) avoids sampling from the unreliable tail, it can over-sample from the uncalibrated head and misalign generation with human lexical preferences; fixed scalar repetition penalties likewise ignore variation in logit scale across inference steps, potentially disrupting semantic coherence. To address both limitations, we propose Variance-Calibrated Modulation (VCM), a training-free pre-decoding intervention that reshapes the probability distribution before truncation through two dynamic mechanisms: (1) Contextual Searchlight via PMI, which suppresses global stopwords while elevating context-evoked tokens, and (2) Adaptive Self-Debiasing, which uses real-time logit standard deviation for scale-invariant penalization. Across open-ended generation, factual QA, and mathematical reasoning, VCM consistently mitigates the likelihood trap. With negligible computational overhead, VCM integrates with existing decoding strategies, improving diversity, coherence, and, particularly at higher decoding temperatures, reasoning accuracy.
title: Breaking the Likelihood Trap: Variance-Calibrated Modulation for Large Language Model Decoding
title_translated: 突破似然陷阱：用于大语言模型解码的方差校准调制
summary_translated: 在开放式生成任务中，大语言模型（LLMs）常陷入‘似然陷阱’，表现为重复退化和词汇单调，导致机器生成文本与人类写作之间存在差异。虽然事后尾部截断（如Top-$p$、Min-$p$）可避免从不可靠尾部采样，但可能过度采样未校准的头部，偏离人类词汇偏好；固定的标量重复惩罚则忽略了推理步骤间logit尺度的变化，可能破坏语义连贯性。为解决这两项局限，我们提出无需训练的预解码干预方法——方差校准调制（VCM），通过两种动态机制重塑截断前的概率分布：（1）基于PMI的上下文聚焦，抑制全局停用词并提升上下文触发的词元；（2）自适应自我去偏，利用实时logit标准差实现尺度无关的惩罚。在开放式生成、事实问答和数学推理任务中，VCM均能有效缓解似然陷阱。该方法计算开销极小，可无缝集成至现有解码策略，提升生成多样性、连贯性，尤其在较高解码温度下显著提高推理准确性。

summary: Multilingual Language Models like mBERT are widely used for low-resource NLP, yet their adaptation to morphologically inconsistent languages such as Roman Urdu remains underexplored. Roman Urdu spelling variation causes severe sub-word fragmentation, averaging 1.50 sub-words per token. We propose \textit{ROMEVA} (Roman Urdu Embedding-preserving Vocabulary Adaptation), which combines sub-word-average initialization and a PCA-guided anchor loss to stabilize embeddings during vocabulary expansion. Using a 36,130-comment Roman Urdu corpus, we add 500 highly fragmented tokens to mBERT and compare naive fine-tuning, sub-word-aware fine-tuning, and \textit{ROMEVA}. While \textit{ROMEVA} most effectively preserves the pretrained embedding space, naive fine-tuning achieves the strongest downstream sentiment classification performance. These findings reveal a disconnect between embedding stability and downstream performance, suggesting that stronger adaptation may be preferable to strict embedding preservation in morphologically inconsistent languages.
title: ROMEVA: Geometry-Preserving Vocabulary Expansion for Roman Urdu Language Models
title_translated: ROMEVA：罗马乌尔都语语言模型的几何保持型词汇扩展
summary_translated: 多语言语言模型（如mBERT）广泛应用于低资源自然语言处理任务，但其在形态不一致语言（如罗马乌尔都语）上的适配仍研究不足。罗马乌尔都语拼写变异导致严重的子词碎片化，平均每个词元产生1.50个子词。我们提出	extit{ROMEVA}（罗马乌尔都语嵌入保持型词汇适配），结合子词平均初始化与PCA引导的锚点损失，以在词汇扩展过程中稳定嵌入表示。基于包含36,130条评论的罗马乌尔都语语料库，我们将500个高度碎片化的词元加入mBERT，并对比了朴素微调、子词感知微调与	extit{ROMEVA}。结果显示，	extit{ROMEVA}最有效地保持了预训练嵌入空间，而朴素微调在下游情感分类任务中表现最佳。这一发现揭示了嵌入稳定性与下游性能之间的脱节，提示在形态不一致语言中，更强的适配可能优于严格的嵌入保持。

summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) generate fluent long-form text, however, often add unsupported factual claims. Existing verification techniques improve factuality by grounding generation in external evidence. However, the same verification policy usually applies to all claims despite being differences in hallucination risks. We propose \textit{FACTOR} (\textit{FACTuality-Oriented Risk-aware Verification}), an inference-time model that adapts verification criteria according to claim-level uncertainty. FACTOR combines uncertainty estimation, adaptive language inference verification, and candidate re-ranking to allocate verification effort where it is most needed. We evaluate \textit{FACTOR} on FactScore benchmark showing that adaptive verification improves factuality while reducing verification cost simultaneously. We further perform different ablation studies to identify the primary driver of these gains. Our results show the effective and model-agnostic performance of \textit{FACTOR} for improving factuality in long-form generation.
title: Not All Claims Are Equally Risky: FACTOR for Adaptive Verification in Factual Long-Form Generation
title_translated: 并非所有声明风险均等：面向事实长文本生成的自适应验证方法FACTOR
summary_translated: 大语言模型（LLMs）能够生成流畅的长篇文本，但常常引入未经支持的事实性声明。现有验证技术通过将生成过程锚定于外部证据来提升事实性，然而通常对所有声明采用相同的验证策略，忽视了不同声明在幻觉风险上的差异。我们提出	extit{FACTOR}（面向事实性的风险感知验证），一种推理时的模型，可根据声明级别的不确定性自适应调整验证标准。FACTOR结合不确定性估计、自适应语言推理验证和候选重排序，将验证资源集中在最需要的位置。我们在FactScore基准上评估	extit{FACTOR}，结果表明自适应验证同时提升了事实性并降低了验证成本。进一步的消融实验识别出主要增益来源。结果表明，	extit{FACTOR}在提升长文本生成事实性方面具有高效且模型无关的表现。

summary: Speech language models (SLMs) have been extensively studied, with the common paradigm incorporating text data and pre-trained text LMs. A leading approach is speech-text interleaving in which models are trained over sequences containing both speech and text tokens, aiming to boost even speech-only capabilities. Yet the way these two modalities interact in the model latent space remains unclear. In this work, we analyze interleaved speech-text LMs from different model families and sizes through the scope of the logit lens to provide such insight. We reveal that these models go through an implicit transcription phase in which the text token of the spoken word becomes decodable in intermediate layers, despite not being trained for speech recognition. The transcription of the word appears as one of the top candidate words for as much as 77\% of the data. Following this stage, the models proceed to predict the next word in the text space before transforming back to the speech domain. We finally analyze the role of interleaving data, and initializing from text LMs in eliciting this behavior, as well as seeing how this correlates with spoken knowledge abilities. Our analysis sheds light on the internal mechanisms underlying the relationship between speech and text modalities and could shape SLM optimization.
title: Interleaved Speech Language Models Latently Work In Text
title_translated: 交错语音语言模型在潜空间中实际以文本方式运作
summary_translated: 语音语言模型（SLMs）已得到广泛研究，常见范式是融合文本数据与预训练文本语言模型。主流方法是语音-文本交错训练，即在包含语音和文本词元的序列上训练模型，旨在提升纯语音能力。然而，这两种模态在模型潜空间中的交互机制仍不清晰。本文通过日志概率视角，分析了来自不同模型家族和规模的交错语音-文本语言模型，以揭示其内在机制。我们发现，这些模型经历了一个隐式的转录阶段：尽管未专门训练用于语音识别，但 spoken word 的文本词元在中间层已变得可解码。该转录结果在高达77%的数据中成为最高候选词之一。随后，模型在文本空间中预测下一个词，再转换回语音域。最后，我们分析了交错数据的作用以及从文本语言模型初始化如何引发此行为，并探讨其与语音知识能力的相关性。本研究揭示了语音与文本模态间内在关系的机制，或将指导SLM的优化设计。

summary: As LLM-generated text is increasingly used, especially in fictional domains, we explore how much LLM-generated stories differ from human-written stories. In this work, we focus on characters. We borrow definitions from narratology to analyze eight intricate dimensions of character, such as stylization and wholeness. These dimensions consider more than just basic characteristics. They assess how characters are portrayed within their stories. After automatically inferring categories of characters within both LLM and human-written stories, we compare and contrast these two sets of stories. We consider the following overarching questions: (1) Do LLMs and human-written stories have similar characters? and (2) Do LLMs generate stories with a variety of characters? Our analysis includes research questions that focus on stories generated by popular LLMs and recently published human-written stories. We describe a number of interesting similarities, differences and key takeaways.
title: CASPER in the Machine: Insights into Character Variety in LLM-Generated Stories
title_translated: 机器中的CASPER：关于大语言模型生成故事中角色多样性的洞察
summary_translated: 随着大语言模型生成文本的应用日益广泛，尤其是在虚构领域，我们探讨了大语言模型生成的故事与人类写作的故事之间存在多大差异。本文聚焦于角色，借鉴叙事学定义，分析角色的八个复杂维度，如风格化和完整性。这些维度不仅关注基本特征，还评估角色在其故事中的呈现方式。在自动推断大语言模型和人类写作故事中角色类别后，我们对这两类故事进行了比较。我们关注的核心问题包括：（1）大语言模型生成的故事与人类写作的故事是否具有相似的角色？（2）大语言模型是否能生成具有多样角色的故事？我们的分析涵盖由主流大语言模型生成的故事以及近期发表的人类写作故事。文中描述了若干有趣的相似点、差异点和关键发现。

summary: Because large language models (LLMs) are impressively successful in predicting text, it appears that they must have access to a 'world model' representing causal and definitional structure. However, the dominant formalisms of modern causal inference -- Judea Pearl's interventionist approach and the Neyman-Rubin potential outcomes framework -- struggle to illuminate how LLMs learn causal structure. I resolve this puzzle by arguing that LLMs employ a specific inductive approach based on a difference-making logic -- sometimes called variational induction. I demonstrate how central aspects of this logic are realized during training, where LLMs require enormous amounts of text data from a wide range of contexts to identify difference- and indifference-makers within word sequences. Furthermore, I analyze specific architectural features of LLMs -- such as token embeddings and self-attention -- to determine their roles in variational induction. The difference-making logic of LLMs fundamentally parallels the experimental method, where causal relations are derived by systematically varying individual circumstances to determine their influence on a phenomenon.
title: Words as Difference Makers: How Large Language Models Determine Causal Structure in Text
title_translated: 词语作为决定性因素：大语言模型如何确定文本中的因果结构
summary_translated: 由于大语言模型在文本预测方面表现出色，似乎它们必须具备一个代表因果和定义结构的‘世界模型’。然而，现代因果推断的主流形式——朱迪亚·珀尔的干预主义方法和奈曼-鲁宾潜在结果框架——难以揭示大语言模型如何学习因果结构。本文通过论证大语言模型采用一种基于‘差异决定逻辑’的特定归纳方法（有时称为变分归纳）来解决这一难题。我展示了这种逻辑在训练过程中的核心实现方式：大语言模型需要来自广泛语境的海量文本数据，以识别词序列中的差异和无关因素。此外，我还分析了大语言模型的特定架构特征（如词嵌入和自注意力机制），以确定它们在变分归纳中的作用。大语言模型的差异决定逻辑从根本上与实验方法一致，即通过系统性地改变个别条件来确定其对现象的影响。

summary: A recent Nature Medicine study reports that general-purpose frontier LLMs outperform specialized retrieval-augmented clinical tools on medical benchmarks, and that retrieval can hurt strong models. We ask the natural follow-up: does structured knowledge-graph (KG) grounding change this, and when does grounding help at all? We contribute two results. First, a reproduction: the study's headline HealthBench score (~88) is the Consensus variant, not full HealthBench, where frontier models and ideal completions both score ~46-47 under a physician-calibrated grader (agreement 82.5%); we reproduce GPT-5.2 Consensus =90.9 and flag a score-deflating grader bug. Second, a knowledge-boundary result. Using a graph+vector engine (samyama-graph) over the public biomedical KG PrimeKG, neither naive triple retrieval nor an agentic natural-language-to-Cypher loop (82% successful queries) improves MedQA across a weak-to-strong model ladder (all |Delta| <= 3.4). On a synthetic counterfactual KG, and on a hybrid benchmark mixing known and novel facts, the identical pipeline lifts out-of-training accuracy from chance to ~100% (+68 to +79) while adding nothing on known facts (a no-LLM arm answers both). Across three regimes (no-knowledge, graph-aided, hybrid), grounding helps only insofar as the decisive fact lies outside the model's training -- public-KG facts are redundant, private and novel data are where it pays -- matching the study's institutional-data caveat.
title: Knowledge-Graph Grounding Helps LLMs Only for Out-of-Training Knowledge: A Controlled Study on Clinical Question Answering
title_translated: 知识图谱接地仅在模型训练外知识时有效：临床问答任务的受控研究
summary_translated: 最近《自然·医学》的一项研究指出，通用前沿大语言模型在医疗基准测试中表现优于专用检索增强型临床工具，且检索可能损害强模型的表现。我们提出一个自然延伸的问题：结构化知识图谱（KG）的接地是否会改变这一结论？它在何时真正起作用？本文贡献了两项成果。第一项是复现：该研究的标题成绩（约88分）实际上是共识版本，而非完整HealthBench；在医生校准评分器下，前沿模型和理想完成度的得分均为约46-47分（一致性达82.5%）；我们复现了GPT-5.2共识得分90.9，并指出评分器存在导致分数被低估的漏洞。第二项是知识边界结果：使用基于公开生物医学知识图谱PrimeKG的图+向量引擎（samyama-graph），无论是简单的三元组检索，还是代理式自然语言转Cypher查询循环（82%成功），均未在弱到强模型链上提升MedQA表现（所有|Δ| ≤ 3.4）。而在合成反事实知识图谱及混合已知与新事实的混合基准上，相同流程将训练外准确率从随机水平提升至约100%（+68至+79），而对已知事实无增益（无大语言模型对照组也能回答）。在三种情形（无知识、图谱辅助、混合）中，只有当关键事实超出模型训练范围时，接地才有效——公共知识图谱事实冗余，私有和新颖数据才是关键所在，这与原研究关于机构数据的警告相符。

summary: Why do multilingual language models sometimes generate in the wrong language, and why is this so hard to fix? We introduce Language Identity Head Ablation (LIHA), a causal intervention that zeros each attention head individually and measures the resulting language switch rate across a parallel dataset of 2,700 prompt-language pairs spanning seven languages. Applied to GPT-2, LIHA identifies a small set of first-token broadcaster heads - led by L6H1 (switch rate 0.32, 3.23 $σ$ above the population mean) - that attend persistently to the first prompt token, propagating its language signal throughout generation. Compensatory redistribution when heads are ablated is statistically significant (p < $10^{-5}$) and follows a directional, hierarchical pattern: compensation always recruits heads in layers above the ablated head, suggesting a feedforward cascade rather than global diffusion. To probe how training regime shapes these circuits, we apply LIHA to a controlled pair - Qwen2.5-1.5B-Base and Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct - identical in architecture and size, differing only in training. The base model is nearly flat (max SR=0.016, 200/336 heads at SR=0.0); the instruct model concentrates causal influence sharply at layer 0, led by L0H5 (SR=0.224, 8.93 $σ$ above mean), with all other layers near zero. This controlled comparison provides direct causal evidence that instruction tuning reorganizes language identity circuits toward early-layer localization. Extended experiments with Chinese and Russian confirm that first-token broadcasting is script-specific in GPT-2, with non-Latin languages handled at layer 0 - the same locus as the instruction-tuned model. Code and data will be released upon publication.
title: First-Token Broadcasters: Mechanistic Origins of Language Identity and Distributed Robustness in Transformers
title_translated: 首令牌广播者：Transformer中语言身份与分布式鲁棒性的机制起源
summary_translated: 为何多语言语言模型有时会生成错误语言的内容，且修复如此困难？我们提出了语言身份头消融（LIHA），一种因果干预方法：逐个归零每个注意力头，并在包含七种语言的2,700个提示-语言对并行数据集上测量由此产生的语言切换率。应用于GPT-2时，LIHA识别出一组少量的首令牌广播头——其中L6H1表现突出（切换率0.32，比群体均值高出3.23σ）——这些头持续关注提示的第一个词元，并将其语言信号在整个生成过程中传播。当移除头时，补偿性重新分布具有统计显著性（p < 10⁻⁵），并遵循方向性和层级性模式：补偿总是招募被移除头之上的层中的头，表明这是一种前馈级联而非全局扩散。为探究训练方式如何塑造这些电路，我们将LIHA应用于一对受控模型——Qwen2.5-1.5B-Base与Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct——二者架构和规模完全相同，仅训练方式不同。基础模型几乎平坦（最高切换率=0.016，336个头中有200个切换率=0.0）；而指令微调模型则将因果影响高度集中于第0层，由L0H5主导（切换率0.224，比均值高8.93σ），其余各层接近零。这一受控对比提供了直接因果证据，表明指令微调将语言身份电路重组为早期层定位。对中文和俄文的扩展实验进一步证实，在GPT-2中，首令牌广播具有脚本特异性，非拉丁语言处理也集中在第0层——与指令微调模型的同一位置一致。代码与数据将在发表后公开。

summary: Language models are widely used in assistant settings, where controlling behavioral attributes is often essential. Activation steering modifies hidden-state representations at inference time, providing a lightweight, training-free mechanism that can be toggled at runtime. Existing methods, however, have focused primarily on steering a single attribute at a time. When multiple attributes must be controlled simultaneously, naive summation of per-attribute steering vectors suffers from norm imbalance and directional cancellation, while classifier-based approaches require retraining whenever the attribute set changes. We introduce ORBIT (Orthogonal Rotation-Based Intervention Technique), a training-free extension of rotation-based steering to the multi-attribute setting. Our method constructs a joint subspace from per-attribute steering planes via singular value decomposition and applies a single norm-preserving rotation within that subspace toward a combined target direction. Adaptive per-token gating identifies which attributes need correction at each position, and an optional additive boost strengthens attributes with weak initial projection. We also introduce TraitFactory, a new multi-attribute benchmark that focuses on behavioral tendencies rather than surface-level style. We evaluate ORBIT on TraitFactory and ToneBank across three models (Llama-3.2-3B, Qwen-2.5-7B, Llama-3.1-8B) while steering multiple attributes simultaneously, showing that it achieves stronger and more balanced multi-attribute steering than existing training-free baselines while better preserving output coherence.
title: ORBIT: Training-Free Multi-Attribute Behavioral Steering via Orthogonal Subspace Rotation
title_translated: ORBIT：通过正交子空间旋转实现无需训练的多属性行为调控
summary_translated: 语言模型广泛应用于助手场景，其中控制行为属性至关重要。激活调控在推理时修改隐藏状态表示，提供一种轻量、无需训练且可实时切换的机制。然而，现有方法主要专注于单一属性的调控。当需同时控制多个属性时，简单叠加各属性调控向量会导致范数失衡和方向抵消，而基于分类器的方法在属性集合变化时需重新训练。我们提出ORBIT（正交旋转调控技术），一种面向多属性场景的无需训练的旋转调控扩展。我们的方法通过奇异值分解构建各属性调控平面的联合子空间，并在该子空间内执行一次保持范数的旋转，朝向组合目标方向。自适应的每标记门控机制识别每个位置需要修正的属性，可选的加法增强则强化初始投影较弱的属性。我们还引入TraitFactory，一个新的多属性基准，聚焦于行为倾向而非表面风格。我们在TraitFactory和ToneBank上对三个模型（Llama-3.2-3B、Qwen-2.5-7B、Llama-3.1-8B）进行多属性同步调控评估，结果显示，ORBIT在实现更强且更均衡的多属性调控方面优于现有无需训练基线，同时更好地保持输出连贯性。

summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) provide a new opportunity to study how language shapes exploratory cognition because conversational strategies can be systematically manipulated at inference time. We introduce CURIOBOT, a framework that operationalizes Berlyne's collative variables, novelty, complexity, conflict, and uncertainty, as adaptive linguistic interventions for conversational tutoring. Across 270 tutoring conversations spanning multiple model families, domains, and topic complexity levels, curiosity-oriented interventions consistently increased exploratory learner behaviors, producing up to 2.4x more conversational turns under fixed time budgets. To measure these effects, we further introduce a learner-centered evaluation framework capturing exploratory questioning, conversational agency, productive struggle, and observable curiosity. Learner-side gains persisted even when tutor-side instructional quality remained unchanged, suggesting that curiosity functions as a partially independent interaction-level mechanism. More broadly, our results demonstrate that LLM-mediated dialogue can serve as a scalable experimental framework for studying how language shapes exploratory learning behavior.
title: Curiosity as Linguistic Intervention: Using LLM Tutoring Dialogues to Influence Exploratory Learning Behavior
title_translated: 好奇心作为语言干预：利用大语言模型辅导对话影响探索性学习行为
summary_translated: 大语言模型（LLMs）为研究语言如何塑造探索性认知提供了新机遇，因为对话策略可以在推理阶段系统性地操控。我们提出了CURIOBOT框架，将Berlyne的 collative 变量（新颖性、复杂性、冲突和不确定性）操作化为对话辅导中的自适应语言干预。在跨越多个模型家族、领域和主题复杂度水平的270次辅导对话中，以好奇心为导向的干预持续提升了学习者的探索性行为，在固定时间预算下最多使对话轮次增加2.4倍。为衡量这些效果，我们进一步引入了一个以学习者为中心的评估框架，捕捉探索性提问、对话自主性、建设性挣扎和可观察的好奇心。即使辅导方的教学质量保持不变，学习者方面的收益依然存在，表明好奇心作为一种部分独立的交互层面机制发挥作用。更广泛地说，我们的结果表明，LLM介导的对话可以作为研究语言如何塑造探索性学习行为的可扩展实验框架。

summary: How does research evolve, and what substrate would let us forecast where it goes next? Scientific progress is not simply a uniform accumulation of facts: ideas extend prior methods, address known limitations, realize proposed future directions, and sometimes dispute earlier claims. Existing citation graphs usually collapse these roles into a single homogeneous edge type, limiting how we can analyze scientific progress. We address this gap by proposing the SciTraj corpus, the first claim-grounded typed citation graph in which each edge is linked to the specific claim sentence that motivates it. Claim-bearing sentences are extracted from paper sections; four claim-driven relations are verified by NLI entailment against in-paper context, while two similarity-only relations are gated by abstract cosine and year-gap rules. SciTraj contains 32,559 papers from NLP, ML, and Vision (2015--2024), connected by 573,126 directed edges across six relation types, with NLI-verified claim seeds. Using SciTraj, we identify disciplinary siloing in typed citation flow and topic emergence concentrated in Vision and LLM-related work. The corpus also contains 287M typed trajectories of length $\geq 3$, covering 72.8% of papers, and supports a temporally split typed link-prediction benchmark. A year-shuffle falsifiability test separates temporal structure from year-correlated content, and a 3-annotator pilot reports $κ= 0.74$ with 79.9% precision.
title: How Does Research Evolve? Tracing Cross-Domain Trajectories in NLP, ML, and CV with Claim-Grounded Typed Citations
title_translated: 研究如何演进？基于主张基础类型引用的NLP、ML与CV跨领域轨迹追踪
summary_translated: 研究是如何演进的？何种基础能让我们预测其未来走向？科学进步并非简单的事实积累：思想会拓展先前方法，解决已知局限，实现提出的未来方向，有时还会质疑早期主张。现有引用图通常将这些角色简化为单一同质边类型，限制了我们对科学进步的分析能力。为此，我们提出了SciTraj语料库，这是首个基于主张的类型化引用图，其中每条边都关联到具体推动它的主张句子。具有主张的句子从论文章节中提取；四种由主张驱动的关系通过NLI蕴含关系在文中上下文验证，而两种仅基于相似性的关系则通过摘要余弦相似度和年份间隔规则进行筛选。SciTraj包含来自NLP、ML和视觉领域的32,559篇论文（2015–2024年），由573,126条有向边连接，涵盖六种关系类型，并包含经NLI验证的主张种子。利用SciTraj，我们识别出类型化引用流中的学科孤岛现象，以及集中在视觉和大模型相关工作中的主题兴起。该语料库还包含2.87亿条长度≥3的类型化轨迹，覆盖72.8%的论文，并支持时间分割的类型化链接预测基准。通过年份打乱的可证伪性测试，将时间结构与年份相关的内容区分开来；三位标注员的初步测试报告κ=0.74，精确率达79.9%。

summary: LLM-as-a-judge has become the dominant approach to scalable evaluation in NLP pipelines, yet judges themselves carry systematic biases that raw accuracy hides: they favor responses placed in slot A (position bias), they prefer longer responses regardless of quality (verbosity bias), and their reliability degrades sharply in lower-resource languages. We introduce BabelJudge, an open-source benchmark and reliability audit framework that measures all four failure modes -- position bias, verbosity bias, order inconsistency, and cross-lingual degradation -- on any judge model, without requiring human preference labels. The key insight is gold-labelling by degradation: starting from a high-quality reference response and applying a controlled perturbation yields a pairwise item whose gold label is known by construction, eliminating annotation cost. We evaluate Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-4bit across English, Hindi, Arabic, and Swahili and find that our composite bias-penalised reliability score drops from 0.714 in Hindi to 0.550 in Swahili, a gap that raw accuracy (0.835 vs. 0.660) understates. Swahili order consistency collapses to 0.480, meaning judge verdicts are near-random under slot-order swaps -- a failure mode invisible to accuracy alone. We further extend the framework to agentic evaluation via nine trajectory-level perturbations (argument corruption, tool swaps, hallucinated calls, missing steps) and three new metrics: tool accuracy, hallucination detection rate, and trajectory-length bias. BabelJudge is released as a Python package supporting 11 judge backends. Code: https://github.com/Shreyaskc/BabelJudge
title: BabelJudge: Measuring LLM-as-a-Judge Reliability Across Languages and Agent Trajectories
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures. Source code, benchmark toolkit, and reproduction scripts at this https URL
title_translated: BabelJudge：跨语言与智能体轨迹测量大语言模型作为评判者的可靠性
summary_translated: 大语言模型作为评判者已成为NLP流水线中可扩展评估的主流方法，但评判者自身携带系统性偏差，而原始准确率掩盖了这些问题：它们偏好置于A位置的回答（位置偏差）、无论质量高低都更倾向长回答（冗长偏差），且在低资源语言中的可靠性急剧下降。我们提出BabelJudge，一个开源基准与可靠性审计框架，可在任何评判模型上测量所有四种失效模式——位置偏差、冗长偏差、顺序不一致性和跨语言退化，无需人类偏好标签。核心洞察在于通过退化进行黄金标注：从高质量参考回答出发并施加受控扰动，即可生成一个黄金标签已知的成对项目，从而消除标注成本。我们在Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-4bit模型上评估英语、印地语、阿拉伯语和斯瓦希里语，发现复合偏差惩罚后的可靠性得分从印地语的0.714降至斯瓦希里语的0.550，而原始准确率（0.835 vs. 0.660）低估了这一差距。斯瓦希里语的顺序一致性降至0.480，意味着在槽位顺序交换下，评判结果接近随机——这一失效模式仅靠准确率无法察觉。我们进一步将框架扩展至智能体评估，引入九种轨迹级扰动（论点破坏、工具替换、虚构调用、缺失步骤）和三种新指标：工具准确性、幻觉检测率和轨迹长度偏差。BabelJudge以Python包形式发布，支持11种评判后端。代码：https://github.com/Shreyaskc/BabelJudge

summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve remarkable reasoning capabilities through reinforcement learning (RL) post-training. However, existing RL post-training commonly relies on uniform data sampling, which ignores the semantic structure of the training data and the changing capability of the training policy. To address these limitations, we propose Adaptive Data Scheduling (ADS), a dual-level data scheduling framework for pacing RL post-training that replaces uniform sampling with an adaptive distribution over semantic clusters and policy-boundary sample selection. At the cluster level, ADS organizes samples according to semantic patterns and maintains an adaptive inter-cluster distribution to solidify current training progress. At the sample level, ADS performs intra-cluster scheduling to continuously sample policy-boundary samples, which provides informative relative advantages. Experimental results across three LLMs and seven reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that ADS improves average accuracy by 5.2% over Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). Notably, ADS consistently improves RL methods with different objective designs, highlighting its potential as a general data scheduling strategy for LLM RL post-training. The source code is available at: https://github.com/Richard-zrx/ADS.
title: Learning at the Right Pace: Adaptive Data Scheduling Improves LLM Reinforcement Learning
title_translated: 以恰当节奏学习：自适应数据调度提升大语言模型强化学习性能
summary_translated: 大语言模型通过强化学习（RL）后训练实现了卓越的推理能力。然而，现有的RL后训练普遍依赖于均匀数据采样，忽略了训练数据的语义结构以及训练策略能力的变化。为解决这些局限，我们提出自适应数据调度（ADS），一种双层级数据调度框架，用于调节RL后训练的节奏，取代均匀采样，转而采用基于语义簇的自适应分布和策略边界样本选择。在簇级别，ADS根据语义模式组织样本，并维持自适应的簇间分布以巩固当前训练进展；在样本级别，ADS执行簇内调度，持续采样策略边界样本，提供信息丰富的相对优势。在三个大语言模型和七个推理基准上的实验结果表明，ADS相比组相对策略优化（GRPO）平均准确率提升5.2%。值得注意的是，ADS在不同目标设计的RL方法中均表现出持续改进，凸显其作为大语言模型RL后训练通用数据调度策略的潜力。源代码见：https://github.com/Richard-zrx/ADS。

summary: Low-resource African languages lack text corpora needed for language model training. We investigate whether ASR pipelines can extend text resources for two typologically distinct West African languages: Fongbe (tonal, diacritic-rich) and Hausa (non-tonal). We fine-tune MMS-300M on a curated 12.3-hour Fongbe dataset, achieving 9.48% WER on the ALFFA benchmark - a 78% relative reduction from the prior 44.04% baseline - while preserving tonal diacritics critical to the language. For Hausa, we apply an existing fine-tuned Whisper-Small model. We catalog 1,553 YouTube videos (236 hours) and process a subset of 424 videos (45.49 hours) selected to balance domain diversity with available computational resources, producing 6,770 transcribed segments. Human evaluation on 50 randomly sampled segments per language shows mean quality scores of 57.4/100 for Hausa and 36.5/100 for Fongbe, indicating that while Hausa transcriptions approach acceptable quality for corpus construction, Fongbe transcriptions require post-processing or improved models for production use. We release the curated dataset, fine-tuned model, transcribed corpus, and full video catalog following platform terms and ethical guidelines.
title: From Speech to Text Corpora: Evaluating ASR-Based Data Acquisition for Low-Resource Fongbe and Hausa
title_translated: 从语音到文本语料库：评估基于自动语音识别的低资源Fongbe和Hausa语言数据获取
summary_translated: 低资源非洲语言缺乏用于语言模型训练所需的文本语料库。我们研究了自动语音识别（ASR）流程是否能够为两种类型学上不同的西非语言——Fongbe（声调丰富、带变音符号）和Hausa（非声调）——扩展文本资源。我们对MMS-300M在精心筛选的12.3小时Fongbe数据集上进行微调，在ALFFA基准上取得9.48%的词错误率（WER），相较之前的44.04%基线降低了78%，同时保留了对语言至关重要的声调变音符号。对于Hausa，我们使用已微调的Whisper-Small模型。我们整理了1,553个YouTube视频（共236小时），并处理了其中424个视频（45.49小时）的子集，以平衡领域多样性与可用计算资源，生成6,770个转录片段。对每种语言随机抽取的50个片段进行人工评估，结果显示Hausa的平均质量得分为57.4/100，Fongbe为36.5/100，表明尽管Hausa的转录质量已达到可用于语料库构建的可接受水平，但Fongbe的转录仍需后期处理或更优模型才能投入生产使用。我们按照平台条款和伦理准则发布了精选数据集、微调模型、转录语料库和完整视频目录。

summary: Pre-trained language models struggle when applied to new domains, as full fine-tuning is computationally expensive and prone to catastrophic forgetting. This study addresses this challenge by presenting a novel parameter-efficient strategy for unsupervised domain adaptation that combines custom PEFT architectures with mixed-objective training. Our approach simultaneously optimizes classification performance on labeled source domain data and masked language modeling (MLM) on unlabeled target domain data, preserving target domain knowledge while adapting to source domain tasks. Our method employs a custom union of invertible adapters and Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) within a unified parameter-efficient framework. Through comprehensive evaluation on the Multi-Genre Natural Language Inference (MNLI) dataset across 20 domain shifts, our approach achieves significant improvements over existing methods: 1.41 percentage points over the current parameter-efficient state-of-the-art UDapter, 1.26 percentage points over the fully-tuned DANN baseline, and 0.86 percentage points over DSN, while utilizing only 7% of the model's trainable parameters. These results establish new benchmarks for parameter-efficient unsupervised domain adaptation and demonstrate that carefully designed PEFT combinations with concurrent optimization can outperform both existing parameter-efficient methods and traditional fully-tuned approaches.
title: MixedPEFT: Combining Multiple PEFT Methods with Mixed Objectives for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
comment: 6 pages, 5 tables. Builds upon our preliminary work presented at UBMK 2024
title_translated: MixedPEFT：结合多种PEFT方法与混合目标的无监督域适应
summary_translated: 预训练语言模型在应用于新领域时面临挑战，因为全量微调计算成本高且易导致灾难性遗忘。本研究提出一种新颖的参数高效策略，用于无监督域适应，将定制的PEFT架构与混合目标训练相结合。我们的方法同时优化标注源域数据上的分类性能和未标注目标域数据上的掩码语言建模（MLM）性能，在保留目标域知识的同时适应源域任务。该方法在一个统一的参数高效框架内，采用可逆适配器与低秩适配（LoRA）的自定义并集。在20个域转移场景下的多类型自然语言推理（MNLI）数据集上进行全面评估，结果显著优于现有方法：相比当前最先进的参数高效方法UDapter提升1.41个百分点，相比全微调DANN基线提升1.26个百分点，相比DSN提升0.86个百分点，且仅使用模型7%的可训练参数。这些结果为参数高效的无监督域适应建立了新基准，表明精心设计的PEFT组合与并发优化可超越现有的参数高效方法及传统全微调方法。

summary: We investigate the translation quality of current large language models (LLMs) for English-to-Hausa and English-to-Fongbe - two typologically distinct West African languages from the Afroasiatic and Niger-Congo families respectively - and evaluate whether standard automatic metrics reliably reflect human judgment for these low-resource languages. We evaluate four models (GPT-4o Mini, Claude Sonnet 4, Gemini 2.5 Flash, and Qwen2.5-7B) at progressive scales (500 to 10,000 sentences) using automatic metrics (BLEU, chrF++, TER, COMET, BERTScore) validated against native-speaker judgment. Our results reveal three key findings. First, translation quality varies substantially by language: Hausa achieves acceptable quality (human scores 4.0-4.5/5) while Fongbe achieves poor quality (1.0-2.2/5), with a consistent 3x BLEU gap across all systems. Second, model rankings differ by language - Gemini leads for Fongbe while GPT-4o leads for Hausa by human evaluation - indicating that performance on one low-resource African language does not predict performance on another. Third, metric-human correlation varies dramatically: perfect rank correlation for Fongbe (rho=1.0) but weak correlation for Hausa (rho=0.5), where human evaluators preferred GPT-4o despite all automatic metrics ranking Claude first. We further show that neural metrics like BERTScore exhibit embedding collapse (within-language similarity >0.99) for both languages, limiting their ability to differentiate translation quality. Based on these findings, we recommend multi-metric evaluation for low-resource African languages, with particular caution when interpreting neural metrics. We establish that minimum sample sizes of n=2,500 sentences are required for stable system rankings, as smaller samples produced artifact findings that reversed at scale.
title: Evaluating Large Language Models for Hausa and Fongbe Machine Translation: Benchmarks, Failures, and Metric Reliability
title_translated: 评估大语言模型在豪萨语和丰贝语机器翻译中的表现：基准、失败与度量可靠性
summary_translated: 我们研究了当前大语言模型（LLMs）在英语到豪萨语和英语到丰贝语翻译中的质量——这两种语言分别属于亚非语系和尼日尔-刚果语系，具有不同的语言类型特征，并评估标准自动度量是否能可靠反映人类判断。我们在不同规模（500至10,000句）下对四种模型（GPT-4o Mini、Claude Sonnet 4、Gemini 2.5 Flash、Qwen2.5-7B）进行评估，使用BLEU、chrF++、TER、COMET、BERTScore等自动度量，并与母语者判断进行验证。研究发现三个关键点：第一，翻译质量因语言而异：豪萨语达到可接受水平（人类评分4.0-4.5/5），而丰贝语表现较差（1.0-2.2/5），所有系统间存在一致的3倍BLEU差距；第二，模型排名随语言变化——Gemini在丰贝语中领先，而GPT-4o在豪萨语中领先，表明一个低资源非洲语言的表现无法预测另一个语言的表现；第三，度量与人类判断的相关性差异巨大：丰贝语中相关性完美（rho=1.0），而豪萨语中相关性较弱（rho=0.5），尽管所有自动度量均将Claude排在首位，但人类更偏好GPT-4o。我们还发现，BERTScore等神经度量在两种语言中均出现嵌入坍塌（同语言相似度>0.99），限制其区分翻译质量的能力。基于此，我们建议对低资源非洲语言采用多度量评估，并谨慎解读神经度量结果。我们确立了稳定系统排名所需的最小样本量为n=2,500句，更小样本会产生人为偏差并在更大规模下反转。

summary: Artificial intelligence systems are commonly evaluated through task performance and behavioral imitation, but such evaluations leave open whether an artificial agent can acquire, stabilize, and use new lexical meanings from grounded experience. This paper introduces Lexical Consensus, an experimental framework for studying grounded word learning over a structured perceptual substrate. Using frozen DINOv2 visual embeddings, Carroll-style nonce words, and interpretable lexical learners plus linear baselines, we test whether agents can acquire artificial labels for visual concepts, generalize them bidirectionally, and stabilize them across controlled settings.   The main result is a robust perceptual-coherence gradient: native categories are easiest to learn, coherent overextensions remain learnable, mid-range disjunctive concepts degrade, and far-disjunctive concepts approach chance. A pre-registered CIFAR-100 dissociation experiment confirms that this gradient is governed by perceptual distance rather than semantic relatedness: perceptual distance predicts acquisition accuracy (partial R^2 = 0.245, p < 1e-7), while semantic distance adds no significant explanatory power (partial R^2 = 0.002, p = 0.660).   Bidirectional evaluation shows that naming and retrieval are distinct: exemplar-based mechanisms outperform centroid prototypes in label-to-image retrieval, exposing a memory-fidelity dimension separate from naming accuracy. Falsification controls, homogeneous candidate-pool evaluations, and null results on representational restructuring indicate that frozen perceptual geometry both enables lexical grounding and limits what can be acquired without representational adaptation.
title: Lexical Consensus: Grounded Word Learning and Shared Meaning in Artificial Agents
comment: 41 pages, 12 figures, 9 tables. Code and experiment artifacts available at this https URL
title_translated: 词汇共识：人工代理中的具身词义学习与共享意义
summary_translated: 人工智能系统通常通过任务表现和行为模仿来评估，但这类评估未能揭示人工代理是否能从具身经验中获取、稳定并使用新的词汇意义。本文提出‘词汇共识’实验框架，用于研究在结构化感知基底上进行的具身词义学习。利用冻结的DINOv2视觉嵌入、Carroll风格的临时词汇以及可解释的词汇学习器与线性基线，我们测试代理能否为视觉概念获取人工标签，实现双向泛化，并在受控环境中稳定这些标签。主要结果呈现了一个稳健的感知一致性梯度：原生类别最容易学习，一致的过度扩展仍可学习，中等离散概念性能下降，远距离离散概念接近随机水平。一项预先注册的CIFAR-100分离实验确认，这一梯度由感知距离而非语义相关性决定：感知距离可预测学习准确率（偏R² = 0.245，p < 1e-7），而语义距离无显著解释力（偏R² = 0.002，p = 0.660）。双向评估显示命名与检索是独立过程：基于示例的机制在标签到图像检索中优于中心原型，揭示了记忆保真度这一独立于命名准确性的维度。 falsification控制、同质候选池评估以及表征重构的零结果表明，冻结的感知几何结构既支持词汇具身，也限制了无需表征适应即可习得的内容。

summary: LLM "agent societies" are studied via demonstrations of emergent consensus or polarization -- with no measurable control parameter, no theory of when each regime appears, and no test of whether an outcome is a genuine social dynamic or a model artifact. We introduce the coupling gain gamma, measured per-agent by counterfactually perturbing a neighbour's stated opinion. (i) gamma is stable and model-distinguishing -- across five frontier models it spans 0.15-0.43 (n=20, 95% CIs <= 0.025), paraphrase-invariant; social-neighbour gamma roughly equals numeric-anchor gamma, so gamma is evidence-coupling, not uniquely social. (ii) Classical dynamics with measured (not assumed) coefficients organise the regime: Friedkin-Johnsen for consensus/pluralism, signed-Laplacian/structural-balance for polarization. (iii) Frontier LLMs do not spontaneously backfire (beta <= 0), so default societies do not self-polarize -- polarization is always induced; the beta>0 branch arises only in the FJ surrogate, never in the agents. (iv) A randomized-initial-condition diagnostic -- the (slope, bias) of final vs. initial opinion -- separates genuine averaging from model-prior artifacts (boundary-censoring ruled out by construction via interior-valued facts); applied to a published "emergent consensus" result (Chuang et al. 2023) it reveals a model-specific conflation: averaging on debatable claims, prior-artifact on settled facts. (v) Coupling is context-dependent: pairwise gamma does not predict multi-neighbour outcomes -- it can order them backwards -- whereas a modality-matched group coupling does (sixteen closed+open models, Pearson r=-0.70, permutation p=0.008). The regime laws take this matched coupling, not the single-neighbour gamma: emergent consensus must be read from coupling in the target interaction. We contribute a measurement protocol and a validity instrument, not new theory.
title: When Is Emergent Consensus Real? A Measured Coupling Gain and a Validity Diagnostic for LLM Agent Societies
comment: 13 pages (incl. appendix with proofs), 7 figures. Code and per-run logs released
title_translated: 涌现共识何时为真？一种测量耦合增益与LLM代理社会有效性诊断
summary_translated: LLM‘代理社会’的研究常依赖于涌现共识或极化的演示，但缺乏可测量的控制参数、关于每种状态何时出现的理论，以及对结果是否为真实社会动态还是模型伪影的检验。我们引入耦合增益gamma，通过反事实扰动邻近代理的观点进行逐代理测量。（i）gamma具有稳定性与模型区分性——在五个前沿模型中跨度为0.15–0.43（n=20，95%置信区间≤0.025），且对改写不敏感；社交邻近gamma与数值锚定gamma大致相等，说明gamma反映的是证据耦合，而非唯一社会性。（ii）通过测量（而非假设）系数的经典动力学模型组织了状态：Friedkin-Johnsen模型适用于共识/多元主义，带符号拉普拉斯/结构平衡模型适用于极化。（iii）前沿LLM不会自发反弹（beta ≤ 0），因此默认社会不会自我极化——极化总是被诱导产生；只有在FJ代理替代模型中才出现beta > 0分支，从未在真实代理中出现。（iv）通过随机初始条件诊断——最终与初始观点的（斜率，偏移）关系——可区分真实平均化与模型先验伪影（通过内部值事实构造排除边界截断）；应用于一篇发表的“涌现共识”结果（Chuang et al. 2023），揭示出模型特异性混淆：对争议性主张表现为平均化，对确定性事实则为先验伪影。（v）耦合具有情境依赖性：成对gamma无法预测多邻近结果——甚至可能反向排序——而模态匹配的群体耦合则可以（16个封闭+开放模型，皮尔逊r = -0.70，置换p = 0.008）。状态规律依赖于目标交互中的匹配耦合，而非单邻近gamma：涌现共识必须从目标互动中的耦合读取。我们贡献了一套测量协议与有效性工具，而非新理论。

summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed as black-box classifiers in pipelines that automate confident decisions and route uncertain ones to human review. Such selective prediction needs a confidence score that an operator can threshold at a chosen risk level. Prior work asks whether LLM confidence is well calibrated or well ranked; we ask a complementary, deployment-oriented question that has been largely overlooked: at what resolution can the score be thresholded? We call the answer the score granularity gap. Through a controlled comparison of seven ways to build a confidence score, from a single verbalized number, to token probabilities, to querying the model many times and combining the answers, across 25 model-dataset pairs (9 LLMs, 3 benchmarks), we find that single-shot verbalized confidence, once correctly converted to a class probability, ranks cases surprisingly well, yet takes only a handful of distinct values. It therefore offers an operator only a few coarse thresholds, no matter how well it ranks. We show which constructions widen this gap, at what inference cost, and with what effect on ranking, notably that multi-query aggregation helps weak models but can degrade already-strong ones. We translate these trade-offs into concrete deployment guidance.
title: The Score Granularity Gap in Black-Box LLM Classification: A Comparative Study of Confidence Constructions
title_translated: 黑箱LLM分类中的得分粒度差距：置信度构建的比较研究
summary_translated: 大语言模型（LLMs）越来越多地作为黑箱分类器部署在自动化决策流程中，用于识别高置信度案例并将其余不确定案例转交人工审查。此类选择性预测需要一个操作员可设定阈值的风险水平置信分数。先前研究关注LLM置信度是否校准良好或排序合理；我们提出一个互补且面向部署的问题，却长期被忽视：该得分可在何种分辨率上进行阈值划分？我们将答案称为得分粒度差距。通过对七种构建置信分数的方法（从单一口头数字到token概率，再到多次查询并聚合结果）在25个模型-数据集对（9个LLM，3个基准）中的受控比较，我们发现：单次输出的口头置信度，一旦正确转换为类别概率，其排序表现令人意外地良好，但仅包含少量离散取值。因此，无论其排序能力如何，它仅提供少数粗略阈值。我们展示了哪些构建方式会扩大这一差距，代价如何，以及对排序效果的影响，特别是多轮查询聚合有助于弱模型，但可能损害已有强模型。我们将这些权衡转化为具体的部署指导。

summary: We present BioMatrix, the first multimodal foundation model that natively integrates sequences, structures, and natural language for both molecules and proteins within a single decoder-only architecture. Existing biological foundation models pursue native multimodality and broad entity coverage separately: those that fuse multiple modalities under a shared objective remain confined to a single entity type, while those spanning multiple entity types either omit explicit structural modeling or rely on adapter-based designs in which the model cannot natively generate the very modalities it can read. BioMatrix closes this gap by mapping molecular sequences (supporting both SMILES and SELFIES notations), molecular structures, protein sequences, protein structures, and natural language into a shared discrete token space through a unified tokenization scheme, so that all modalities are consumed and produced uniformly under a single next-token prediction objective -- without external encoders, projection adapters, or modality-specific output heads. Built upon the Qwen3 language model (1.7B and 4B), BioMatrix is continually pretrained on 304.4 billion tokens spanning general and domain-specific text, sequence and structure views of molecules and proteins, and cross-modal corpora that interleave biomolecular entities with scientific text and link distinct entities through molecule-protein and protein-protein interaction data. After tuning on a comprehensive suite of downstream applications covering 80 tasks across 6 categories -- encompassing single-entity and multi-entity understanding and generation tasks across and within modalities -- BioMatrix achieves state-of-the-art or competitive performance on 77 out of 80 tasks, demonstrating that a single, natively multimodal generalist model can effectively match or surpass specialized approaches across a wide range of biological tasks.
title: BioMatrix: Towards a Comprehensive Biological Foundation Model Spanning the Modality Matrix of Sequences, Structures, and Language
title_translated: BioMatrix：迈向涵盖序列、结构与语言模态矩阵的综合性生物基础模型
summary_translated: 我们提出BioMatrix，首个原生整合分子与蛋白质的序列、结构和自然语言三种模态的多模态基础模型，采用单一解码器架构。现有生物基础模型在原生多模态性和实体覆盖范围上分别探索：融合多种模态的模型通常局限于单一实体类型，而跨多个实体类型的模型则要么忽略显式结构建模，要么依赖适配器设计，导致模型无法原生生成其可读取的模态。BioMatrix通过统一的分词方案，将分子序列（支持SMILES和SELFIES表示）、分子结构、蛋白质序列、蛋白质结构及自然语言映射到共享离散标记空间，使所有模态在单一的下一个标记预测目标下被统一消费与生成——无需外部编码器、投影适配器或模态特定输出头。基于Qwen3语言模型（1.7B和4B参数），BioMatrix在3044亿个标记的持续预训练数据上进行训练，涵盖通用与领域特定文本、分子与蛋白质的序列与结构视图，以及交错包含生物分子实体与科学文本的跨模态语料库，并通过分子-蛋白质和蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用数据连接不同实体。在涵盖6个类别共80项任务的下游应用套件上微调后，BioMatrix在80项任务中有77项达到或超过当前最优性能，证明单一原生多模态通用模型可在广泛生物任务中有效匹配甚至超越专用方法。

summary: Time series analysis has recently been coupled with Large Language Models (LLMs) to leverage their reasoning and world knowledge capabilities, yet gains remain limited. We attribute this to a fundamental mismatch between existing task formulations and LLM strengths: most settings reduce time series understanding to curve-fitting systems, focusing on low-level prediction while ignoring the semantic, contextual, and reasoning-intensive nature of real-world temporal decision-making.To address these limitations, we introduce TSCognition, a multimodal benchmark for multi-dimensional time series reasoning. It collects real-world time series and textual information from 15 public sources and constructs approximately 41K QA samples around five cognitive reasoning tasks: Decoding, Grounding, Inferring, Extrapolating, and Acting. Building on this, we further propose TSAlign, a unified framework that encodes time series into compact patch-level representations and aligns them with semantic directions in the LLM embedding space via gated residual injection and multivariate fusion.Experiments show that TSAlign outperforms existing LLM, VLM, and time series QA baselines on TSCognition and the publicly available TimerBed benchmark while substantially reducing computational cost.Code is available at: [https://github.com/EIT-NLP/CognitiveTSR](https://github.com/EIT-NLP/CognitiveTSR)
title: From Recognition to Understanding: Unlocking Cognitive Time Series Reasoning with LLMs
title_translated: 从识别到理解：利用大语言模型解锁认知时间序列推理
summary_translated: 时间序列分析近年来与大语言模型（LLM）结合，以利用其推理与世界知识能力，但进展仍有限。我们认为这源于现有任务设定与LLM优势之间的根本性错配：多数场景将时间序列理解简化为曲线拟合系统，聚焦低层次预测，而忽视真实世界时间决策中的语义、上下文及推理密集特性。为解决这一局限，我们引入TSCognition，一个用于多维时间序列推理的多模态基准。该基准从15个公开来源收集真实世界的时间序列与文本信息，构建约4.1万个围绕五种认知推理任务的问答样本：解码、定位、推断、外推与行动。在此基础上，我们进一步提出TSAlign框架，通过门控残差注入与多变量融合，将时间序列编码为紧凑的块级表示，并将其对齐至LLM嵌入空间中的语义方向。实验表明，TSAlign在TSCognition和公开可用的TimerBed基准上均优于现有LLM、视觉语言模型（VLM）及时间序列问答基线，同时显著降低计算成本。代码已开源：[https://github.com/EIT-NLP/CognitiveTSR](https://github.com/EIT-NLP/CognitiveTSR)

summary: The paper explores how "culture" can be operationalised in Natural Language Processing (NLP) and what this reveals about the possibilities and limits of considering a plurality of cultural backgrounds in technological design. It proposes that cultural alignment cannot be achieved only by adding more examples of "other cultures", rather it requires plural epistemologies: allowing multiple, locally grounded ways of knowing. To analyze how this plurality of knowing can be addressed in NLP, the paper uses a socio-technical model of language technology (LT) design, the five layers of technological activity model, for collecting and systematizing approaches to culture in NLP. The analysis shows that while NLP research has made progress toward more culturally sensitive systems, many approaches remain partial, addressing "culture" primarily at the level of output or representation while leaving deeper questions of power, governance, and social context unresolved. The paper concludes that operationalising culture requires much more than technical adaptation; it suggests a reflexive and plural socio-technical approach that navigates potentials and limits of computational formalisation for accounting multiple linguistic and socio-cultural backgrounds.
title: Plurification in/of language technology -- The integration of culture in next-generation AI
title_translated: 语言技术中的多元性：下一代人工智能中文化的融合
summary_translated: 本文探讨了如何在自然语言处理（NLP）中实现“文化”的操作化，并揭示了在技术设计中考虑多元文化背景的可能性与局限。文章提出，仅通过增加更多“其他文化”的示例无法实现文化对齐，而需要多元认识论：允许多种本地化扎根的知识方式共存。为分析NLP中如何应对这种多元知识，本文采用语言技术（LT）设计的社会技术模型——五层技术活动模型，系统整理并归纳了NLP中关于文化的各类方法。分析显示，尽管NLP研究在构建更具文化敏感性的系统方面取得进展，但许多方法仍不完整，主要停留在输出或表征层面处理“文化”，而未触及权力、治理与社会背景等深层问题。文章最后指出，实现文化操作化远不止于技术适应；它需要一种反思性且多元的社会技术路径，以应对计算形式化在涵盖多种语言与社会文化背景时的潜力与局限。

summary: Web data curation has been widely studied for decoder Large Language Model (LLM) pretraining. Encoders for dense-terminology domains such as medicine, by contrast, are pretrained on small, manually-curated corpora that limit scalability and writing style diversity, a bottleneck even more severe in non-English clinical settings. Whether web-scale data curation also benefits encoder Masked Language Modeling (MLM) in a dense-terminology domain remains an open question. To address this, we introduce two complementary levers. Medical-term density filtering selects documents rich in medical terms. Signal-amplifying rephrasing uses an LLM to rewrite documents into denser variants with broader entity contexts. We instantiate the recipe on French medical NLP. The medical-term density filter outperforms the widely-used educational quality filter on downstream medical tasks, and the two complement each other. Signal-amplifying rephrasing alone improves on raw web data, and mixing it with filtered web data produces the largest gain. The recipe yields FineMed, a French medical pretraining corpus, and DoctoBERT, a state-of-the-art French medical encoder family evaluated on both the public benchmark DrBenchmark and a proprietary clinical Named Entity Recognition (NER) task.
title: Where Does the Signal Live? A Web Data Recipe for Medical Encoder Pretraining
comment: Code, models, and data: this https URL
title_translated: 信号存在于何处？面向医学编码器预训练的网络数据配方
summary_translated: 网络数据筛选已被广泛研究用于解码器型大语言模型（LLM）的预训练。相比之下，密集术语领域（如医学）的编码器通常在小规模人工标注语料库上进行预训练，限制了可扩展性与写作风格多样性，这一瓶颈在非英语临床环境中尤为严重。是否大规模网络数据筛选同样有助于密集术语领域的编码器掩码语言建模（MLM）仍是开放问题。为解决此问题，我们引入两个互补机制：医学术语密度过滤，用于选择富含医学术语的文档；信号增强重述，利用大语言模型将文档重写为包含更广实体上下文的更密集版本。我们在法语医学NLP中实现了该配方。医学术语密度过滤在下游医学任务中优于广泛使用的教育质量过滤，二者具有互补性。仅使用信号增强重述即可提升原始网络数据表现，而将其与过滤后的网络数据混合使用则带来最大增益。该配方生成了FineMed法语医学预训练语料库，以及DoctoBERT法语医学编码器系列，在公开基准DrBenchmark和专有临床命名实体识别（NER）任务上均达到领先水平。

summary: Block-based programming environments such as Scratch are widely used in early programming education, yet natural-language-to-code (NL2Code) research has focused primarily on text-based languages. Scratch programs are event-driven, visually compositional, and distributed across concurrent scripts, making conventional NL2Code assumptions and evaluation insufficient. We introduce NL2Scratch, an executable benchmark for natural-language-to-Scratch generation comprising 311,648 parser-valid NL--program pairs, whose program side is extracted from real Scratch projects and paired with semantically aligned NL descriptions. For reliable evaluation beyond surface overlap, we propose Semantic Alignment Consistency (SAC), an interpretable slot-level metric for measuring semantic agreement between descriptions and programs. With SAC, we construct a semantically validated pool of 23,594 examples, and a slot-balanced 800 diagnostic benchmark. Experiments across instruction-tuned and fine-tuned LLMs reveal a notable gap between lexical similarity and semantic alignment: models achieving token-level F1 above 0.93 often fail to attain perfect SAC, particularly on longer examples. Errors concentrate on operational slots like actions, conditions, and numeric arguments, exposing failure modes largely invisible under conventional metrics.
title: NL2Scratch: An Executable Benchmark and Evaluation for Block-Based Programming
title_translated: NL2Scratch：面向积木式编程的可执行基准与评估
summary_translated: 积木式编程环境（如Scratch）广泛应用于早期编程教育，但自然语言到代码（NL2Code）研究主要聚焦于文本语言。Scratch程序具有事件驱动、视觉组合性及分布在并发脚本中的特点，使得传统NL2Code假设与评估方法不再适用。我们提出NL2Scratch，一个可执行的自然语言到Scratch生成基准，包含311,648个解析有效的NL-程序对，其中程序部分来自真实Scratch项目，与语义对齐的自然语言描述配对。为实现超越表面重叠的可靠评估，我们提出语义对齐一致性（SAC），一种可解释的槽位级指标，用于衡量描述与程序间的语义一致性。基于SAC，我们构建了一个语义验证池（23,594个示例）和一个槽位平衡的800个诊断基准。在指令微调与微调的大语言模型上的实验揭示了词汇相似性与语义对齐之间显著差距：模型在token级F1超过0.93时，往往无法达到完美的SAC，尤其在长示例上表现不佳。错误集中于操作槽位，如动作、条件和数值参数，暴露出传统指标难以察觉的失败模式。

summary: Grapheme-to-phoneme (G2P) conversion is essential for controllable and robust text-to-speech, and large language models (LLMs), with broad linguistic knowledge, offer a promising approach. We benchmarked over 30 LLMs on Japanese G2P, comparing them with conventional morphological analyzers on 3000 manually annotated sentences. We evaluated two prompting strategies: a parse mode, where the LLM performs morphological analysis followed by rule-based kana conversion, and a direct mode, where the LLM directly predicts kana readings. The results show that model size, version, and Japanese-specialized training are key factors, with the best LLMs achieving kana character error rate below 0.52\% vs. the best conventional tool (1.03\%). Parse mode outperforms direct mode for most models, as rule-based post-processing relieves the LLM of handling complex pronunciation rules. We also show that feeding LLM-predicted kana into a kana-input TTS yields better pronunciation than end-to-end TTS.
title: Benchmarking Large Language Models for Grapheme-to-Phoneme Conversion: A Japanese Case Study
title_translated: 面向音素转换的大型语言模型基准测试：日语案例研究
summary_translated: 音素到音素（G2P）转换对于可控且鲁棒的文本转语音至关重要，而具备广泛语言知识的大型语言模型（LLMs）提供了有前景的解决方案。我们在日语G2P任务上对30多个LLM进行了基准测试，并与3000个手动标注句子上的传统形态分析器进行比较。评估了两种提示策略：解析模式（LLM执行形态分析后进行基于规则的假名转换）和直接模式（LLM直接预测假名读音）。结果表明，模型规模、版本以及针对日语的专项训练是关键因素，最佳LLM的假名字符错误率低于0.52%，优于最佳传统工具（1.03%）。大多数模型在解析模式下表现优于直接模式，因为基于规则的后处理减轻了LLM处理复杂发音规则的负担。我们还发现，将LLM预测的假名输入到假名输入的TTS系统中，其发音效果优于端到端TTS。

summary: Code-switching (CSW) remains challenging for large multi-lingual ASR systems in real-world deployment. While fine-tuning on synthetic CSW data is possible, it generally degrades strong monolingual baselines. Our goal is to preserve these capabilities while extending models to handle complex code-switching, including morphological variations across languages. We propose Bayesian factorized adaptation, which learns to efficiently integrate switching-relevant knowledge into strong pretrained models without overwriting existing capabilities. Requiring only a small amount of synthetic data, our approach reduces transcription errors by 32.87% on code-switched words while improving overall WER by 5.31%, all while maintaining mono-lingual performance. Our results demonstrate that effective CSW adaptation depends more on knowledge integration than data complexity.
title: Adding Robust Code-Switching Capabilities to High Performance Multilingual ASR
title_translated: 为高性能多语言自动语音识别系统添加鲁棒的代码切换能力
summary_translated: 在真实部署中，代码切换（CSW）对大型多语言自动语音识别系统仍具挑战性。尽管可以通过合成代码切换数据进行微调，但通常会损害强单语基线性能。我们的目标是在保持原有单语能力的同时，扩展模型以处理复杂的代码切换，包括跨语言的形态变化。我们提出贝叶斯因子化适应方法，能够高效地将与切换相关知识融入强大的预训练模型中，而不覆盖现有能力。仅需少量合成数据，该方法在代码切换词汇上的转录错误率降低32.87%，整体词错误率（WER）提升5.31%，同时维持单语性能。结果表明，有效的代码切换适应更依赖于知识整合而非数据复杂度。

summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) can generate fluent Arabic text, their ability to reliably control readability levels remains unclear. We propose a multi-dimensional evaluation framework for Common European Framework of Reference for Language (CEFR)-controlled Arabic text generation, assessing whether instruction-following LLMs can serve as reliable generators for adaptive language learning. Our framework integrates controlled prompting, automatic readability prediction using a validated Taha-19 model, lexical constraint validation, and syntactic complexity profiling. Results show that structured prompting substantially improves CEFR alignment. In particular, CEFR-guided prompting with lexical constraints achieves the highest conformity to reference linguistic profiles (0.91 cosine similarity) and near-perfect agreement with predicted readability levels (0.99), while unconstrained prompting exhibits weak control. These findings establish an empirical foundation for integrating readability-aware Arabic text generation into adaptive educational systems.
title: Can LLMs Control Readability? A Multi-Dimensional Evaluation Framework for CEFR-Controlled Arabic Generation
title_translated: 大型语言模型能否控制可读性？面向CEFR控制阿拉伯语生成的多维度评估框架
summary_translated: 尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）能生成流畅的阿拉伯语文本，但其可靠控制可读性水平的能力尚不明确。我们提出了一个面向欧洲共同语言参考框架（CEFR）控制的阿拉伯语文本生成的多维度评估框架，评估指令遵循型LLM是否可作为自适应语言学习系统的可靠生成器。该框架整合了受控提示、基于已验证Taha-19模型的自动可读性预测、词汇约束验证和句法复杂度分析。结果表明，结构化提示显著提升了CEFR一致性。特别是，结合词汇约束的CEFR引导提示达到了最高的参考语言特征符合度（0.91余弦相似度）和近乎完美的可读性预测一致性（0.99），而无约束提示则表现出较弱的控制力。这些发现为将可读性感知的阿拉伯语生成集成到自适应教育系统中奠定了实证基础。

summary: A working citation looks like proof -- but the fact that a link resolves does not mean the cited paper supports the claim. I find that current agentic models rarely fabricate citations (over $99\%$ resolve), yet roughly $15.9\%$ link to the wrong paper. Existing benchmarks miss this failure mode: when a question has a fixed answer key, a model can reproduce the expected source from that key rather than independently verifying that the source supports the claim. I introduce \textbf{\openbiorq{}}, a retrieval-grounded agentic benchmark of $12{,}553$ unsolved biomedical research questions across $12$ domains that treats open questions as a faithfulness-and-abstention probe. To my knowledge, this is the first biomedical benchmark to combine an agentic setting -- where the model must issue multiple tool calls -- with unsolved questions that have no answer key. Openness is verified against real follow-up evidence rather than a model's parametric knowledge. Difficulty is empirical: I anchor it on questions that three open-weight reference models fail to answer, rather than on subjective hardness labels. On this hardest subset, held-out models from the same lineage as the difficulty anchors solve only ~17%, while three independent frontier agents (Gemini-3-Pro, Opus-4.7, GPT-5.5) span a wide 29-60% range. The benchmark is thus hard, non-saturating (the best agent still leaves ~33-40\% unsolved), and discriminating across capability tiers. Beyond difficulty, I observe agentic collapse on the hardest questions, where agents stop using their tools. For the most collapse-prone model, blocking tool access entirely barely changes its score -- so tools stop paying off exactly where they are needed most. A frozen per-question checklist raises inter-judge agreement from Spearman 0.35 to 0.82.
title: OpenBioRQ: Unsolved Biomedical Research Questions for Agents
title_translated: OpenBioRQ：面向智能体的未解生物医学研究问题
summary_translated: 一个看似合理的引用可能只是形式上的证明——链接可解析并不意味着被引论文支持该主张。我发现当前智能体模型极少虚构引用（超过99%的链接可解析），但约15.9%的引用链接错误。现有基准未能捕捉这一失效模式：当问题具有固定答案键时，模型可从该键中复现预期来源，而非独立验证来源是否支持主张。我引入	extbf{	extit{OpenBioRQ}}，这是一个包含12,553个跨12个领域的未解生物医学研究问题的检索增强型智能体基准，将开放性问题作为忠实性与回避性探测工具。据我所知，这是首个将智能体场景（模型必须发出多次工具调用）与无答案键的未解问题相结合的生物医学基准。开放性通过真实后续证据验证，而非模型参数知识。难度基于实证：锚定在三个开源权重参考模型无法回答的问题上，而非主观难易标签。在此最困难子集上，同源线模型仅解决约17%，而三个独立前沿智能体（Gemini-3-Pro、Opus-4.7、GPT-5.5）得分范围为29%-60%。因此该基准具有高难度、非饱和性（最佳智能体仍有约33%-40%未解）和能力层级区分性。此外，我们观察到在最困难问题上智能体出现崩溃现象，即停止使用工具。对最易崩溃模型而言，完全禁用工具访问对其得分影响极小——工具在最需要时反而失效。引入每题检查清单后，评分者间一致性从Spearman 0.35提升至0.82。

summary: Cross-lingual transfer is a model's ability to generalize capabilities from well-represented source languages to under-represented target languages. Existing measures of a model's transfer strength conflate improvements in transfer with general improvements to accuracy in the source language. We advocate for an alternate metric that reliably captures transfer strength called Hardness Adjusted Transfer (HAT) Score, and use it to derive multiple insights on factors influencing transfer strength. Our analysis across twenty diverse language models and three popular mainstream multilingual benchmarks argues that 1) transfer in small models is not broken, 2) we are making slower than expected progress in cross-lingual transfer with model size, and 3) we have made clear progress over time.
title: Are Multilingual Models Actually Improving? Isolating True Cross-Lingual Transfer
title_translated: 多语言模型真的在进步吗？隔离真正的跨语言迁移
summary_translated: 跨语言迁移是指模型将高覆盖率源语言中的能力泛化到低覆盖率目标语言的能力。现有衡量模型迁移强度的方法混淆了迁移改进与源语言准确率提升之间的区别。我们倡导一种能可靠捕捉迁移强度的替代指标——硬度调整迁移（HAT）得分，并利用它揭示影响迁移强度的多个因素。通过对二十种不同语言模型及三个主流多语言基准的分析，得出以下结论：1）小型模型的迁移并未失效；2）随着模型规模增大，跨语言迁移进展慢于预期；3）我们确实在时间维度上取得了明显进步。

summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in contexts requiring complex moral reasoning and value trade-offs. However, existing evaluations typically rely on item-level behavioral metrics, which fail to capture how models structurally prioritize competing values as a cohesive system. To address this, we propose a symmetric human-LLM evaluation framework, grounded in Q methodology, to measure value-structure alignment. Under our protocol, humans and models sort an identical 140-item moral statement set into a shared nine-column forced distribution; for LLMs, we elicit strict rankings and deterministically map them to Q-sort buckets. Using a human reference sample ($N=35$), we establish a stable three-factor reference geometry specific to this instrument and sample. We evaluate 12 LLMs across four model families via 240 replicated Q-sorts at two temperature settings, quantifying structural alignment via Procrustes similarity ($φ$) and RSA-based Spearman correlation ($ρ$). Our results reveal significant cross-family heterogeneity, model-specific sensitivity to generation stochasticity and localized misalignment, which demonstrate that favorable global scores can obscure underlying regional distortions. While rank- and bucket-based analyses remain highly consistent, prompt phrasing introduces notable variance. Ultimately, assessing value-structure alignment provides a crucial structural complement to traditional itemwise moral benchmarks.
title: Beyond Value Benchmarks: Measuring Value-Structure Alignment in Large Language Models via Symmetric Q-Sorts
comment: 32 pages, 8 figures, 16 tables; accepted to ACL 2026 Main Conference
title_translated: 超越价值基准：通过对称Q排序测量大语言模型中的价值结构对齐
summary_translated: 大语言模型（LLMs）在需要复杂道德推理和价值权衡的场景中日益得到应用。然而，现有的评估通常依赖于项目级别的行为指标，无法捕捉模型作为整体系统如何结构化地优先处理相互竞争的价值。为此，我们提出了一种基于Q方法的对称人-LLM评估框架，用于测量价值结构对齐。在我们的协议中，人类和模型将相同的140项道德陈述集强制分配到九列共享分布中；对于LLM，我们获取严格的排序并确定性地映射到Q排序桶。使用一个包含35人的参考样本，我们建立了该工具和样本特有的稳定三因素参考几何结构。我们通过240次重复的Q排序，在两个温度设置下评估了四个模型家族中的12个LLM，利用Procrustes相似性（φ）和基于RSA的Spearman相关性（ρ）量化结构对齐程度。结果揭示了显著的跨家族异质性、模型对生成随机性的特定敏感性以及局部错位现象，表明良好的全局得分可能掩盖底层的区域扭曲。尽管基于排名和桶的分析高度一致，但提示语措辞引入了显著差异。最终，评估价值结构对齐为传统的逐项道德基准提供了关键的结构性补充。

summary: As mental health concerns continue to rise globally, social media has emerged as a vital space where individuals seek emotional support. While prior work on personalized emotional support has leveraged seekers' emotional states, personas, and situational context, these approaches primarily capture the seeker's current state, overlooking the formative experiences that shape present concerns. In this work, we propose MindTailor, a framework that generates personalized emotional support responses by constructing a case formulation from the seeker's post history and iteratively refining responses through collaborative critique among counselor agents grounded in distinct counseling strategies.
