Our findings expose a critical vulnerability in current agent memory designs and provide formal tools for measuring cross-temporal bias propagation.
title: Memory Contagion: Cross-Temporal Propagation of Evaluator Bias via Agent Memory
title_translated: 记忆传染：通过代理记忆实现评价者偏见的跨时间传播
summary_translated: 大型语言模型（LLM）代理越来越多地依赖记忆系统以维持长期一致性。近期研究显示，代理记忆在持续整合过程中会退化。然而，现有研究假设记忆源自无偏经验。本文首次识别并形式化了一种新现象：记忆传染——评价者偏见通过代理记忆实现跨时间传播。我们证明，当代理由有偏评价者训练或引导时，其经验变得有偏；当这些轨迹被存储并整合进记忆时，偏见会传播给未来从同一记忆库中检索的代理，即使整合过程完美（即理想情况）。在两种偏见类型（长度偏好、权威偏见）和四个实验阶段中，我们展示了：（1）即使在完美整合条件下（oracle 条件），记忆传染依然发生，证明有偏输入足以引发传染；（2）整合对不同偏见类型产生相反影响——稳健削弱长度偏见，初步放大权威偏见（单次运行估计），表明偏见类型存在依赖性交互；（3）未观察到安全阈值：在污染率低至 p=0.2 时即可检测到偏见传播。我们的发现揭示了当前代理记忆设计中的关键脆弱性，并提供了测量跨时间偏见传播的形式化工具。

summary: Computer-use agents (CUAs) now act on a user's behalf across personal applications such as email, calendars, and to-do lists. This cross-application access is useful, but it also creates a privacy risk that has been largely overlooked: when an agent works in one context, it can pull in information from another that is inappropriate in that context. Hence, we introduce AgentCIBench, an evaluation harness that turns this risk into executable, deterministically scored scenarios. We target three common failure modes in CUAs: visual co-location, where the agent pulls in prohibited items that sit next to the task target in the UI; task-ambiguity overshare, where the agent dumps dense personal state in response to an under-specified prompt; and recipient misalignment, where the agent sends content to an addressee for whom it is inappropriate. We evaluate 15 frontier agents and find a surprisingly high failure rate: 11 of 15 leak on more than 50% of scenarios, with an average leakage of 67.9%, and the same failures persist when agents act end-to-end in the environment to complete the task. We release AgentCIBench to encourage the development of safer computer-use agents and position contextual disclosure testing as a pre-deployment safety check.
title: Capable but Careless: Do Computer-Use Agents Follow Contextual Integrity?
title_translated: 能干但粗心：计算机使用代理是否遵循上下文完整性？
summary_translated: 计算机使用代理（CUAs）如今在个人应用如邮件、日历和待办事项列表中代表用户行动。这种跨应用访问虽具实用性，但也带来了被严重忽视的隐私风险：当代理在一个上下文中工作时，可能拉取另一个上下文中不适当的信息。因此，我们提出 AgentCIBench，一个评估框架，将此风险转化为可执行、确定性评分的场景。我们聚焦 CUAs 的三种常见失效模式：视觉共位，即代理拉取UI中位于任务目标旁的禁止项；任务模糊过度共享，即代理在响应描述不足的提示时输出密集的个人状态；接收方错配，即代理向不合适的收件人发送内容。我们评估了15个前沿代理，发现令人惊讶的高失败率：11/15 在超过50%的场景中泄露信息，平均泄露率达67.9%，且在代理在环境中端到端完成任务时，相同失败仍持续存在。我们发布 AgentCIBench，以促进更安全的计算机使用代理的发展，并将上下文披露测试定位为部署前的安全检查。

summary: Hybrid reasoning models can answer directly or spend extra tokens on extended thinking. A practical router should choose between these modes for each query, so easy problems avoid unnecessary reasoning and hard problems receive enough budget to finish the answer. Existing routers move in this direction, but they typically require labeled training data or fix thinking budgets up front, ignoring answer-level evidence from the model itself. We introduce DART, a training-free routing framework that samples two cheap no-think drafts, accepts direct answering when the drafts agree, and predicts a thinking budget from draft entropy when they disagree. Across the main comparisons, DART preserves or improves always-thinking accuracy in most settings while reducing thinking-token use. On math reasoning, accuracy improves by up to $+$9.0 points on Olympiad-level problems while thinking tokens drop 15-69%. On code reasoning under execution-based equivalence, accuracy improves by up to +22.5 points while thinking tokens drop 51-63%. The Stage~1 signal extends across model scales (0.6B-32B), model families, and API-only hosted settings, with no labeled data and no gradient updates required.
title: DART: Draft-Agreement Routing for Training-Free Adaptive Thinking Budgets in Hybrid Reasoning Models
comment: 15 pages, 4 figures, 16 tables. Code: this https URL
title_translated: DART：用于混合推理模型中无训练自适应思考预算的草稿-一致路由
summary_translated: 混合推理模型可以直接回答问题，或花费额外的标记进行扩展思考。一个实用的路由器应为每个查询在这些模式之间做出选择，使简单问题避免不必要的推理，而复杂问题获得足够的预算以完成答案。现有的路由器虽朝此方向发展，但通常需要标注的训练数据或预先固定思考预算，忽略了模型自身产生的答案级证据。我们提出DART，一种无需训练的路由框架，通过采样两个低成本的无思考草稿，当草稿一致时接受直接回答，不一致时则根据草稿熵预测思考预算。在主要对比实验中，DART在大多数设置下保持或提升了始终思考的准确率，同时减少了思考标记的使用。在数学推理任务中，奥数级别问题的准确率最高提升9.0分，思考标记减少15%-69%；在基于执行等价的代码推理任务中，准确率最高提升22.5分，思考标记减少51%-63%。第一阶段信号在模型规模（0.6B-32B）、模型族和仅API托管环境下均有效，且无需标注数据或梯度更新。

summary: Humans tend to speak louder and clearer in challenging environments, such as noisy conditions or when addressing hearingimpaired listeners, which is called Lombard effect. To simulate this behavior in speech synthesis systems, we introduce a flow-matching based text-to-speech (TTS) model trained with vocal effort and articulation pseudo-labels. The proposed model achieves continuous and disentangled control of vocal effort and articulation, while also enabling word-level emphasis for clarifying specific segments of an utterance. Experimental results show that these control mechanisms effectively improve clarityrelated acoustic features. Furthermore, speech-in-noise experiments demonstrate that our model successfully simulates the intelligibility gains of human clear speech in noisy conditions.
title: Synthesizing the Lombard Effect: Multi-Level Control of Speech Clarity and Vocal Effort in TTS
title_translated: 模拟 Lombard 效应：文本到语音中多层级的语音清晰度与发声努力控制
summary_translated: 人类在困难环境中（如嘈杂环境或面对听力障碍者时）倾向于说话更响亮、更清晰，这种现象称为Lombard效应。为了在语音合成系统中模拟这一行为，我们引入了一种基于流匹配的文本到语音（TTS）模型，该模型使用发声努力和发音清晰度的伪标签进行训练。所提出的模型实现了发声努力与发音清晰度的连续且解耦控制，同时支持词级强调以突出话语中的特定片段。实验结果表明，这些控制机制有效提升了与清晰度相关的声学特征。此外，噪声环境下的语音实验表明，我们的模型成功模拟了人类清晰语音在嘈杂条件下的可理解性提升。

summary: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly mediate how people form impressions of organisations, yet most monitoring is done in English, assuming an English query returns a representative picture. We measure how far that holds. We queried three grounded LLMs (GPT-5.4, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Perplexity Sonar Pro) about 66 brands from eleven Northern, Baltic, and Central European markets, in twelve languages across four families (Germanic, Uralic, Baltic, Slavic), generating 35,640 responses. Multilingual embeddings (BGE-M3) allow cross-language comparison without translation. Three results emerge. First, AI-constructed reputation is language-bound: mean cross-language cosine similarity is 0.825, same-family responses are more similar than cross-family (0.844 vs 0.820; d = 0.31), and sentiment varies by language (F = 268.5, eta^2 = 0.077), with Uralic and Baltic languages most positive and Germanic, including English, most critical; clustering recovers the Slavic and Baltic families (cophenetic 0.915). Second, query language shifts which brands are recommended far more than how they are described: moving from an English query to a brand's home language raises recommendation share by 0.80 for local champions but only 0.15 for global multinationals (t = -8.84, p < 0.001), with no comparable reversal in sentiment. An English-only audit therefore understates a local champion's AI visibility. Third, response stability varies more with model choice than with language (eta^2_model = 0.32 vs eta^2_language = 0.01, on a five-iteration replication over a 20-brand subset). These results indicate that English-only AI reputation monitoring leaves a measurable language blind spot, concentrated in the visibility of locally headquartered brands.
title: The Language Blind Spot: How Query Language and Brand Recognition Tier Shape AI-Constructed Brand Reputation Across Twelve European Languages
comment: 17 pages, 3 figures. Data and analysis code on Zenodo, this https URL
title_translated: 语言盲点：查询语言与品牌认知层级如何塑造十二种欧洲语言中AI构建的品牌声誉
summary_translated: 大型语言模型（LLMs）越来越多地影响人们对组织的印象形成，但目前大多数监测仍以英语为主，假设英语查询能提供代表性图景。我们评估了这一假设的可靠性。我们针对来自十一组北欧、波罗的海和中欧市场的66个品牌，在十二种语言（涵盖日耳曼语、乌拉尔语、波罗的语、斯拉夫语四大语系）中，使用三个基于事实的LLM（GPT-5.4、Gemini 3.1 Pro、Perplexity Sonar Pro）生成了35,640条响应。通过多语言嵌入（BGE-M3）实现跨语言比较而无需翻译。研究发现三点：第一，AI构建的品牌声誉具有语言依赖性：跨语言余弦相似度平均为0.825，同语系响应比跨语系更相似（0.844 vs 0.820；d = 0.31），情感随语言变化显著（F = 268.5，eta² = 0.077），其中乌拉尔语和波罗的语最积极，日耳曼语（包括英语）最批判；聚类分析恢复了斯拉夫语和波罗的语家族结构（cophenetic相关系数0.915）。第二，查询语言对推荐品牌的影响远大于描述方式：从英语查询切换到品牌母语，本地领军品牌的推荐份额提升0.80，而全球跨国企业的提升仅为0.15（t = -8.84，p < 0.001），情感无明显反转。因此，仅用英语审计会低估本地领军品牌的AI可见度。第三，响应稳定性更多受模型选择影响而非语言（eta²_model = 0.32 vs eta²_language = 0.01），在20个品牌的子集上五次重复实验中表现明显。这些结果表明，仅以英语进行AI声誉监控存在可测量的语言盲点，尤其集中在本地总部品牌的可见度上。

summary: Optical Character Recognition (OCR) for low-resource languages is often constrained by the lack of annotated training data and the complexity of script-specific rendering. Kashmiri, written primarily in the Perso-Arabic Nastaliq script, presents additional challenges due to contextual glyph shaping, dense ligatures, and orthographic variability. We introduce Koshur Pixel, the first large-scale synthetic OCR dataset for Kashmiri, comprising 613,078 image-text pairs generated from the KS-PRET-5M corpus using the SynthOCR-Gen framework. The dataset spans multiple fonts and textual granularities, ranging from individual words to full-page documents, and incorporates more than 25 augmentation strategies that emulate real-world document degradations. Koshur Pixel provides a scalable and cost-effective alternative to manual annotation, establishing a foundational resource for training OCR systems, digitizing Kashmiri textual heritage, and advancing language technologies for a severely under-resourced language.
title: Koshur Pixel: a large-scale synthetic ocr dataset for kashmiri
title_translated: Koshur Pixel：面向克什米尔语的大规模合成OCR数据集
summary_translated: 低资源语言的光学字符识别（OCR）常受限于标注训练数据的缺乏以及字体特异性渲染的复杂性。克什米尔语主要使用波斯-阿拉伯体Nastaliq书写，因上下文字形变形、密集连字和拼写变异性而面临额外挑战。我们提出了Koshur Pixel，首个大规模合成克什米尔语OCR数据集，包含613,078张图像-文本对，由KS-PRET-5M语料库通过SynthOCR-Gen框架生成。该数据集涵盖多种字体和文本粒度，从单个单词到整页文档，并集成超过25种增强策略以模拟真实文档退化情况。Koshur Pixel为手动标注提供了可扩展且低成本的替代方案，为训练OCR系统、数字化克什米尔语文化遗产以及推动严重资源匮乏语言的技术进步奠定了基础资源。

summary: Procedural memory is increasingly used to improve LLM agents on recurring workplace tasks, yet its ability to produce reusable skills remains poorly understood. We introduce AFTER, a benchmark of 382 realistic enterprise tasks spanning six professional roles and 22 procedural skills, designed to evaluate how skills transfer across tasks, roles, and model backbones. The benchmark includes controlled evaluation settings for local improvement, cross-task transfer, cross-role transfer, and cross-model generalization. Experiments show that procedural memory delivers consistent gains in industrial workflows: a single refinement round improves aggregate performance by 3.7-6.7 points, while skills evolved from diverse multi-model execution traces achieve 73.1% cross-model test accuracy, outperforming all single-model trace sources. We further find that some skills generalize broadly across tasks and models, whereas others become specialized to role-specific workflows and lose effectiveness under transfer. These results provide practical guidance for building, evaluating, and deploying procedural memory systems in production agent platforms.
title: Managing Procedural Memory in LLM Agents: Control, Adaptation, and Evaluation
title_translated: 管理LLM智能体中的程序性记忆：控制、适应与评估
summary_translated: 程序性记忆正被越来越多地用于提升LLM智能体在重复性工作场景中的表现，但其生成可复用技能的能力仍缺乏深入理解。我们提出了AFTER，一个包含382个真实企业任务的基准测试，覆盖六个职业角色和22种程序性技能，旨在评估技能在任务、角色和模型骨干之间的迁移能力。该基准包含受控评估设置，涵盖局部改进、跨任务迁移、跨角色迁移和跨模型泛化。实验表明，程序性记忆在工业工作流中带来稳定收益：单轮优化即可使整体性能提升3.7-6.7分，而源自多样化多模型执行轨迹的技能在跨模型测试中达到73.1%的准确率，优于所有单一模型轨迹来源。我们还发现，部分技能可在任务和模型间广泛泛化，而另一些则专属于特定角色的工作流程，在迁移中失去有效性。这些结果为生产级智能体平台中构建、评估和部署程序性记忆系统提供了实用指导。

summary: Multi-turn tool-using agents must coordinate long-horizon tool sequences while tracking dialogue state and policy constraints. Existing approaches often separate inference-time orchestration from parameter-level learning, leaving tool selection weakly structured and preference updates vulnerable to train--deployment prompt mismatch. For within-benchmark self-improvement, ToolGraph combines schema-derived topology, transition weights estimated from successful rollouts, and history-aware controls for write prerequisites and repeated-search loops. We then construct 161 preference pairs by locating divergence points via state-based matching and prefix-based alignment, filtered through action-correctness annotations, and train DPO under the same ToolGraph context used at inference. Across 375 tau2-bench tasks, ToolGraph raises the weighted average reward from 0.304 to 0.338 (+11.2% relative), while ToolGraph+DPO reaches 0.355 (+16.8% over the baseline), with the DPO gain concentrated in airline and retail. Fine-grained diagnostics further show that roughly half of telecom trajectories exhaust the step budget before action execution and that chosen reward positivity is the most useful checkpoint signal across our 16 evaluated DPO configurations.
title: Self-Evolution for Multi-Turn Tool-Calling Agents via Divergence-Point Preference Learning
title_translated: 通过分歧点偏好学习实现多轮工具调用智能体的自我进化
summary_translated: 多轮工具使用智能体必须在长时程工具序列中进行协调，同时跟踪对话状态和策略约束。现有方法通常将推理时的编排与参数级学习分离，导致工具选择结构松散，且偏好更新易受训练-部署提示不匹配的影响。针对基准内自我改进，ToolGraph结合了基于模式的拓扑结构、从成功回放中估计的转移权重以及对写入前提和重复搜索循环的历史感知控制。我们通过基于状态匹配和前缀对齐定位分歧点，生成161组偏好对，经由动作正确性标注过滤后，在与推理阶段相同的ToolGraph上下文中训练DPO。在375个tau2-bench任务中，ToolGraph将加权平均奖励从0.304提升至0.338（相对提升11.2%），而ToolGraph+DPO达到0.355（相对于基线提升16.8%），其中DPO增益主要集中在航空和零售领域。细粒度诊断进一步表明，约一半电信轨迹在执行动作前耗尽步数预算，且所选奖励正值是我们在16种评估的DPO配置中最有用的检查点信号。

summary: As AI systems become increasingly persistent and personalized, they make possible a class of technologies that we call cognitive digital twins (CDTs): dynamic computational representations of a specific person's cognition, updated from behavioral, contextual, or physiological data in order to model, predict, or simulate that person's cognition, or to act as that person's communicative or decision-making proxy. CDTs combine cognitive inference with longitudinal representation, simulation, and proxy action in ways that existing governance strategies for personal assistants, autonomous agents, recommender systems, and automated decision systems only partially address. This paper makes four contributions. First, we define CDTs and distinguish them from adjacent systems. Second, we introduce a 5A governance framework organized around authority, autonomy, access and control, accountability, and availability. Third, we identify CDT-specific risks, from misrepresentation and epistemic authority shifts to shadow twins, simulated participation, proxy action, and proxy-power asymmetries. Fourth, we analyze governance gaps and propose requirements for high-risk CDTs that strengthen consent, purpose limitation, validity, traceability, contestation, independent review, and model retirement. Existing frameworks primarily regulate data processing, automated decisions, or autonomous actions; CDTs also require governance at the level of cognitive representation itself, before any final decision or external action occurs. We argue that CDTs require governance not only because they can act for people, but because they can become infrastructures through which cognition is represented, simulated, classified, and operationalized.
title: Cognitive Digital Twins: Ethical Risks and Governance for AI Systems That Model the Mind
title_translated: 认知数字孪生：建模心智的AI系统所面临的伦理风险与治理挑战
summary_translated: 随着AI系统变得日益持久和个性化，催生出一类我们称之为认知数字孪生（CDTs）的技术：动态计算模型，用于表征特定个体的认知状态，通过行为、情境或生理数据持续更新，以模拟、预测该个体的认知，或作为其沟通与决策代理。CDTs将认知推断与纵向表征、仿真及代理行动相结合，而现有针对个人助手、自主代理、推荐系统和自动化决策系统的治理策略仅部分覆盖此类问题。本文提出四项贡献：第一，定义CDTs并区分其与邻近系统；第二，提出一个围绕权威、自主性、访问与控制、问责制和可用性的5A治理框架；第三，识别CDTs特有的风险，包括误表征、认识论权威转移、影子孪生、模拟参与、代理行动及代理权力不对称；第四，分析治理缺口并提出高风险CDTs的治理要求，强化同意、目的限制、有效性、可追溯性、异议权、独立审查和模型退役机制。现有框架主要监管数据处理、自动化决策或自主行为；而CDTs还需在认知表征层面进行治理，即在任何最终决策或外部行动发生之前。我们认为，CDTs需要治理不仅因为它们能代表人行动，更因为它们可能成为认知被表征、模拟、分类和操作化的基础设施。

summary: Large language models now mediate how buyers discover products and services, making the competitive structure of AI-generated recommendations a strategic concern for brands. A basic question has lacked large-scale empirical answers: in a given category, which brand does a model recommend, and how concentrated is that ownership? Across 3,750 responses spanning 50 brands, five industries, and 250 brand-free category queries on three models (GPT-5.2, Google Gemini 3 Flash, and Perplexity sonar-pro), each query repeated five times under a dice-roll stability protocol, we propose three exploratory metrics: the Category Ownership Index (COI), a brand's share of mentions within a category; the Competitive Vacuum Index (CVI), flagging categories with no single leader; and the Displacement Score (DS), quantifying asymmetric substitution between brand pairs. In this sample, recommendation concentration was moderate: the mean Gini coefficient was 0.28 (95% CI [0.16, 0.41]), below the 0.60 power-law threshold we set. Competitive vacuums were rare, appearing in 8.0% of queries, so the models named at least one sampled brand in most cases. Cross-model agreement on the top-recommended brand was 41.6%: a top position on one model did not reliably hold on another. Displacement was industry-dependent, from co-recommendation in consulting (0.4:1) to one-directional substitution up to 4.3:1, with an unweighted mean of 2.4:1 across the five industries. A BERTopic check placed only 4.2% of discovered topic clusters outside the original categories. Within the scope studied, these results sit in tension with a strong winner-takes-all narrative around AI recommendation, and the three metrics offer a candidate, reproducible procedure for competitive-intelligence analysis that future work can validate.
title: Who Owns the AI Recommendation? A Multi-Industry Empirical Map of Brand Category Ownership Across Large Language Models
comment: 21 pages, 4 figures, 7 tables. Under review at Journal of Marketing Analytics (Palgrave Macmillan). Data and analysis code on Zenodo, this https URL
title_translated: 谁拥有AI推荐？基于大语言模型的品牌类别所有权跨行业实证图谱
summary_translated: 大语言模型如今主导着买家发现产品和服务的方式，使得AI生成推荐的竞争格局成为品牌的战略关切。一个基本问题长期缺乏大规模实证解答：在某一品类中，模型推荐哪个品牌，其所有权集中程度如何？通过对三个模型（GPT-5.2、Google Gemini 3 Flash、Perplexity sonar-pro）在50个品牌、五个行业、250个无品牌品类查询上的3,750次响应（每查询重复五次，采用掷骰稳定性协议）进行分析，我们提出三个探索性指标：品类所有权指数（COI），衡量品牌在品类中的提及份额；竞争真空指数（CVI），标识无单一领导者的品类；位移得分（DS），量化品牌对之间的非对称替代关系。在样本中，推荐集中度中等：平均吉尼系数为0.28（95%置信区间[0.16, 0.41]），低于我们设定的0.60幂律阈值。竞争真空罕见，出现在8.0%的查询中，因此多数情况下模型会提及至少一个采样品牌。跨模型对首位推荐品牌的共识率为41.6%：一个模型的首位推荐并不保证在另一模型中也保持首位。位移具有行业依赖性，从咨询行业的共推荐（0.4:1）到单向替代高达4.3:1，五行业平均未加权比为2.4:1。BERTopic检查显示仅有4.2%的发现主题聚类超出原始品类范围。在研究范围内，这些结果与AI推荐中“赢家通吃”的强叙事相矛盾，三个指标提供了一种可复制的竞品情报分析程序，未来工作可加以验证。

summary: Recently, end-to-end OCR models, exemplified by DeepSeek OCR, have once again thrust OCR into the spotlight. A widely held view is that employing a large language model (LLM) as the decoder allows the model to leverage the prior distribution of language, leading to improved OCR performance. However, the downside is equally evident: as the output sequence lengthens, the accumulated KV cache drives up memory consumption and progressively slows down generation. This stands in stark contrast to humans, who exhibit no such decline in efficiency during long-horizon copying tasks. In this technical report, we propose Unlimited OCR, a model designed to emulate human parsing working memory. Taking DeepSeek OCR as the baseline, we replace all attention layers in the decoder with our proposed Reference Sliding Window Attention (R-SWA), which reduces attention computation costs while maintaining a constant KV cache throughout the entire decoding process. By combining the high compression rate of DeepSeek OCR's encoder with our constant KV cache design, Unlimited OCR can transcribe dozens of pages of documents in a single forward pass under a standard maximum length of 32K. More importantly, R-SWA is a general-purpose parsing attention mechanism - beyond OCR, it is equally applicable to tasks such as ASR, translation, etc. Codes and model weights are publicly available at http://github.com/baidu/Unlimited-OCR.
title: Unlimited OCR Works
title_translated: 无限OCR：突破长度限制的OCR模型设计
summary_translated: 近期，以DeepSeek OCR为代表的端到端OCR模型再次将OCR技术推上风口。普遍观点认为，使用大语言模型（LLM）作为解码器可利用语言先验分布，从而提升OCR性能。然而其弊端同样明显：随着输出序列变长，累积的KV缓存导致内存消耗激增，生成速度逐步下降。这与人类在长时程抄写任务中表现出的稳定效率形成鲜明对比。在本技术报告中，我们提出Unlimited OCR，一种旨在模拟人类解析工作记忆的模型。以DeepSeek OCR为基础，我们将解码器中所有注意力层替换为提出的参考滑动窗口注意力（R-SWA），在保持恒定KV缓存的同时降低注意力计算成本。结合DeepSeek OCR编码器的高压缩率与我们恒定KV缓存的设计，Unlimited OCR可在标准最大长度32K下，单次前向传播完成数十页文档的转录。更重要的是，R-SWA是一种通用解析注意力机制——不仅适用于OCR，还可应用于ASR、翻译等任务。代码与模型权重已公开于http://github.com/baidu/Unlimited-OCR。

summary: Most tools for measuring political positions, manifesto coding, expert surveys, text-scaling models, were built and validated on Western party systems, and outside that setting they work poorly, and often not at all. This paper is an attempt at a method for those settings. It treats a large language model not as a measurement device but as a single, fallible rater in a panel, roughly the way an expert survey treats one expert: the value comes from pooling many judges rather than trusting any one of them. I describe the panel, an applicability rule that keeps a score of zero distinct from a blank, and a lens system that separates what an actor says from what it does. I report three results. First, holding a definition-free round fixed, adding written axis definitions moves scores by a mean of 1.8 points on a 21-point scale and tightens agreement between raters (mean absolute gap 2.81 to 2.50; r 0.81 to 0.89); they make two independent raters agree more closely, which an arbitrary steer would not. Second, across nine models from eight laboratories in two countries, Krippendorff's alpha is 0.86 on both an interval and an ordinal metric, and it stayed put as the panel grew from five raters to nine. That is reliability, the reproducibility of a reading, and not validity, its correctness. Third, where the panel does disagree, the disagreement is informative: the sharpest split, a full-scale divergence on an actor's stance toward its state's foundational order, points to a referent problem, and a blind triple-coding puts about two-thirds of it down to interpretation rather than error. I try to be plain about what the method can't do, including the human validation it still lacks, and I release the instrument and data in full. The worked example is the Middle East and North Africa, but I'd expect the method to carry to any region these standard tools leave out.
title: The Model as One Rater Among Several: Measuring Political Positions in Data-Sparse Regions with a Language-Model Panel
comment: 21 pages, 1 figure, 7 tables. Dataset, rubric, and interactive tools: this https URL
title_translated: 模型作为多个评分者之一：基于语言模型面板测量数据稀疏区域的政治立场
summary_translated: 大多数测量政治立场的工具，如宣言编码、专家调查、文本标度模型，均是在西方政党体系中构建并验证的，而在其他语境下表现不佳，甚至完全失效。本文尝试提出一种适用于这些场景的方法。该方法将大型语言模型视为面板中的一个单一、有缺陷的评分者，类似于专家调查中对待一位专家的方式：价值来自多位评判者的聚合，而非信任任意单一评判者。我描述了该面板机制、一个将零分与空白区分开的应用规则，以及一个将行为与行动分离的透镜系统。报告三项结果：第一，在固定无定义轮次的前提下，加入书面轴定义使得分平均变化1.8分（21分量表），并收紧评分者间的一致性（平均绝对差距从2.81降至2.50；相关系数从0.81升至0.89）；这种调整使两位独立评分者更趋一致，而任意引导无法实现此效果。第二，在来自两个国家八个实验室的九个模型中，Krippendorff's alpha在区间和序数度量上均为0.86，且随面板从五名评分者扩展至九名仍保持稳定。这是可靠性（读数可重复性），而非有效性（正确性）。第三，当面板出现分歧时，分歧本身具有信息量：最剧烈的分歧——关于某行为体对其国家根本秩序立场的全尺度偏离——指向参照问题，盲三重编码显示约三分之二的分歧源于解释而非错误。我坦诚说明该方法的局限性，包括仍缺乏人类验证，并完整发布工具与数据。案例研究聚焦中东与北非地区，但预计该方法可推广至标准工具忽略的任何区域。

summary: Group-based Reinforcement Learning (RL) has significantly enhanced Large Language Models (LLMs) in agentic scenarios. To achieve finer-grained policy updates, recent agentic RL frameworks have shifted from trajectory-level to step-level training. However, long-horizon agentic RL suffers from severe reward sparsity and delay, as feedback is often deferred for dozens of interaction steps. While existing step-level frameworks refine training granularity, their credit assignment remains coarse-grained and still treats agent exploration as isolated, linear trajectories. This oversimplified perspective ignores the inherent graph structure of state transitions, leading to high-variance state-value estimation and myopic, localized credit assignment. To overcome these critical bottlenecks, we propose Group-Graph Policy Optimization (G2PO), a novel group-based RL algorithm tailored for multi-turn agentic tasks. G2PO explicitly transforms linear interaction trajectories into a global state-transition graph. By aggregating identical observations across different trajectories, we introduce group-aggregation state-value estimation that reduces sampling variance and trajectory-dependent bias. Furthermore, we redefine agent actions as transitions between state nodes and propose an edge-centric advantage estimation strategy. By globally standardizing Temporal Difference (TD) errors across the entire graph, G2PO explicitly identifies and prioritizes critical transitions that drive absolute task progress. Extensive experiments on representative long-horizon benchmarks-WebShop, ALFWorld, and AppWorld-demonstrate that G2PO substantially outperforms state-of-the-art prompt-based and RL baselines, achieving remarkable success rate improvements of up to 22.2% over GRPO.
title: Group-Graph Policy Optimization for Long-Horizon Agentic Reinforcement Learning
title_translated: 面向长时程智能体强化学习的分组-图策略优化
summary_translated: 基于分组的强化学习（RL）已显著提升了大语言模型（LLMs）在智能体场景中的表现。为实现更细粒度的策略更新，近期的智能体强化学习框架已从轨迹级训练转向步骤级训练。然而，长时程智能体强化学习面临严重的奖励稀疏性和延迟问题，因为反馈通常会延迟数十次交互步骤才出现。尽管现有步骤级框架细化了训练粒度，其信用分配仍较为粗略，并仍将智能体探索视为孤立的线性轨迹。这种过于简化的视角忽略了状态转移的内在图结构，导致状态价值估计方差高，且信用分配具有短视性和局部性。为克服这些关键瓶颈，我们提出分组-图策略优化（G2PO），一种专为多轮智能体任务设计的新型分组强化学习算法。G2PO显式地将线性交互轨迹转换为全局状态转移图。通过聚合不同轨迹中的相同观测，我们引入分组聚合的状态价值估计方法，以降低采样方差和轨迹依赖偏差。此外，我们将智能体动作重新定义为状态节点之间的转移，并提出以边为中心的优势估计策略。通过在整个图上全局标准化时间差分（TD）误差，G2PO显式识别并优先处理推动任务绝对进展的关键转移。在代表性长时程基准测试WebShop、ALFWorld和AppWorld上的大量实验表明，G2PO显著优于最先进的提示基和强化学习基线，在成功率方面最高提升达22.2%。

summary: In this paper, we propose using random walks on graphs as a verifiable sandbox to study different parallel sampling strategies in masked diffusion models (MDMs). We train an MDM on random walk samples from a fixed graph. The graph or the transition kernel is never shown to the model explicitly and plays the role of latent structure in the sequences, albeit one that is controllable and can be used for quantitative evaluation. Thus, this framework enjoys a Sudoku-like validity check: verifying that an output is a valid walk and estimating the Markov kernel from the walks to measure distribution fidelity.   Using simple graphs, we theoretically prove that parallel unmasking via widely used scores like lowest entropy is not uniformly better than a random parallel sampler; the performance critically depends on the structure of the underlying graph. We develop a new bisection sampler for random walks, which takes logarithmic steps in the sequence length and is provably exact under perfect training. Experiments on various graph walk tasks show that different parallel samplers are better for different graphs even in practice. Our initial experiments on a pretrained OpenWebText MDM show that the bisection-style samplers improve speed-quality tradeoffs even for language generation. Together, these results position graph random walks as a mechanistic benchmark for diagnosing and designing parallel samplers for masked diffusion models.
title: Understanding Parallel Samplers in Masked Diffusion via Random Walks on Graphs
title_translated: 通过图上的随机游走理解掩码扩散中的并行采样器
summary_translated: 本文提出使用图上的随机游走作为可验证的实验环境，研究掩码扩散模型（MDMs）中不同的并行采样策略。我们在固定图的随机游走样本上训练一个MDM，图或转移核从未显式提供给模型，而是作为序列中的潜在结构，且该结构可控，可用于定量评估。因此，该框架具备类似数独的验证机制：验证输出是否为有效游走，并从游走中估计马尔可夫核以衡量分布保真度。利用简单图结构，我们理论上证明了广泛使用的最低熵评分进行并行解掩码并非始终优于随机并行采样器；性能高度依赖于底层图的结构。我们开发了一种新的二分采样器，其步数与序列长度呈对数关系，在完美训练下可保证精确性。在多种图游走任务上的实验表明，不同并行采样器在实际中对不同图表现更优。我们在预训练的OpenWebText MDM上的初步实验显示，二分风格的采样器在语言生成中也改善了速度与质量的权衡。这些结果共同确立了图随机游走作为诊断和设计掩码扩散模型并行采样器的机制化基准。

summary: Long-horizon agents depend on context management: systems compress, summarize, and evict old tokens so tasks can continue beyond finite windows. That is safe only when dropped information is no longer needed or has been internalized. Plans are the stress case: they are written early, used for many steps, and first to be evicted. We introduce replay pairing, a diagnostic that runs the same trajectory with and without the plan in history and measures hidden-state cosine distance. On Llama-3.1-70B, plan signal spikes to 0.453 one step after the plan, then falls 4.1x in a single action-observation step; HotpotQA falls 12.4x. This is evidence that standard LLM agents do not carry plans forward as persistent state, and instead depend on the plan remaining in context. A layer-L32 probe detects this decay as a diagnostic, not as proof that it reads plan content itself. Reasoning models add a measurement confound: their `<think>` traces re-derive plan content, so standard stripping leaves plan evidence in the stripped condition. We name this the reasoning-trace confound and fix it with strict stripping, which removes prior `<think>` blocks from the stripped run only. It recovers +163% of the step+1 signal in-sample and +153% held out, while not meaningfully changing non-reasoning Llama (+4.8%). On DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-70B, a Llama-trained probe transfers at AUROC 0.748 (p=6e-4), while R1-specific probes reach 1.000, suggesting R1 encodes plan signal in a different hidden-state direction. Finally, a compression stress test shows the practical cost: naive plan eviction cuts ALFWorld success by 34.7pp, while probe-gated re-surfacing does not recover it. The contribution is a measurement and stress-test framework showing that agent-critical information can be context-resident rather than persistent. Context management is load bearing, but plan protection alone is not enough.
title: Plans Don't Persist: Why Context Management Is Load Bearing for LLM Agents
title_translated: 计划不会持续：为何上下文管理对LLM智能体至关重要
summary_translated: 长时程智能体依赖于上下文管理：系统通过压缩、总结和淘汰旧标记来使任务能在有限窗口之外继续。这仅在被丢弃的信息不再需要或已被内化时才是安全的。计划是极端情况：它们早期写入，用于多个步骤，且最先被淘汰。我们引入回放配对（replay pairing）诊断法，即在同一轨迹中分别运行有无计划的历史版本，并测量隐藏状态的余弦距离。在Llama-3.1-70B上，计划信号在计划后一步飙升至0.453，随后在一个动作-观察步骤内下降4.1倍；HotpotQA下降12.4倍。这表明标准LLM智能体并未将计划作为持久状态传递，而是依赖计划仍存在于上下文中。第L32层探测器检测到这一衰减，但并非证明其自身读取了计划内容。推理模型引入测量混淆：其`<think>`痕迹会重新推导计划内容，因此标准剥离操作会使计划证据残留在剥离条件下。我们称此为推理痕迹混淆，并通过严格剥离解决——仅在剥离运行中移除先前的`<think>`块。这在样本内恢复了+163%的第+1步信号，在外部样本中恢复+153%，而对非推理型Llama的影响微乎其微（仅+4.8%）。在DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-70B上，基于Llama的探测器迁移AUROC达0.748（p=6e-4），而R1专用探测器达到1.000，表明R1以不同的隐藏状态方向编码计划信号。最后，压缩压力测试显示实际代价：朴素计划淘汰使ALFWorld成功率下降34.7个百分点，而探测器门控的重新浮现无法恢复。本研究贡献了一个测量与压力测试框架，表明智能体关键信息可能仅驻留于上下文中而非持久存在。上下文管理至关重要，但仅保护计划并不足够。

summary: Automatic dysarthria severity assessment is limited by the scarcity of labeled pathological speech data. To address this, we propose Cross-lingual Retrieval-Augmented Classification (CRAC), which leverages speech from a different language via an align-retrieve-fuse pipeline. Supervised contrastive learning first shapes a severity-focused embedding space, then a vector database is built from the opposite-language corpus. During both training and inference, the classifier retrieves top-k references from the aligned space and fuses them with the input via cross-attention. Evaluated on Korean post-stroke and Italian ALS dysarthria datasets under a speaker-independent three-class protocol, CRAC achieves balanced accuracies of 87.3% on Korean and 86.7% on Italian, improving over monolingual baselines by 8.4 and 20.0 percentage points, respectively.
title: Cross-lingual Retrieval-Augmented Classification for Dysarthria Severity Assessment
title_translated: 跨语言检索增强分类用于构音障碍严重程度评估
summary_translated: 自动构音障碍严重程度评估受限于标注病理语音数据的稀缺性。为解决此问题，我们提出跨语言检索增强分类（CRAC），通过异语言语音数据，采用对齐-检索-融合的流程。首先，监督对比学习构建聚焦严重程度的嵌入空间；随后，从对语言语料库中建立向量数据库。在训练和推理过程中，分类器从对齐空间中检索前k个参考项，并通过交叉注意力将其与输入融合。在独立说话人三分类协议下，对韩语卒中后和意大利肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）构音障碍数据集的评估显示，CRAC在韩语上达到87.3%的平衡准确率，在意大利语上达到86.7%，分别比单语言基线提升8.4和20.0个百分点。

summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed in consumer, medical, financial, and enterprise applications. This broad deployment expands the safety surface: risks can arise from multimodal question answering, assistant responses, and cross-modal composition, while moderation policies may vary across products, regions, and deployment stages. Most existing guardrails either rely on fixed taxonomies or target only a narrow set of interaction settings, which limits their adaptability when safety rules change at deployment time. We present \textbf{SingGuard}, a policy-adaptive multimodal guardrail model family for safety assessment in multimodal conversations. SingGuard treats the active policy as a runtime input: given natural-language rules, it checks the target content against the active policy rule by rule and predicts both the safety label and the triggered rule. To balance efficiency and interpretability, SingGuard supports fast, hybrid, and slow inference regimes along a fast-to-slow reasoning spectrum, ranging from direct safety judgments to policy-grounded deliberation. We further optimize this behavior with fast--slow decoupled reinforcement learning. We also introduce \textbf{SingGuard-Bench}, a multimodal guardrail benchmark with 56{,}340 examples spanning 80+ fine-grained risk types across multimodal QA, adversarial attack, and dynamic-rule evaluation settings, including cross-modal joint-risk cases where each modality is harmless in isolation but their composition implies unsafe intent. Across six benchmark families (35 datasets), SingGuard achieves state-of-the-art average F1 in every family. Dynamic-rule evaluation further shows improved policy-following accuracy from 0.6465 to 0.7415 under runtime policy shifts. Our code is available at https://github.com/inclusionAI/Sing-Guard.
title: SingGuard: A Policy-Adaptive Multimodal LLM Guardrail with Dynamic Reasoning
title_translated: SingGuard：一种具有动态推理能力的政策自适应多模态LLM护栏
summary_translated: 视觉-语言模型（VLMs）正日益应用于消费、医疗、金融和企业领域。这种广泛应用扩大了安全风险面：风险可能来自多模态问答、助手响应以及跨模态组合，而审核政策可能因产品、地区和部署阶段而异。大多数现有护栏依赖固定分类体系或仅针对特定交互场景，当部署时安全规则变化时适应性受限。我们提出	extbf{SingGuard}，一种用于多模态对话安全评估的政策自适应多模态护栏模型系列。SingGuard将当前政策作为运行时输入：给定自然语言规则，它逐条检查目标内容，并预测安全标签及触发的规则。为平衡效率与可解释性，SingGuard支持从快速直接判断到基于政策的审慎推理的全谱系推理模式，涵盖快速、混合和慢速三种推理范式。我们进一步通过快-慢解耦强化学习优化该行为。我们还引入	extbf{SingGuard-Bench}，一个包含56,340个示例的多模态护栏基准，覆盖80多种细粒度风险类型，涵盖多模态问答、对抗攻击和动态规则评估场景，包括跨模态联合风险案例——各模态单独无害，但组合后暗示不安全意图。在六个基准族（35个数据集）中，SingGuard在每个族均达到最先进平均F1。动态规则评估进一步显示，在运行时政策变更下，政策遵循准确率从0.6465提升至0.7415。代码已开源：https://github.com/inclusionAI/Sing-Guard。

summary: Coordinated foreign influence operations pose a growing threat to online platforms, but detecting state-linked troll activity and tracking its evolution remain challenging. This paper presents an explainable machine learning framework for theory-guided detection and longitudinal analysis of suspected trolling within Korean online news comment sections. Our hierarchical model classifies comments along three dimensions central to influence campaigns: foreign origin, moral-emotional framing, and target country. To support explainability, it also extracts brief span-level textual evidence that provides human-interpretable rationales. We apply the approach to 112M South Korean news comments authored by 4M users over nearly 20 years, identifying 23,998 accounts exhibiting behavior consistent with coordinated manipulation. Analyzing these accounts, we find that they predominantly rely on morally condemning rhetoric rather than direct promotion of foreign-aligned narratives; this rhetoric receives significantly higher user engagement. Among the highest-engagement comments, the moral condemnation most frequently targets domestic political figures (e.g., presidents or party leaders) on both the left and the right, potentially amplifying polarization. Our framework supports transparent platform governance through explainable, evidence-based moderation. These observed rhetorical and engagement patterns can inform how platforms and observatories prioritize defenses and intervene before harmful narrative-target combinations achieve widespread reach.
title: Cross-National Information Attacks: A Two-Decade Analysis of Troll Behavior in Korea
comment: Accepted at the 35th USENIX Security Symposium (USENIX Security '26)
title_translated: 跨国信息攻击：对韩国网络舆论中机器人行为的二十年分析
summary_translated: 有组织的外国影响力操作对在线平台构成日益严重的威胁，但检测与追踪国家关联的机器人活动及其演变仍具挑战性。本文提出一种可解释的机器学习框架，用于理论指导下的检测与纵向分析韩国在线新闻评论区中的可疑 trolling 行为。我们的分层模型从三个影响行动的核心维度对评论进行分类：外国来源、道德情感框架和目标国家。为支持可解释性，该框架还提取简短的文本片段证据，提供人类可理解的推理依据。我们将该方法应用于近20年间由400万用户撰写的1.12亿条韩国新闻评论，识别出23,998个表现出协调操纵行为的账号。分析表明，这些账号主要依赖道德谴责式言辞而非直接推广外国立场叙事；此类言辞获得显著更高的用户互动。在高互动评论中，道德谴责最常针对国内政治人物（如总统或政党领袖），无论左右派，可能加剧社会极化。我们的框架通过可解释、基于证据的治理支持透明平台管理。观察到的修辞与互动模式可帮助平台和监测机构优先部署防御措施，并在有害叙事-目标组合广泛传播前及时干预。

summary: With the rapid spread of retrieval-augmented generation and semantic search, choosing the right embedding and retrieval configuration is increasingly hard. Large retrieval benchmarks are comprehensive but too heavy to rerun during development, and there is little infrastructure for comparing production settings--dimensionality reduction, quantization, reranking--across many models under identical conditions. We present HAKARI-Bench, a lightweight benchmark that reconstructs existing retrieval suites into small datasets (Nano-sets): 35 benchmarks and 551 tasks across 43 languages in a unified format, enabling same-condition, model-agnostic comparison of five retrieval families (BM25, dense, sparse, late interaction, rerankers) and their efficiency variants. Across 55 models, its overall ranking reproduces the official MTEB retrieval v2, MMTEB v2 retrieval, and English BEIR (full) at Spearman >0.97. HAKARI-Bench does not replace full evaluation; it enables rapid model selection, regression detection, and reading the quality-efficiency Pareto frontier. Code, data, and leaderboard are released under the MIT license.
title: HAKARI-Bench: A Lightweight Benchmark for Comparing Retrieval Architectures and Efficiency Settings under Unified Conditions
comment: 48 pages. Code and leaderboard: this https URL this https URL
title_translated: HAKARI-Bench：在统一条件下比较检索架构与效率设置的轻量级基准
summary_translated: 随着检索增强生成和语义搜索的快速普及，选择合适的嵌入与检索配置变得愈发困难。大型检索基准虽全面但过于沉重，难以在开发过程中重复运行，且缺乏在相同条件下跨多种模型比较生产环境设置（如降维、量化、重排序）的基础设施。我们提出 HAKARI-Bench，一个轻量级基准，将现有检索套件重构为小型数据集（Nano-sets）：涵盖43种语言的35个基准和551个任务，采用统一格式，支持在相同条件下对五类检索方法（BM25、密集型、稀疏型、后期交互、重排序器）及其效率变体进行模型无关的比较。在55个模型上，其总体排名与官方 MTEB retrieval v2、MMTEB v2 retrieval 和 English BEIR（完整版）的相关性超过 Spearman >0.97。HAKARI-Bench 并不替代完整评估，而是支持快速模型选择、回归检测以及阅读质量-效率帕累托前沿。代码、数据和排行榜已以 MIT 许可证发布。

summary: Before letting an agent operate over real context, can you prove it used the right evidence? GroundEval turns that question into a deterministic test of what the agent searched, fetched, cited, and was permitted to access. In one case study, two frontier LLM judges scored a plausible agent response above 0.85. But the trace told a different story: the agent had never retrieved the artifact its answer depended on, yielding a GroundEval score of 0.000.   We introduce GroundEval, a judge-free framework for evaluating agents against grounded, time-bounded, and access-controlled evidence. GroundEval uses a domain configuration to generate questions, lets the agent choose how to answer, and then scores both the final answer and the recorded trajectory that produced it. The benchmark targets three failures that LLM-as-judge evaluation struggles to detect: whether an agent checked before claiming absence, reasoned only from evidence available to the actor at the relevant time, and used the correct causal mechanism rather than a plausible one. These correspond to three tracks: Silence, Perspective, and Counterfactual. GroundEval exposes when plausible answers rest on invalid evidence paths, and produces structured per-question diagnostics that pair tool activity with the agent's turn-level narration, making each score inspectable rather than merely reported. What our case studies turned up is that this gap isn't some rare corner case. It's exactly the blind spot that final-answer and judge-based scoring were never built to catch.
title: GroundEval: A Deterministic Replacement for LLM-as-Judge in Stateful Agent Evaluation
title_translated: GroundEval：面向状态智能体评估的 LLM-as-Judge 的确定性替代方案
summary_translated: 在让智能体处理真实上下文之前，能否证明它使用了正确的证据？GroundEval 将这一问题转化为对智能体所搜索、获取、引用及被允许访问内容的确定性测试。在一个案例研究中，两个前沿的 LLM 判官对一个看似合理的智能体回答评分高于 0.85，但其执行轨迹揭示了不同情况：该智能体从未检索到其答案所依赖的原始资料，导致 GroundEval 得分为 0.000。我们引入 GroundEval，一种无需判官的框架，用于评估基于有据、时间受限和访问受控证据的智能体。GroundEval 使用领域配置生成问题，允许智能体自主选择回答方式，然后同时评分最终答案和生成该答案的记录轨迹。该基准旨在检测 LLM-as-judge 评估难以察觉的三种失败情形：智能体是否在声称缺失前进行了检查、是否仅基于当时可用的证据进行推理，以及是否使用了正确的因果机制而非看似合理的机制。这对应三个评估路径：沉默、视角与反事实。GroundEval 揭示了看似合理的回答实际上依赖于无效证据路径的情况，并生成结构化的逐题诊断，将工具活动与智能体每轮叙述配对，使每个得分可审查而非仅报告。我们的案例研究表明，这种差距并非罕见边缘情况，而是最终答案与判官评分从未设计捕捉的盲点。

summary: Training large language models to reason efficiently is a critical challenge. While integrating length-penalizing rewards into Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) aims to reduce verbosity, it frequently triggers reward collapse, severely degrading reasoning capabilities. Through a systematic evaluation of various reward configurations, we identify the root mechanism: GRPO's group normalization creates divergent advantages when incorrect answers receive continuous length penalties. Consequently, methods penalizing the length of incorrect answers are structurally prone to collapse under sustained optimization. Furthermore, restricting penalties exclusively to correct answers avoids this primary failure, but leaves the model susceptible to a stochastic collapse driven by response over-compression. To robustly prevent both failure modes, we propose ACOER (Adaptive Correct-Only Efficiency Reward). ACOER eliminates the structural penalty loop by isolating brevity bonuses to correct completions and prevents stochastic compression via dynamic budget normalization and control-loop penalty adjustments. Evaluated across diverse mathematical reasoning benchmarks, ACOER improves overall accuracy compared to the base model while reducing token generation by over 60%, establishing a fundamentally stable approach for efficiency-aware optimization.
title: Beyond Penalizing Mistakes: Stabilizing Efficiency Training in Large Reasoning Models via Adaptive Correct-Only Rewards
comment: 13 pages, 3 figures, 7 tables. Code: this https URL
title_translated: 超越惩罚错误：通过自适应仅正确奖励稳定大推理模型的效率训练
summary_translated: 训练大型语言模型实现高效推理是一项关键挑战。尽管在组相对策略优化（GRPO）中引入长度惩罚奖励旨在减少冗余，但常引发奖励崩溃，严重损害推理能力。通过对多种奖励配置的系统评估，我们识别出根本机制：GRPO 的组归一化在错误答案持续接受长度惩罚时会产生分歧优势。因此，对错误答案长度进行惩罚的方法在持续优化下具有结构性崩溃倾向。此外，仅对正确答案施加惩罚虽可避免此主要失败，但会使模型易受由响应过度压缩引发的随机性崩溃影响。为稳健防止这两种失效模式，我们提出 ACOER（自适应仅正确效率奖励）。ACOER 通过将简洁性奖励仅限于正确完成情况来消除结构性惩罚循环，并通过动态预算归一化和控制回路惩罚调整防止随机压缩。在多个数学推理基准上的评估显示，ACOER 在相比基础模型提升整体准确率的同时，将 token 生成量减少超过 60%，确立了一种根本稳定的效率感知优化方法。

summary: As LLM-powered scams proliferate, black-box forensics for conversational LLM agents offers a path to accountability for systems hidden behind anonymous endpoints. Identifying the base model behind a chatbot endpoint (attribution), without model parameter access or knowledge of the hidden system prompt, would let investigators trace AI-enabled scams back to the providers whose models power them. Detecting when two endpoints run the exact same system prompt (fingerprinting), even one novel and unseen, would link individual scams into criminal networks and expose silent API changes. We conduct an empirical investigation of both capabilities. Our attribution classifiers identify the base model behind an agent with 98% accuracy from a few turns of non-adversarial conversation. Attribution of system prompts, while possible, requires retraining on a large amount of data for each prompt; system prompts in the wild are unbounded and ever-changing, making this approach costly. To tackle this more open-ended setting, our cross-encoder fingerprinting method achieves an AUC of 0.768 and an F1 of 0.703 on entirely unseen system prompts, and aggregating 50 interaction conversations from each target agent boosts AUC to 0.943. Conversational agents with unseen system prompts can thus be fingerprinted with robust accuracy from a few turns of ordinary conversation.
title: Black-Box Forensics for Conversational LLM Agents
title_translated: 对话式 LLM 智能体的黑箱取证
summary_translated: 随着基于 LLM 的诈骗行为泛滥，对话式 LLM 智能体的黑箱取证为隐藏在匿名端点后的系统提供了问责路径。在无法访问模型参数或了解隐藏系统提示的情况下，识别聊天机器人端点背后的基线模型（归属识别），可使调查人员追溯 AI 驱动的诈骗回至其模型提供方。检测两个端点是否运行完全相同的系统提示（指纹识别），即使该提示是全新且未见过的，也可将个别诈骗串联成犯罪网络并暴露静默的 API 变更。我们对这两种能力进行了实证研究。我们的归属分类器仅需几轮非对抗性对话即可以 98% 的准确率识别出智能体背后的基线模型。系统提示的归属虽可行，但需为每个提示重新训练大量数据；而现实中的系统提示数量无限且不断变化，使该方法成本高昂。为应对这一更具开放性的场景，我们的交叉编码指纹识别方法在完全未见过的系统提示上达到 AUC 0.768 和 F1 0.703，若聚合每个目标智能体的 50 次交互对话，则 AUC 提升至 0.943。因此，即使面对未知系统提示的对话智能体，也能通过少量普通对话实现高精度指纹识别。

summary: We introduce VISTA Architect, a database-oriented AI architecture for integrating large language models (LLMs) with longitudinal electronic health records (EHRs). At ingestion, it transforms complex clinical documentation into a persistent, provenance-linked knowledge graph, eliminating repeated reprocessing of raw records at query time. The architecture has two layers: a source-faithful MEDS Graph preserving granular EHR structure with full provenance, and a clinically abstracted Timeline Object Architecture (TOA) that uses graph-guided LLM extraction to synthesize a concise timeline of deduplicated, temporally coherent clinical events. This addresses key limitations of direct long-context prompting and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), which often miss temporal relationships and incur high cost and latency from repeated raw-text processing. By precomputing clinical synthesis once, downstream queries access an organized patient state and traverse to source documentation only when detailed verification is needed.   We demonstrate the system in multidisciplinary thoracic oncology tumor boards at Stanford Medicine, where precise reconstruction of patient histories is critical. Across 1,180 patients, VISTA Architect achieved 96.4% accuracy (mean 9.75/10) on 15 tumor board-salient variables (17,700 evaluations; 95% CI 96.1-96.7%), surpassing a matched BM25 RAG baseline and recent benchmarks for LLM-based clinical extraction. An agentic interface reduced preparation for a 30-patient held-out cohort to about 2.2 minutes without sacrificing accuracy. While configured here for thoracic oncology, the modular design adapts to other specialties through customizable event definitions, episode structures, and agentic tools; validation beyond thoracic oncology remains future work.
title: VISTA Architect: A graph database-oriented health AI system demonstrated in multidisciplinary tumor boards
comment: 22 pages, 4 figures, 6 tables; includes Supplementary Information. Code: this https URL (tag v0.1.0-preprint, commit 8837d44)
title_translated: VISTA Architect：一种面向图数据库的健康AI系统，应用于多学科肿瘤讨论会
summary_translated: 我们介绍了VISTA Architect，这是一种将大语言模型（LLMs）与纵向电子健康记录（EHRs）集成的数据库导向型AI架构。在数据摄入阶段，该系统将复杂的临床文档转化为持久且具有溯源关联的知识图谱，避免了查询时对原始记录的重复处理。该架构包含两层：保留细粒度EHR结构和完整溯源信息的源忠实MEDS图，以及利用图引导LLM提取合成简洁、去重且时间连贯的临床事件时间线的临床抽象时间线对象架构（TOA）。该设计解决了直接长上下文提示和检索增强生成（RAG）方法在时间关系捕捉上的不足，并降低了因重复文本处理带来的高成本和延迟。通过一次性预计算临床合成，下游查询可访问组织化的患者状态，仅在需要详细验证时才追溯到原始文档。我们在斯坦福医学院的多学科胸部肿瘤讨论会上展示了该系统，精确重建患者病史至关重要。在1,180名患者中，VISTA Architect在15个肿瘤讨论会相关变量上达到了96.4%的准确率（平均9.75/10），优于匹配的BM25 RAG基线和近期基于LLM的临床提取基准。一个智能体接口将30名患者的预留队列准备时间减少至约2.2分钟，且未牺牲准确性。尽管本研究配置针对胸部肿瘤学，但其模块化设计可通过自定义事件定义、病程结构和智能体工具适应其他专科；在胸部肿瘤学以外的验证仍是未来工作。

summary: Learning to read cuneiform tablets is an extremely demanding task; consequently, of the roughly half million excavated tablets, only a small fraction has been analysed by Assyriologists. Computer vision offers a promising avenue for decipherment but requires large, densely annotated datasets. To address this limitation, the largest annotated cuneiform sign dataset to date is used, and a Deformable Detection Transformer (DETR)-based object detection model is evaluated under two class granularities of 173 and 106 classes. The proposed system integrates automatic tablet-side extraction, heuristic line grouping, and n-gram-based textual similarity evaluation to bridge visual sign detection and textual structure, and achieves consistent improvements of up to 28-37% over prior work on COCO-style detection metrics. At inference, the method is applied to 87,668 tablet fragments from the Electronic Babylonian Library (eBL) corpus, producing nearly 2.9 million sign detections. Although the approach operates without linguistic priors and remains sensitive to tablet damage and layout variability, it provides a scalable and interpretable foundation for corpus-wide cuneiform analysis and supports future integration with multimodal and linguistic modelling frameworks.
title: Automated sign detection across the Electronic Babylonian Library: A large-scale dataset and end-to-end cuneiform OCR pipeline
title_translated: 跨《巴比伦图书馆》的自动符号检测：大规模数据集与端到端楔形文字OCR流程
summary_translated: 学习阅读楔形文字泥板是一项极其艰巨的任务；因此，在约50万块发掘出的泥板中，仅有极小部分被亚述学家分析过。计算机视觉为破译提供了有前景的途径，但需要大规模、密集标注的数据集。为解决这一限制，本文使用迄今为止最大的标注楔形文字符号数据集，并评估基于可变形检测Transformer（DETR）的对象检测模型在173类和106类两种类别粒度下的表现。所提出的系统整合了自动泥板级提取、启发式行分组以及基于n-gram的文本相似性评估，以连接视觉符号检测与文本结构，相较于先前工作在COCO风格检测指标上实现了高达28-37%的一致性提升。推理阶段，该方法应用于《电子巴比伦图书馆》（eBL）语料库中的87,668块泥板碎片，生成近290万次符号检测。尽管该方法不依赖语言先验知识，且对泥板损伤和布局变化敏感，但仍为全语料库楔形文字分析提供了可扩展且可解释的基础，并支持未来与多模态及语言建模框架的集成。

summary: Few-shot prompt learning is an effective strategy for adapting CLIP to downstream tasks, but class-only prompt optimization can overfit base-class supervision and weaken transfer to unseen classes. We propose Concept-Constrained Prompt Learning (CCPL), a lightweight regularization framework that anchors learnable class prompts to frozen concept-level text prototypes without updating CLIP encoders. CCPL learns a set of shared context tokens, instantiates class prompts by appending class names, and constructs frozen concept prototypes from a class-level concept bank. During training, a text-space cosine consistency objective aligns learnable class-prompt embeddings with frozen concept prototypes; concept dropout provides additional regularization against over-reliance on fixed concept lists. At inference, CCPL optionally fuses class-prompt logits with concept-prototype logits using a controllable ensemble weight alpha. Our default configuration uses text-space concept regularization lambda = 0.5, concept dropout p = 0.3 and weak concept-guided fusion (alpha = 0.1), with no KL-based prediction consistency term. Experiments under identical automatically-generated fallback splits show that CCPL improves the base-to-new harmonic mean on DTD (+0.6) and EuroSAT (+2.9) compared with CoOp, while remaining near-neutral on OxfordPets (-0.1). Ablations indicate that text-space concept regularization is consistently beneficial, while the best concept-guided inference strength is dataset- and protocol-sensitive. These results suggest concept constraints are most effective when concept prototypes align naturally with dataset semantics, and identify fine-grained categories as a current boundary condition. The code is released at: https://github.com/richael-sang/concept-constrained-prompt-learning.
title: Concept-Constrained Prompt Learning for Few-Shot CLIP Adaptation
title_translated: 概念约束提示学习用于少样本CLIP适配
summary_translated: 少样本提示学习是将CLIP适配到下游任务的有效策略，但仅对类别进行提示优化可能导致对基础类别监督的过拟合，并削弱对未见类别的迁移能力。我们提出概念约束提示学习（CCPL），一种轻量级正则化框架，将可学习的类别提示锚定于冻结的概念级文本原型，而不更新CLIP编码器。CCPL学习一组共享上下文标记，通过附加类别名称实例化类别提示，并从类别级概念库构建冻结的概念原型。训练过程中，文本空间余弦一致性目标将可学习的类别提示嵌入与冻结的概念原型对齐；概念丢弃则提供额外正则化，防止对固定概念列表的过度依赖。推理时，CCPL可选择性地使用可控集成权重alpha，融合类别提示logits与概念原型logits。默认配置采用文本空间概念正则化λ=0.5，概念丢弃p=0.3，以及弱概念引导融合（alpha=0.1），且不使用基于KL的预测一致性项。在相同自动生成的回退划分下实验表明，与CoOp相比，CCPL在DTD上提升了基类到新类的调和均值0.6，在EuroSAT上提升了2.9，而在OxfordPets上保持接近中性（-0.1）。消融实验表明，文本空间概念正则化始终有益，而最佳概念引导推理强度则依赖于数据集和协议。结果表明，当概念原型与数据集语义自然对齐时，概念约束最为有效，并指出细粒度类别是当前的边界条件。代码已公开：https://github.com/richael-sang/concept-constrained-prompt-learning。

summary: Computer use agents (CUAs) have advanced rapidly in desktop automation, and a growing number of users deploy CUAs such as OpenClaw on Mac Mini for always-on automation. However, existing benchmarks, including those for macOS, evaluate agents without framework augmentation and rely on binary evaluation. As a result, they fail to capture both the framework capabilities leveraged by modern CUAs and the partial progress on long-horizon, multi-application tasks. We present MacAgentBench, a comprehensive macOS agent benchmark comprising 676 tasks across 25 applications, with nearly 60% involving both GUI and CLI interaction. The benchmark adopts deterministic rule-based evaluation and introduces fine-grained multi-checkpoint scoring with capability annotations for multi-application tasks. Experiments across three frameworks and 16 models show that the best configuration, Claude Opus 4.6 on OpenClaw, attains 73.7% Pass@1, while this advantage is primarily driven by the skill library rather than by framework design. Fine-grained metrics further reveal that models with similar Pass@1 can differ substantially in sub-goal completion. Our code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/JetAstra/MacAgentBench.
title: MacAgentBench: Benchmarking AI Agents on Real-World macOS Desktop
title_translated: MacAgentBench：面向真实世界macOS桌面的AI智能体基准测试
summary_translated: 计算机使用智能体（CUAs）在桌面自动化领域迅速发展，越来越多用户在Mac Mini上部署OpenClaw等CUAs实现持续自动化。然而，现有基准测试（包括macOS基准）在评估时未考虑框架增强，且依赖二元评价方式。因此，它们无法捕捉现代CUAs所利用的框架能力，也无法反映长期、多应用任务中的部分进展。我们提出MacAgentBench，一个全面的macOS智能体基准，涵盖25个应用中的676个任务，近60%的任务涉及GUI与CLI的交互。该基准采用确定性规则评估，并引入细粒度多检查点评分机制，对多应用任务添加能力标注。在三个框架和16个模型上的实验显示，最佳配置（Claude Opus 4.6在OpenClaw上）达到73.7% Pass@1，但这一优势主要由技能库驱动，而非框架设计本身。细粒度指标进一步揭示，具有相似Pass@1的模型在子目标完成度上可能存在显著差异。代码与数据已公开于https://github.com/JetAstra/MacAgentBench。

summary: Autoregressive visual models (AVMs) based on next-scale prediction have emerged as a prominent paradigm for image and video synthesis. However, decomposing the generation process into discrete scales with varying granularities in AVM makes semantic errors difficult to identify and correct, thereby undermining the quality of the final output. Prior efforts to enhance AVM can be categorized into training-based and training-free approaches. Although training-based efforts to enhance AVM generation quality come at substantial computational cost, existing training-free methods neglect intermediate generation states, leaving semantic errors undiagnosed and allowing them to accumulate into the final output. In this paper, we focus on training-free paradigms and propose Gazer, a framework that integrates multimodal large language model feedback into the AVM sampling loop for in-generation semantic correction. Concretely, Gazer operates via two cooperating stages: the Reflective Diagnosis stage diagnoses semantic errors from intermediate states, while the Semantic Correction stage rewinds and rectifies the generation trajectory to realign with the target prompt. Experiments on compositional image and video benchmarks demonstrate that Gazer improves semantic alignment and compositional accuracy across multiple AVMs without additional training.
title: Training-Free Semantic Correction for Autoregressive Visual Models
title_translated: 无需训练的自回归视觉模型语义校正
summary_translated: 基于下一尺度预测的自回归视觉模型（AVMs）已成为图像与视频合成的主流范式。然而，AVM将生成过程分解为不同粒度的离散尺度，使得语义错误难以识别和纠正，从而影响最终输出质量。以往提升AVM性能的努力可分为基于训练和无需训练两类。尽管基于训练的方法能显著提升生成质量，但计算成本高昂；而现有的无需训练方法忽略了中间生成状态，导致语义错误无法诊断并累积至最终输出。本文聚焦于无需训练范式，提出Gazer框架，将多模态大语言模型反馈融入AVM采样循环，实现生成过程中的语义校正。具体而言，Gazer通过两个协作阶段运行：反射诊断阶段从中间状态诊断语义错误，语义校正阶段回溯并修正生成轨迹，使其重新对齐目标提示。在组合图像与视频基准上的实验表明，Gazer在无需额外训练的情况下，提升了多个AVMs的语义对齐性和组合准确性。

summary: Decision-making in real-world settings rarely follows a fixed script. Instead, it unfolds as a dynamic reasoning process in which the appropriate course of action evolves as new context and data become available. Traditional Business Process Management systems provide rigor, determinism, and auditability, yet they generally struggle to adapt their execution at runtime. Conversely, agentic systems based on Large Language Models (LLMs) bring flexibility to decision-making, but they are inherently opaque, often unreliable, and suffer from significant scalability constraints when operating over large datasets. To combine these complementary paradigms, we introduce VADAOrchestra, a neurosymbolic framework that models complex workflows as evolving reasoning processes. The framework adopts a hybrid approach: given a user query and a collection of data sources, an LLM-based orchestrator incrementally plans and adapts the workflow. This is encoded as a logic program in a fragment of Datalog+/- where predicates correspond to tool invocations and rules represent both predefined domain dependencies and logic constructs synthesized on demand to manipulate intermediate results. All logical inference tasks are then executed by a state-of-the-art Datalog+/- symbolic engine. This approach provides a verifiable reasoning trace, supporting the auditability and reproducibility of the entire process. Furthermore, by decoupling high-level orchestration from symbolic inference, it addresses scalability concerns, enabling complex reasoning over large datasets through targeted data querying. We evaluate VADAOrchestra on real-world financial use cases, demonstrating faithfulness, scalability, and explainability compared to standard agentic architectures.
title: VADAOrchestra: Neurosymbolic Orchestration of Adaptive Reasoning Workflows
title_translated: VADAOrchestra：神经符号化自适应推理工作流编排
summary_translated: 现实世界中的决策很少遵循固定脚本，而是作为动态推理过程展开，随着新上下文和数据的出现，适当的行动路径不断演化。传统的业务流程管理系统具有严谨性、确定性和可审计性，但通常难以在运行时自适应调整执行。相反，基于大语言模型（LLMs）的智能体系统为决策提供了灵活性，但其本质上不透明、不可靠，并且在处理大规模数据集时面临显著的可扩展性限制。为结合这两种互补范式，我们提出了VADAOrchestra，一种将复杂工作流建模为演进式推理过程的神经符号框架。该框架采用混合方法：给定用户查询和一组数据源，基于LLM的编排器逐步规划并适应工作流。这一过程以Datalog+/-的一个片段中的逻辑程序形式编码，其中谓词对应工具调用，规则则表示预定义的领域依赖关系以及按需合成的逻辑结构，用于操作中间结果。所有逻辑推理任务均由最先进的Datalog+/-符号引擎执行。该方法提供了可验证的推理轨迹，支持整个过程的可审计性和可复现性。此外，通过将高层编排与符号推理解耦，有效解决了可扩展性问题，使复杂推理能够在大规模数据集上通过针对性的数据查询实现。我们在真实世界的金融应用场景中评估了VADAOrchestra，结果表明其在忠实性、可扩展性和可解释性方面优于标准的智能体架构。

summary: Large language model (LLM)-based approaches for automated code compliance (ACC) of building regulations are prone to generating incorrect and hallucinated computer-processable rules. This paper introduces P4IR, a two-stage framework that uses supervised fine-tuning (SFT) to instill domain knowledge in an LLM, followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to improve the accuracy of the generated intermediate representations in the form of high-level code skeletons. The framework achieved reductions of up to 23.8% and 38.6% in tree edit distance and token-level Levenshtein distance respectively, relative to the SFT baselines. Comparative analysis demonstrates that this approach in a zero-shot setting outperforms leading LLMs in both code structure and semantics, specifically Claude Opus and Sonnet 4.5, GPT-5.2, Qwen-3-Max, and GLM-4.7, evaluated via few-shot prompting. Additionally, the GRPO stage produced a small yet statistically significant reduction in false positives. By combining SFT with GRPO to optimize directly for domain-specific objectives, this approach offers a path toward more accurate and reliable LLM-based ACC systems.
title: Reinforcement learning to improve large language model-based automated code compliance systems
title_translated: 利用强化学习改进基于大语言模型的自动化代码合规系统
summary_translated: 基于大语言模型（LLM）的建筑规范自动化代码合规（ACC）方法容易生成错误且虚构的可计算规则。本文提出P4IR，一种两阶段框架：首先通过监督微调（SFT）向LLM注入领域知识，随后使用组相对策略优化（GRPO）提升生成的中间表示（即高层代码骨架）的准确性。与SFT基线相比，该框架在树编辑距离和词级Levenshtein距离上分别降低了23.8%和38.6%。对比分析表明，在零样本设置下，该方法在代码结构和语义上均优于领先的LLM（包括Claude Opus和Sonnet 4.5、GPT-5.2、Qwen-3-Max、GLM-4.7），评估方式为少样本提示。此外，GRPO阶段还带来了小但统计显著的假阳性减少。通过结合SFT与GRPO以直接优化特定领域的目标，该方法为构建更准确、可靠的基于LLM的ACC系统提供了一条可行路径。

summary: LLM agents increasingly operate in large tool ecosystems, where real-world tasks require discovering relevant tools, inferring implicit sub-goals, and adapting to dynamic environments over long horizons. However, existing benchmarks rarely evaluate planning under retrieval-limited tool visibility. To address this gap, we introduce PlanBench-XL, an interactive benchmark of 327 retail tasks over 1,665 tools that tests whether agents can iteratively retrieve usable tools, invoke them to uncover intermediate evidence for subsequent calls toward the final goal. PlanBench-XL further features an optional blocking mechanism that simulates real-world unpredictability through missing, failing, or distracting tool functions, forcing agents to detect disrupted paths and adapt at runtime. Experiments on ten leading LLMs show that massive-tool planning remains challenging: while GPT-5.4 achieves 51.90% accuracy in block-free settings, it collapses to 11.36% under the most severe blocking condition. Further analysis shows that agents are especially vulnerable when failures lack explicit error signals or when recovery requires longer alternative tool-use paths. These results establish PlanBench-XL as a testbed for diagnosing agentic planning failures and highlight the need for robust adaptive planning in long-horizon tasks with large, imperfect tool environments.
title: PlanBench-XL: Evaluating Long-Horizon Planning of LLM Tool-Use Agents in Large-Scale Tool Ecosystems
title_translated: PlanBench-XL：评估大尺度工具生态系统中LLM工具使用智能体的长程规划能力
summary_translated: LLM智能体越来越多地在大型工具生态系统中运行，真实任务需要发现相关工具、推断隐含子目标，并在长周期内适应动态环境。然而，现有基准很少评估在检索受限工具可见性下的规划能力。为填补这一空白，我们引入PlanBench-XL，一个包含327个零售任务和1,665个工具的交互式基准测试，用于检验智能体是否能够迭代检索可用工具，调用它们以揭示后续步骤所需的中间证据，最终达成目标。PlanBench-XL还包含一个可选的阻塞机制，通过缺失、失败或干扰性的工具功能模拟现实世界的不可预测性，迫使智能体在运行时检测中断路径并进行适应。对十种领先LLM的实验表明，大规模工具规划仍具挑战性：尽管GPT-5.4在无阻塞环境下达到51.90%的准确率，但在最严重的阻塞条件下骤降至11.36%。进一步分析显示，当故障缺乏明确错误信号，或恢复需要更长的替代工具使用路径时，智能体尤为脆弱。这些结果确立了PlanBench-XL作为诊断智能体规划失败的试验平台，并强调在大型、不完美的工具环境中进行鲁棒自适应规划的必要性。

summary: Successful conversations require speakers to align on the meaning of concepts, a challenging but crucial task for human-robot interaction. Understanding the process of establishing such alignment is hindered by competing interpretations of the term and isolated, unidirectional investigations of its design space. This paper argues for a design-centric understanding of conceptual alignment as a bidirectional and co-constructive process. We introduce a taxonomy that characterizes conceptual alignment dialogues along what triggers its initiation and what level(s) of conceptual understanding it concerns. We further present a dialogue act schema as an operational tool that captures the interactional moves through which alignment is achieved. Together, these contributions provide a structured foundation for analyzing, comparing, and designing conceptual alignment in human-robot interaction.
title: A Taxonomy of Conceptual Alignment in Human-Robot Dialogue
comment: 8 pages, 2 figures. To be presented at RO-MAN 2026
title_translated: 人机对话中概念对齐的分类体系
summary_translated: 成功的对话要求说话者在概念含义上达成一致，这对人机交互而言是一项具有挑战性但至关重要的任务。理解建立这种对齐的过程受到术语解释冲突以及对其设计空间孤立、单向研究的阻碍。本文主张将概念对齐理解为一种双向且共同建构的过程。我们提出一个分类体系，从触发对齐启动的因素以及其所涉及的概念理解层次两个维度来刻画概念对齐对话。此外，我们还提出一种对话行为模式作为操作工具，捕捉实现对齐的互动行为。这两项贡献共同为分析、比较和设计人机交互中的概念对齐提供了结构化基础。

summary: Standard autoregressive Transformer decoders can often exhibit substantial forgetting under sequential fine-tuning on shifting curriculum distributions. This technical report evaluates SamatNext v0.2-B, an experimental 356M-parameter hybrid sequence decoder that alternates Differential-Attention-style layers with DeltaNet-inspired simplified linear-state mixer layers using RMS normalization and output scale calibration. We study the model under a controlled staged Python code curriculum and compare it with a parameter-matched Transformer baseline. In this setting, SamatNext v0.2-B achieves a 100.0% pass rate on the controlled Stage 5 holdout while retaining 98.8% of adjacent Stage 3 semantic behavior and reaching 12.0% on the Stage 2E early syntax holdout. The strongest Transformer baseline reaches 97.6% on Stage 5 but retains only 6.0% of Stage 3 behavior. Both architectures remain weak on long-horizon early-stage retention, so the result should be interpreted as evidence of an altered retention/plasticity tradeoff in this controlled setting, not as a general solution to catastrophic forgetting. Code, model specifications, evaluation scripts, and result tables are provided for independent verification.
title: SamatNext v0.2-B: An Exploratory Study of RMS-Normalized Hybrid Decoders for Curriculum Retention in Small Code Models
comment: 12 pages, 3 tables. Technical report. Code and reproducibility artifacts: this https URL
title_translated: SamatNext v0.2-B：小规模代码模型课程保留中RMS归一化混合解码器的探索性研究
summary_translated: 标准的自回归Transformer解码器在面对随课程分布变化的序列微调时，常常表现出显著遗忘现象。本技术报告评估了SamatNext v0.2-B，一种实验性的356M参数混合序列解码器，其交替使用类差分注意力层与受DeltaNet启发的简化线性状态混合层，采用RMS归一化和输出缩放校准。我们在受控的分阶段Python代码课程设置下研究该模型，并与参数匹配的Transformer基线进行比较。在此设定下，SamatNext v0.2-B在受控的第5阶段测试集中实现了100.0%的通过率，同时保留了相邻第3阶段98.8%的语义行为，并在第2E早期语法测试集中达到12.0%的表现。最强的Transformer基线在第5阶段达到97.6%，但仅保留了第3阶段6.0%的行为。两种架构在长周期早期阶段保留能力仍然较弱，因此该结果应被解读为在受控环境下保留/可塑性权衡发生变化的证据，而非对灾难性遗忘的一般性解决方案。代码、模型规格、评估脚本和结果表格均已提供，供独立验证。

summary: This paper introduces $π$-RAG, a novel architecture for oblivious retrieval that decouples Large Language Models (LLMs) from sensitive data storage without sacrificing semantic understanding. Traditional Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architectures expose raw vector embeddings to potential inversion attacks and nondeterministic retrieval failures. To address this, we utilize the digits of $π$ as a source of transcendental entropy, creating an immutable indirection layer between the LLM and private records. The value $π$ provides immutability, is uneditable and math governs it. The architecture also introduces a Semantic Quantization Layer. This layer projects user inputs onto a pre-computed manifold of Canonical Intent Centroids. RAG performs vector cosine similarity but here it maps the centroids to deterministic offsets via cryptographic salt. The resulting $π$-key is a pointer to standardized payload from the actual datastore. By replacing direct access to the datastore via LLM with this transcendental layer, $π$-RAG mathematically guarantees that the inference remains oblivious to the data. This architecture unifies deterministic randomness, auditability, and differential privacy, demonstrating high efficacy for high-compliance sectors such as finance and healthcare.
title: $π$-RAG: Oblivious Retrieval via Semantic Quantization and Transcendental Addressing for Large Language Models
title_translated: $π$-RAG：基于语义量化与超越性寻址的大语言模型无感知检索
summary_translated: 本文提出$π$-RAG，一种新型的无感知检索架构，能够在不牺牲语义理解能力的前提下，将大语言模型（LLMs）与敏感数据存储解耦。传统检索增强生成（RAG）架构会暴露原始向量嵌入，面临逆向攻击和非确定性检索失败的风险。为此，我们利用圆周率$π$的数字作为超越性熵源，构建了LLM与私有记录之间的不可变间接层。$π$具有不可篡改性且由数学规律决定。该架构还引入了语义量化层，将用户输入投影到预先计算的规范意图中心流形上。RAG执行向量余弦相似度计算，但通过加密盐值将中心点映射为确定性偏移量，生成的$π$-键指向实际数据存储中的标准化负载。通过用这种超越性层替代LLM对数据存储的直接访问，$π$-RAG在数学上保证了推理过程对数据的无感知性。该架构统一了确定性随机性、可审计性和差分隐私，在金融、医疗等高合规领域展现出显著有效性。

summary: There are many reasons one may want to edit a model's chain of thought (CoT) -- e.g., to prefill it with reasoning from a stronger model or to remove steps that may yield unsafe outputs. The success of these interventions plausibly depends on a model's inability to notice them, as the model may alter its behavior if it suspects tampering. In this work, we study whether recent reasoning models are able to detect such interventions on their CoTs under a variety of conditions: both during reasoning and after it, and when prefilled both with their own CoTs and with those of other models. Broadly, we find that (i) models exhibit only very modest detection accuracy; (ii) models struggle to identify *how* their CoT was modified; and (iii) models are about as good at detecting changes to their own CoTs as to those of other models.
title: Can Reasoning Models Detect Changes to their Chains of Thought?
title_translated: 推理模型能否检测其思维链的变化？
summary_translated: 人们可能希望编辑模型的思维链（CoT），例如用更强模型的推理预填充，或移除可能导致不安全输出的步骤。这些干预的成功与否可能取决于模型是否察觉到修改——若模型怀疑被篡改，其行为可能发生改变。本文研究近期推理模型在多种条件下检测其CoT被干预的能力：包括推理过程中及之后，以及使用自身或其它模型的CoT进行预填充的情况。总体发现：（i）模型的检测准确率极低；（ii）模型难以识别其CoT被如何修改；（iii）模型检测自身CoT变化的能力与检测其他模型CoT变化的能力相当。

summary: We present Nous, a novel agent memory architecture grounded in the principle that knowledge is prediction, not storage. Rather than persisting facts as database records, vector embeddings, or knowledge-graph triples, Nous maintains a predictive world model: a collection of categorical probability distributions, called dimensions, one per entity-attribute pair observed in conversation. Each incoming observation is scored by its information-theoretic surprise S = -log2 P(obs | D), and the distribution is updated via a closed-form Bayesian posterior. The primary stored artifact is the delta, a record of the shift from prior to posterior belief, rather than the fact itself. Forgetting emerges naturally as entropy decay toward the uniform distribution, and identity resolution is handled through mutual information between entity dimension sets. Evaluated on the LoCoMo long-term conversational memory benchmark across ten conversations (1,540 questions) using GPT-4o-mini as backbone, Nous achieves F1 of 63.50 (single-hop), 55.32 (multi-hop), 58.57 (temporal), and 62.50 (open-domain). Against A-MEM's self-reported GPT-4o-mini numbers, Nous shows substantial gains in three of four categories, though we note that independent citations of A-MEM's results disagree with each other on category assignment, a reproducibility issue we discuss openly rather than resolve unilaterally. We additionally compare against BeliefMem, a concurrently developed system built on the same core premise of belief-based rather than deterministic memory; on the same benchmark and backbone, Nous's self-reported numbers exceed BeliefMem's self-reported numbers on all four categories, though we flag several uncontrolled differences between the two evaluation pipelines that prevent this from being a fully controlled comparison. Nous requires no external vector database or graph engine.
title: Nous: A Predictive World Model for Long-Term Agent Memory
comment: 9 pages, 1 figure, 4 tables. Preprint; ablations, LongMemEval evaluation, and a controlled comparison against concurrent work (BeliefMem) planned for a future revision
title_translated: Nous：面向长期智能体记忆的预测性世界模型
summary_translated: 我们提出Nous，一种基于“知识即预测而非存储”原则的新型智能体记忆架构。不同于将事实以数据库记录、向量嵌入或知识图三元组形式持久化，Nous维护一个预测性世界模型：即针对对话中观察到的每个实体-属性对，保存一组类别概率分布（称为维度）。每次新观测均根据信息论中的意外度S = -log2 P(观测 | D)进行评分，并通过闭式贝叶斯后验更新分布。主要存储的是“增量”——从先验信念到后验信念的转变记录，而非事实本身。遗忘自然表现为熵衰减至均匀分布，身份识别则通过实体维度集间的互信息处理。在LoCoMo长期对话记忆基准测试中，使用GPT-4o-mini作为骨干网络，Nous在十次对话（共1,540个问题）上取得F1分数：单跳63.50、多跳55.32、时间相关62.50、开放域58.57。相较于A-MEM自报的GPT-4o-mini结果，Nous在四项中的三项实现显著提升，尽管我们注意到A-MEM结果的独立引用存在分类不一致的问题，属于可复现性争议，我们公开讨论而非单方面解决。此外，与同期开发的BeliefMem系统（同样基于信念而非确定性记忆）对比，在相同基准和骨干下，Nous自报数据在所有四项中均优于BeliefMem，但我们指出两者评估流程存在若干未控制差异，无法构成完全受控比较。Nous无需外部向量数据库或图引擎。

summary: We introduce CFAgentBench, a reproducible, self-hostable environment and benchmark for autonomous construction-finance agents: a CFO/controller-class agent operating across the real software stack a US construction finance team runs - ERP, project management, email, documents, pay applications, payroll, certified payroll, lien waivers, and bank/treasury portals. It contains 1,014 machine-gradeable task specifications across 8 domains and 77 families, every family grounded in a real source; a self-validated subset of 40 tasks (54 with a project-management extension) is compiled into oracle-validated executable evaluators, the runnable suite reported here. Following WebArena, the benchmark runs on an executable environment rather than static traces: 35 mock applications (31 reconciled to one company book, plus 4 PM platforms) over 9 archetypes, each implementing a uniform self-hostable app contract, so every task is graded by functional correctness - a state diff plus forbidden-side-effect checks plus required-output regexes - with an LLM judge used only for reply quality, never as reward. A distinguishing principle is a money-movement guard: 278 instances embed a payment, payroll, e-signature, or e-filing step where the correct behavior is to stop and stage for human approval, and executing even the correct transaction fails the task. The public split (n=711) is sized for a 95% Wilson half-width of +/-4.1%; a private, contamination-protected split (n=303) is reserved for remote scoring. In a first three-model open-weight sweep (k=5), the strongest agent reaches pass^1 = 0.67 but only pass^5 = 0.38 - losing 43% of its successes when required to repeat them under temperature-0 decoding. The within-model pass^1 to pass^5 collapse and sharp per-domain heterogeneity are clear evidence that single-attempt accuracy overstates deployable construction-finance competence.
title: CFAgentBench: A Reproducible Environment and Benchmark for Autonomous Construction-Finance Agents
comment: 28 pages, 2 figures, 13 tables. Benchmark, environment spec, and app contract released. First open-weight three-model sweep (k=5) on a 40-task oracle-validated executable suite; frontier-model leaderboard committed in the roadmap
title_translated: CFAgentBench：自主建筑金融智能体的可复现环境与基准测试
summary_translated: 我们介绍CFAgentBench，一个可复现、可自托管的环境与基准测试平台，用于评估自主建筑金融智能体——一类运行于美国建筑财务团队真实软件栈（包括ERP、项目管理、邮件、文档、付款申请、工资发放、认证工资单、留置权豁免、银行/资金门户）的CFO/控制器级代理。该平台包含跨8个领域、77个任务家族的1,014条机器可评估的任务规范，每个家族均源自真实场景；其中40个任务（含54个带项目管理扩展的任务）经自验证后编译为Oracle验证的可执行评估器，形成本次报告的可运行套件。遵循WebArena范式，该基准在可执行环境中运行而非静态轨迹：涵盖9种原型的35个模拟应用（31个与一家公司账簿对齐，另4个为PM平台），每项任务均依据统一的自托管应用合约实现，任务评分基于功能正确性——状态差分检查、禁止副作用检测及所需输出正则匹配——仅使用LLM裁判评估回复质量，而非作为奖励信号。一个关键设计是资金流动保护机制：278个实例包含支付、工资发放、电子签名或电子申报步骤，正确行为应停止并等待人工审批，即使执行正确交易也会导致任务失败。公开划分（n=711）满足95%置信区间半宽±4.1%；私有划分（n=303）用于远程评分并防止污染。在首次三模型开源权重扫描（k=5）中，最强代理达到pass^1 = 0.67，但pass^5 = 0.38——在要求重复执行时成功率下降43%。模型内pass^1到pass^5的急剧下降及各领域间显著异质性，明确表明单次尝试准确率严重夸大了部署可用的建筑金融智能体能力。

summary: Full-duplex spoken dialogue models, such as Moshi, enable natural, low-latency voice conversations. However, they remain limited to the audio modality, lacking the facial expressions that are integral to human communication. We present Moshi-Face, the first full-duplex dialogue model that jointly processes the user's audio and facial input while simultaneously generating speech and facial motion. We first construct a vector-quantized variational autoencoder (VQ-VAE) as a face codec that encodes 3D head meshes extracted from facial videos into compact discrete tokens, referred to as face tokens, and conversely reconstructs 3D meshes from these tokens. We then extend Moshi with a Face Transformer module that generates face tokens non-autoregressively, enabling Moshi-Face to produce synchronized audio and face tokens in real time. Experiments show that Moshi-Face achieves audiovisual alignment at low latency while preserving the dialogue quality of the original audio-only model.
title: Integrating Facial Generation into Full-Duplex Spoken Dialogue Systems
title_translated: 将面部生成集成到全双工语音对话系统中
summary_translated: 全双工语音对话模型（如Moshi）能够实现自然、低延迟的语音交互。然而，它们仍局限于音频模态，缺乏人类交流中不可或缺的面部表情。我们提出Moshi-Face，首个能同时处理用户音频与面部输入，并同步生成语音与面部运动的全双工对话模型。首先，我们构建了一个向量量化变分自编码器（VQ-VAE）作为面部编解码器，将从面部视频提取的3D头部网格编码为紧凑的离散标记（称为面部标记），并可反向重建3D网格。随后，我们在Moshi基础上扩展出Face Transformer模块，非自回归地生成面部标记，使Moshi-Face能够实时生成同步的音视频标记。实验表明，Moshi-Face在低延迟下实现了良好的视听同步，同时保持了原音频模型的对话质量。

summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) struggle as query-relevant objects become smaller. To address this, recent training-free approaches dynamically retrieve and zoom into local image regions. However, we show that indiscriminately applying retrieval ignores a critical vulnerability: the resolution-context trade-off. Patch-based zooming recovers details for small targets, but can split large objects and destroy global spatial context; attention-based retrieval better preserves large objects, but remains less reliable on tiny details; and global perception is often fastest when retrieval is unnecessary. Motivated by these failure modes, we introduce ViRGo (Visual Retrieval or Global Perception), a lightweight framework that formulates visual retrieval as an adaptive routing problem. ViRGo estimates object scale from the VLM's intrinsic localization heads during the initial forward pass and combines it with semantic token confidence to select between global perception, patch-based retrieval, and attention-based retrieval with minimal additional computation. Experiments across multiple VQA benchmarks and object-size groups show that ViRGo improves the accuracy-efficiency trade-off: it matches patch retrieval on small details, leverages attention-based retrieval for larger objects, and reduces inference time by routing to the global baseline when zooming is unnecessary.
title: Look Before You Zoom: Adaptive Routing for the Resolution-Context Trade-off in Visual RAG
title_translated: 先看后缩：面向视觉RAG中分辨率-上下文权衡的自适应路由
summary_translated: 视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在查询相关目标变小时表现不佳。为解决此问题，近期无需训练的方法会动态检索并放大局部图像区域。然而，我们发现盲目应用检索忽略了关键缺陷：分辨率与上下文之间的权衡。基于补丁的缩放虽能恢复小目标的细节，但可能将大对象分割并破坏全局空间上下文；基于注意力的检索更有利于保持大对象，但在微小细节上仍不可靠；而当无需缩放时，全局感知往往最快。受这些失败模式启发，我们提出ViRGo（视觉检索或全局感知），一个轻量级框架，将视觉检索建模为自适应路由问题。ViRGo在初始前向传播中通过VLM的内在定位头估计目标尺度，并结合语义标记置信度，在全局感知、基于补丁的检索和基于注意力的检索之间进行选择，仅需极少额外计算。在多个VQA基准和不同物体尺寸组上的实验表明，ViRGo改善了准确率与效率的权衡：在小细节上达到补丁检索的水平，对较大物体利用基于注意力的检索，并在无需缩放时路由至全局基线以减少推理时间。

summary: Accurate and comprehensive video captions with consistent subject references are critical for downstream understanding and generation tasks. However, few existing benchmarks can objectively and comprehensively evaluate these properties across diverse durations and scenarios, thereby hindering the advancement of video captioning models. To bridge this gap, we propose CapRiCorn-1K, a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate both video captioning quality and subject referential consistency across long temporal horizons and diverse video domains. To accommodate varied evaluation needs, our benchmark supports both audiovisual and visual-only settings. Extensive experiments on CapRiCorn-1K reveal that current models generally struggle to generate accurate and comprehensive captions while maintaining consistent subject references. Moreover, as video duration increases, both the overall caption quality and subject referential consistency decline. Notably, our evaluation metrics exhibit strong correlations with the performance of downstream understanding and generation tasks conditioned on the generated captions, further validating their effectiveness. The project is available at https://github.com/xlchen0205/CapRiCorn-1K .
title: CapRiCorn-1K: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Video Captioning and Subject Referential Consistency Across Temporal Scales
title_translated: CapRiCorn-1K：跨时间尺度的视频字幕与主体指代一致性综合基准
summary_translated: 准确且全面的视频字幕并保持一致的主体指代，对于下游理解与生成任务至关重要。然而，现有基准很少能客观且全面地评估不同持续时间和场景下的这些特性，从而阻碍了视频字幕模型的发展。为弥补这一空白，我们提出CapRiCorn-1K，一个综合性基准，旨在评估长时程跨度和多样化视频领域中的视频字幕质量及主体指代一致性。为满足不同的评估需求，该基准支持音视频和仅视觉两种设置。在CapRiCorn-1K上的大量实验表明，当前模型普遍难以在保持主体指代一致性的同时生成准确且全面的字幕。此外，随着视频时长增加，字幕整体质量和主体指代一致性均下降。值得注意的是，我们的评估指标与基于生成字幕的下游理解和生成任务性能具有强相关性，进一步验证了其有效性。项目地址：https://github.com/xlchen0205/CapRiCorn-1K。

summary: Confidence calibration in large language models (LLMs) is commonly evaluated by comparing predicted confidence with observed accuracy. However, such approaches do not model item difficulty, making it difficult to interpret discrepancies and to determine whether model confidence reflects genuine self-assessment or is merely a byproduct of the response generation process. To address this, we adopt a Rasch model-based latent ability framework and a metacognitive perspective, and propose Latent Confidence Alignment Error (LCAE) to measure the consistency between model self-assessment and the latent error probability implied by model ability and item difficulty. We further incorporate item difficulty as an external signal with a reasoning mechanism. Experiments on a medical-domain dataset with 20 models show that the proposed approach improves self-assessment quality without affecting model ability, and reveals an association between reliability and inference cost.
