title: Latent Confidence Alignment for LLM Self-Assessment
comment: 2026 IEEE 27th International Conference on Information Reuse and Integration for Data Science
title_translated: 大型语言模型自我评估中的潜在置信度对齐
summary_translated: 大型语言模型（LLMs）的置信度校准通常通过比较预测置信度与实际准确率来评估。然而，此类方法未建模题目难度，导致难以解释差异，并无法判断模型置信度是否反映真实的自我评估，还是仅是响应生成过程的副产品。为此，我们采用基于Rasch模型的潜在能力框架和元认知视角，提出潜在置信度对齐误差（LCAE），用于衡量模型自我评估与由模型能力与题目难度所隐含的潜在错误概率之间的一致性。我们进一步将题目难度作为外部信号，结合推理机制引入。在包含20个模型的医学领域数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在不损害模型能力的前提下提升了自我评估质量，并揭示了可靠性与推理成本之间的关联。

summary: This study explores gender differences in research topic choice and methodology among collaborating scholars. Previous studies have often focused on gender differences in research topics or methods at the individual level of scholars, without considering collaborating groups, lacking depth and practical guidance. This study takes Library and Information Science (LIS) as an example, employing the Top2Vec method for topic identification and the CogFT model for research method classification. It systematically analyzes 25,204 papers published between 1990 and 2022 to investigate gender differences in the convergence of research topics and method choices among collaborating scholars in this field. The results of the study found that female scholars showed lower convergence in their research methods and topic choices compared to male scholars. This study uses a relatively systematic methodology to address the difficulty of studying gender differences in academic publishing, and is expected to serve as a reference for other disciplines and research questions. This study also emphasizes the manifestation of gender differences in collaborative research and provides insights into the convergence and diversity of research topics and methods chosen by scholars.
title: Gender Differences in Research Topic and Method Convergence among Collaborating Scholars in Library and Information Science
title_translated: 图书馆与信息科学领域合作学者研究主题与方法收敛中的性别差异
summary_translated: 本研究探讨合作学者在研究主题选择与方法使用方面的性别差异。以往研究多聚焦于个体学者层面的性别差异，忽视了合作群体，缺乏深度与实践指导意义。本研究以图书馆与信息科学（LIS）为例，采用Top2Vec方法进行主题识别，CofFT模型进行研究方法分类，系统分析1990至2022年间发表的25,204篇论文，探究该领域合作学者在研究主题与方法选择上的收敛性差异。研究结果发现，女性学者在研究方法和主题选择上的收敛性低于男性学者。本研究采用相对系统的方法，解决了学术出版中性别差异研究的难点，有望为其他学科和研究问题提供参考。同时强调了合作研究中性别差异的表现，为学者在研究主题与方法选择上的收敛性与多样性提供了洞见。

summary: Scientific discovery can be formulated as an iterative search process over the space of hypotheses and experiments. Contemporary methods navigate this space using heuristics such as MCTS. These algorithms conflate the merit of a hypothesis with the quality of its experimental execution. A promising hypothesis with preliminary execution is therefore ranked below a modest hypothesis whose execution is refined. Moreover, prior methods prune the search logs as the search progresses because the accumulated history outgrows the context window. We propose Agentic Reasoning for Tree Search (ARTS), where we deploy a reasoning language model to navigate this space. The model inspects prior execution logs, diagnoses whether earlier failures arose from faulty implementations or bad hypotheses, and selects the hypothesis to build on next. To mitigate challenges with context length, ARTS uses test-time training to instill the knowledge of search tree in the model weights. Across 22 tasks from MLGym and MLEBench, we show that ARTS outperforms leading algorithms, with over 15.3% relative improvement in the normalized score. With test-time training we show that a Qwen3-4B agent can match performance with closed-source frontier models like Gemini-3 Pro and GPT o3-reasoning with upto 5x lower inference cost. We further observe that on partially observable RL tasks, the test-time trained Qwen3-4B scientist surpasses ARTS with the o3 scientist by rediscovering the human-best recurrent-memory solution that heuristic methods prune away.
title: Learning the ARTS of Search for Automated Discovery
title_translated: 学习搜索的ARTS：自动化发现中的智能体推理
summary_translated: 科学发现可被建模为在假设与实验空间中的迭代搜索过程。当前方法使用如MCTS等启发式算法导航该空间。这些算法将假设价值与其实验执行质量混同，导致一个有前景但初步执行不佳的假设排名低于一个平庸但执行优化的假设。此外，先前方法在搜索过程中修剪搜索日志，因为累积历史超出上下文窗口。我们提出Agentic Reasoning for Tree Search（ARTS），部署一个推理型语言模型来导航该空间。该模型检查先前执行日志，诊断早期失败是源于错误实现还是糟糕假设，并选择下一个应继续构建的假设。为缓解上下文长度挑战，ARTS采用测试时训练，将搜索树知识嵌入模型权重。在MLGym和MLEBench的22个任务中，我们展示ARTS优于领先算法，标准化得分提升超过15.3%。通过测试时训练，Qwen3-4B代理在推理成本低至封闭源前沿模型（如Gemini-3 Pro和GPT o3-reasoning）的五分之一情况下，达到相当性能。我们还观察到，在部分可观测强化学习任务中，经过测试时训练的Qwen3-4B科学家超越ARTS的o3科学家，重新发现了人类最优的递归记忆解决方案，而启发式方法已将其剪枝。

summary: Conversational AI promises a new kind of preparation for high-stakes workplace negotiations -- personalized, interactive, and capable of simulating realistic resistance. That promise is intuitive. We built Trucey, a theory-driven coaching system, to test it. The system encoded four assumptions: that articulation supports clarification, that personalization builds strategic competence, that chunked delivery reduces cognitive load, and that structured scaffolding removes metacognitive burden. A pre-registered experiment (N=267) and interviews (N=15) complicated each of them. Notably, the static handbook we included as a passive control outperformed both AI conditions on empowerment and usability. We reflect on why: each assumption encoded a specific model of how preparation unfolds, and the findings revealed that conversational AI imposes a linear execution model on a task that is fundamentally recursive. We identify an unexamined scope condition on established HAI design guidelines and close with a sequencing principle -- map before path, path before simulation -- for future AI coaching design.
title: AI-Mediated Negotiation: Design Reflections and Lessons
title_translated: AI中介谈判：设计反思与经验教训
summary_translated: 对话式AI有望为高风险职场谈判提供一种新型准备方式——个性化、互动性强，并能模拟真实的抵抗情境。这一设想看似合理。我们构建了Trucey系统，一个基于理论的辅导工具，以验证该设想。该系统基于四个假设：表达有助于澄清，个性化可提升战略能力，分块传递可降低认知负荷，结构化支架可减轻元认知负担。一项预先注册的实验（N=267）和访谈（N=15）对这些假设均提出了挑战。值得注意的是，作为被动对照组的静态手册在赋能感和可用性方面均优于两种AI条件。我们反思其原因：每个假设都编码了一种特定的准备过程模型，而研究发现表明，对话式AI将一种线性执行模型强加于本应具有根本递归性质的任务之上。我们识别出现有人机交互设计指南中一个未被审视的作用范围条件，并提出未来AI辅导设计的序列原则——先建模再路径，再进行模拟。

summary: It is tempting to assume any task solvable by a short program can be taught to a model as its chain-of-thought: write the steps out, fine-tune, and the model follows. This paper shows the assumption fails for an identifiable class of procedures. The testbed is nine reasoning tasks, each from a deterministic generator; public and hidden splits share generators, so held-out data proxies test accuracy. I reverse-engineer the generators into Python solvers, render them as chain-of-thought, and distill into a rank-<= 32 LoRA over a 30B (3.5B-active) Nemotron model. Forward-computable tasks install readily: lookup/arithmetic and an 8-bit boolean task transfer (>= 0.99 and 0.68). Cryptarithm does not: distilling its backtracking search holds at 0.01-0.07 across eleven chain-of-thought designs, RL from verifiable rewards, and self-training, even though a search solver answers 71% of instances. This is not a capability gap. The model does the arithmetic on 97-100% of lines and ranks the correct cipher in its top eight on 71%; it cannot carry the search forward as a left-to-right derivation. Fine-tuning learns the shape of a verifiable elimination step while its verdicts become unconditional templates, correct only 16-57% of the time ("verdict-as-token"). The ceiling holds across backbones from 3B to 671B and across fine-tuning and prompting; a controlled intervention isolates the cause: revealing the cipher key, which turns the derivation forward, lifts the same instances from 0.03 to 0.57. When a procedure's only solution is search over information-free structure, no faithful forward chain-of-thought exists to imitate. The task becomes learnable only by removing the search, precomputing its combinatorial core into a catalog and reducing the trace to recall plus verification; the 1st-place solution reaches Private LB 0.92 this way. What distills is memorization and verification, not search.
title: A Verifiable Search Is Not a Learnable Chain-of-Thought
comment: 31 pages, 6 figures, 16 tables; Interactive walkthrough: this https URL ; Code, solvers, and per-row eval data: this https URL
title_translated: 可验证搜索并非可学习的思维链
summary_translated: 人们倾向于认为任何可通过简短程序解决的任务都可以通过思维链的方式教授给模型：写出步骤，微调，模型便能遵循。本文表明，这一假设在一类可识别的程序任务中失效。测试平台包含九个推理任务，每个任务均由确定性生成器产生；公开与隐藏数据集共享生成器，因此保留数据可代理测试准确性。我们逆向工程生成器为Python求解器，将其转化为思维链，并通过30B（3.5B活跃参数）的Nemotron模型进行低秩适配（LoRA rank <= 32）蒸馏。可正向计算的任务可顺利迁移：查找/算术任务及一个8位布尔任务的转移率分别达到≥0.99和0.68。然而，密码算术任务无法实现：尽管搜索求解器能解答71%的实例，其回溯搜索在十一种思维链设计、基于可验证奖励的强化学习以及自训练下仍保持在0.01-0.07之间。这并非能力差距。模型在97-100%的行上完成算术运算，且在71%的案例中将正确密文排在前八名；但无法将其作为从左到右的推导过程持续推进。微调学习到了可验证消除步骤的形状，但其判断结果变为无条件模板，仅在16-57%的情况下正确（“判断即标记”）。这一上限在3B至671B不同规模模型、微调与提示方法中均成立。受控干预揭示了根本原因：揭示密钥后，推导过程得以向前推进，相同实例的性能从0.03提升至0.57。当某一程序的唯一解法是信息无关结构上的搜索时，不存在可忠实模仿的前向思维链。只有通过移除搜索、将组合核心预计算为目录并简化为回忆+验证，任务才变得可学习；第一名解决方案以此方式达到私有排行榜0.92。真正被蒸馏的，是记忆与验证，而非搜索。

summary: Current evaluations of Large Language Models (LLMs) on logical fallacy detection focus on predicted labels, but do not establish whether those labels are supported by the reasoning the models provide. We propose ForEx (Formal Verification for Explainable Reasoning), a framework that translates LLM-generated explanations into Lean4 and verifies whether the translated rationale is derivable under encoded premises, not the logical validity of the original natural language argument. To distinguish prediction outcomes from the formal status of the supporting reasoning, we introduce the LLM Argument Verification Matrix, which separates label consistency from formal verification status. Experiments on LOGIC-Climate show that over 90% of LLM outputs can be translated into formal reasoning chains that pass verification, while agreement with human annotations remains around 20%. These results expose a systematic gap between formal derivability and label agreement, a distinction invisible to prediction-based metrics. ForEx moves LLM evaluation beyond label correctness toward machine-checkable analysis of formalized reasoning chains.
title: ForEx: A Formal Verification Framework for Explainable Reasoning in Logical Fallacy Detection and Annotation
comment: 2026 IEEE 27th International Conference on Information Reuse and Integration for Data Science
title_translated: ForEx：用于逻辑谬误检测与标注中可解释推理的形式化验证框架
summary_translated: 当前对大语言模型在逻辑谬误检测上的评估主要关注预测标签，却未验证这些标签是否由模型提供的推理过程所支持。我们提出ForEx（可解释推理的形式化验证），该框架将LLM生成的解释翻译为Lean4语言，并验证翻译后的理由是否在编码前提下可推导，而非原始自然语言论证的逻辑有效性。为区分预测结果与支撑推理的形式状态，我们引入LLM论证验证矩阵，将标签一致性与形式验证状态分离。在LOGIC-Climate数据集上的实验表明，超过90%的LLM输出可转化为通过验证的形式推理链，但与人工标注的一致性仅为约20%。这些结果揭示了形式可推导性与标签一致性之间的系统性差距，这一差异在基于预测的度量中不可见。ForEx推动LLM评估超越标签正确性，迈向可机器验证的形式化推理链分析。

summary: Academic age critically shapes career development, influencing research behavior, output volume, and methodological choices. Analyzing method variation across academic ages offers a new theoretical lens on scholarly evolution and provides early-career researchers with practical guidance for method selection. A corpus of 26,677 articles published 1990-2023 in 14 authoritative Library and Information Science journals was compiled. The CogFT model automatically classified the research methods embedded in these articles, and Top2Vec generated the topic model. This process resulted in a comprehensive dataset linking research methods with topics. Author-name disambiguation enabled calculation of each scholar's academic age. Popularity and Shannon diversity indices for methods, together with topic diversity, were compared across academic age groups. Results reveal dynamic methodological trends: the share of theoretical approaches declined gradually, whereas experimental and bibliometric methods gained ground. Method popularity differs significantly among cohorts. Mid-career scholars exhibit the highest method diversity; late-career scholars the lowest.
title: Research Method Usage across Academic Ages in Library and Information Science: An Empirical Study (1990-2023)
title_translated: 图书馆与信息科学领域学术年龄与研究方法使用情况的实证研究（1990–2023）
summary_translated: 学术年龄深刻影响职业发展，进而影响研究行为、产出数量与方法选择。分析不同学术年龄阶段的方法差异，为学术演化提供了新的理论视角，并为早期研究者提供方法选择的实际指导。我们收集了1990至2023年间发表于14家权威图书馆与信息科学期刊的26,677篇论文构成语料库。采用CogFT模型自动分类文章中的研究方法，利用Top2Vec生成主题模型。该流程构建了一个将研究方法与主题相链接的综合数据集。通过作者姓名消歧，计算每位学者的学术年龄。比较不同学术年龄群体的方法流行度与香农多样性指数，以及主题多样性。结果显示动态的方法论趋势：理论方法占比逐渐下降，而实验与文献计量方法逐步上升。不同代际间方法流行度存在显著差异。中年学者表现出最高的方法多样性，而晚年学者最低。

summary: AI agents in long-context applications drift from their specified identity. Current methods detect this only after qualitative degradation is visible. We present a geometric framework for measuring identity structure using $\sqrt{\mathrm{JSD}}$ metric spaces and magnitude homology from enriched category theory, where identity is non-geodesic structure and drift is its relaxation toward the geodesic.   Validated on a persistent AI agent, the framework's strongest empirical finding is a two-mechanism conditioning structure: cross-condition distances reveal an identity-vacuum cluster where the identity specification fills a behavioral void, and a safety-basin cluster where it displaces from post-training attractors. An equilateral probe baseline confirms that the identity specification creates measurable behavioral richness (55 unique response patterns vs. 1 for the base model) at maximum probe separation. A first-order perturbation theory for equilateral configurations predicts magnitude changes from perimeter changes alone, with shape perturbations first-order cancelled by the $S_n$ symmetry; the formula is self-consistent at the observed perturbation amplitudes.   A drift experiment measuring magnitude decrease under context pressure was subsequently found to reflect repetitive-padding artifacts rather than genuine context-length drift; diverse padding produces no measurable deformation through 150K tokens. The magnitude homology framework's full diagnostic promise -- detecting anisotropic contraction and structural collapse via homological simplification -- is architecturally grounded in the perturbation theory and selection rules but remains empirically unconfirmed.
title: Measuring What Persists: Conditioning Mechanisms and a Geometric Framework for AI Agent Identity
title_translated: 衡量持久性：AI智能体身份的调节机制与几何框架
summary_translated: 在长上下文应用中，AI智能体会偏离其指定的身份。现有方法仅在定性退化显现后才能检测到这种漂移。我们提出一种基于几何的框架，使用$\\(sqrt{\mathrm{JSD}}$度量空间和丰富范畴论中的数量同调，来测量身份结构，其中身份是非测地线结构，而漂移是其向测地线松弛的过程。在持续AI智能体上的验证表明，最强的实证发现是一种双机制调节结构：跨条件距离揭示了一个身份空洞簇，即身份规范填补了行为空白；以及一个安全盆地簇，即身份从训练后吸引子中被驱逐。等边探测基线证实，身份规范在最大探测距离下创造了可测量的行为丰富性（55种独特响应模式 vs. 基线模型的1种）。针对等边配置的一阶扰动理论仅通过周长变化即可预测数量变化，形状扰动因$S_n$对称性一阶抵消；公式在观测扰动幅度下自洽。随后的漂移实验在上下文压力下测量数量减少，却发现其反映的是重复填充的人工伪影，而非真正的上下文长度漂移；多样化的填充在15万token内均未产生可测量的形变。数量同调框架的完整诊断潜力——通过同调简化检测各向异性收缩与结构坍塌——在架构上基于扰动理论与选择规则，但尚未得到实证确认。

summary: Understanding the causal structure of a language model's thought process is a problem of significant importance for both transparency and safety. In this work, we take a local approach toward this goal by analyzing the causal relationships among individual components, termed units, of a given, specific chain-of-thought trace. We construct a structural causal model on these units and relate each unit to the log probability of generating (subsequent) output units. Our algorithm, termed AttriCoT, is a black-box method that performs attribution by estimating importance parameters in the structural causal model using $O(U)$ forward passes through the model, where $U$ is the number of units. Evaluation of perturbation curves across 5 datasets and 4 reasoning models shows that AttriCoT produces attributions that are more faithful to the model's behavior than alternative methods. The attribution results also reveal notable differences in thought structure between models and domains.
title: Local Causal Attribution of Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
comment: Camera-ready version for the Mechanistic Interpretability Workshop at ICML 2026. 37 pages, 18 figures
title_translated: 链式思维推理的局部因果归因
summary_translated: 理解语言模型思维过程的因果结构对于透明性和安全性具有重要意义。本文采用局部方法，分析特定链式思维轨迹中各个组成部分（称为单元）之间的因果关系。我们在这些单元上构建了一个结构化因果模型，并将每个单元与生成（后续）输出单元的对数概率相关联。我们提出的算法AttriCoT是一种黑箱方法，通过使用O(U)次模型前向传播估计结构化因果模型中的重要性参数，其中U为单元数量。在5个数据集和4种推理模型上的扰动曲线评估表明，AttriCoT生成的归因结果比其他方法更忠实于模型行为。归因结果还揭示了不同模型和领域之间思维结构的显著差异。

summary: Epidemiological models often rely on survey data to represent how individuals make health-related decisions, such as whether to vaccinate or adopt protective behaviors. However, repeated large-scale surveys are costly, time-consuming, and limited in the range of scenarios they can capture. In this work, we investigate whether large language models (LLMs) can generate synthetic survey responses that reproduce patterns observed in real populations. Using longitudinal data from the FluPaths surveys, we first identify groups associated with broadly positive or negative attitudes toward vaccination through clustering analysis. We then evaluate several LLMs using a cluster-informed prompting approach to generate synthetic survey responses across multiple epidemic waves. Across models, the synthetic data generally reproduce the distributions of demographic characteristics, vaccination-related beliefs, risk perceptions, and health behaviors observed in the survey data. However, they are less successful at capturing how these factors vary together within respondents. Some models reproduce group-level vaccination trends more reliably than others, although performance varies across waves. We also trained a classifier to distinguish real from synthetic records and found that the generated responses remained identifiable as synthetic. Overall, our findings suggest that LLM-generated survey data may provide a useful tool for exploratory data augmentation and we hope that it could support agent-based epidemic modeling approaches. However, the generated data should not be treated as a substitute for human survey data without further methodological improvements and validation.
title: Generating Public Health Responses using Survey-Augmented Large Language Models
title_translated: 基于调查增强的大语言模型生成公共卫生响应
summary_translated: 流行病学模型通常依赖调查数据来反映个体在健康决策（如是否接种疫苗或采取防护行为）方面的行为模式。然而，大规模重复调查成本高、耗时长，且难以覆盖广泛的场景。本文探讨大语言模型（LLMs）是否能够生成再现真实人群观察模式的合成调查回应。利用FluPaths调查的纵向数据，我们首先通过聚类分析识别出对疫苗接种持普遍积极或消极态度的群体。随后，我们采用基于聚类提示的方法评估多个LLM在多轮疫情中生成合成调查回应的能力。结果显示，合成数据总体上再现了真实调查数据中人口统计特征、疫苗相关信念、风险感知和健康行为的分布。然而，在捕捉这些因素在受访者内部的协同变化方面表现较弱。部分模型在群体层面的疫苗接种趋势再现上优于其他模型，但性能在不同波次间存在差异。我们还训练了一个分类器以区分真实与合成记录，发现生成回应仍可被识别为合成数据。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，LLM生成的调查数据可能成为探索性数据增强的有用工具，有望支持基于代理的流行病建模方法。然而，在未进行进一步方法改进和验证之前，不应将生成数据视为人类调查数据的替代品。

summary: Maintainability is a core dimension of software engineering, shaping how code is written, reviewed, and developed over time. While coding agents have demonstrated strong performance on single-issue tasks, it remains unclear how maintainable their code is when future agents build on top of it, potentially leading to compounding downstream effects. We investigate how agent code compares to human code in these maintenance settings, presenting CodeThread, a framework to construct controlled experiments from repository-level coding benchmarks. Applying CodeThread to four frontier coding agents and four benchmarks, we find that agents are less effective at resolving tasks when building on agent code compared to human code, with task resolve rate drops of up to 13.1%. Regression analysis reveals that many traditional software engineering maintainability metrics do not explain this difference. Instead, the clearest signals are subtler behavioral differences in agent code, such as changes to input validation and error handling, along with differences in downstream code size and task difficulty. These findings highlight the need to evaluate these systems not only by immediate task resolution but also by code maintainability, and point to potential sources of downstream errors introduced by agent code.
title: Is Agent Code Less Maintainable Than Human Code?
title_translated: 智能体代码是否比人类代码更难维护？
summary_translated: 可维护性是软件工程的核心维度，影响代码的编写、审查和长期开发。尽管编码智能体在单任务上表现出色，但其代码在未来智能体基础上构建时的可维护性尚不明确，可能导致下游问题的累积。我们研究了智能体代码与人类代码在维护场景下的表现差异，提出了CodeThread框架，用于从仓库级编码基准中构建受控实验。将CodeThread应用于四个前沿编码智能体和四个基准测试，发现当基于智能体代码执行任务时，智能体的表现不如基于人类代码，任务解决率下降高达13.1%。回归分析显示，传统软件工程可维护性指标无法解释这一差异。相反，最明显的信号来自智能体代码中更细微的行为差异，如输入验证和错误处理的变化，以及下游代码规模和任务难度的不同。这些发现强调，评估系统不仅应关注即时任务完成度，还应考虑代码可维护性，并指出了智能体代码引入下游错误的潜在来源。

summary: Phishing is a multi-modal threat. We present a hybrid pipeline that scores each modality with its own engine and fuses the results. Three engines are built, deployed, and independently benchmarked: a four-stage URL stack (Domain Guard, lexical model, threat intelligence, and an asymmetric L2 fusion sidecar); a generalization-hardened DistilBERT NLP classifier whose held-out real-phishing recall rises from 0.8% to 87.3%; and a threat-intelligence synchronizer with end-to-end OpenTelemetry instrumentation confirming 1:1 message conservation. A decision-level fusion stage, characterized on a 10,677-email whole-system benchmark, reaches F1 = 0.914 with a calibrated probabilistic-OR over URL, header, and phishing-probability channels while cutting held-out real-spam false positives to 3.6%. Because that benchmark uses proxy URL and header channels and an operating point still needing recalibration, we present it as a preliminary integrated result. The binding constraint for deployable detection is generalization rather than same-distribution accuracy.
title: A Hybrid, Multi-Layered Pipeline for Phishing and Threat Classification: Independently Validated URL and NLP Engines with a Calibrated Multi-Channel Fusion Stage
comment: Graduation project, Zewail City of Science and Technology. Code and documentation: this https URL . Whole-system fusion results use proxy URL and header channels; treat integrated metrics as preliminary
title_translated: 一种混合多层钓鱼与威胁分类管道：独立验证的URL与NLP引擎及校准的多通道融合阶段
summary_translated: 钓鱼攻击是一种多模态威胁。我们提出了一种混合管道，对每种模态使用独立的引擎进行评分并融合结果。构建、部署并独立基准测试了三个引擎：一个四阶段URL堆栈（域名保护、词法模型、威胁情报和非对称L2融合辅助组件）；一个经过泛化强化的DistilBERT NLP分类器，其保留的真实钓鱼样本召回率从0.8%提升至87.3%；以及一个具备端到端OpenTelemetry监控的威胁情报同步器，确认消息1:1保真。一个决策级融合阶段在包含10,677封邮件的全系统基准测试中达到F1=0.914，通过校准的概率或运算对URL、报头和钓鱼概率通道进行融合，同时将保留的真实垃圾邮件误报率降至3.6%。由于该基准测试使用代理URL和报头通道，且操作点仍需重新校准，我们将其作为初步集成结果呈现。可部署检测的决定性约束是泛化能力，而非同分布准确性。

summary: Language models can generate plausible rationales for their predictions, but these explanations may not faithfully represent the model's internal reasoning. We propose verifier-coupled reasoning, a framework that inserts inline claims into reasoning traces and trains an auxiliary consistency head to predict programmatic verifier outputs from rationale-span hidden states. The central finding is a gap between decodability and faithfulness: consistency training reliably makes verifier information decodable from rationale representations, but decodability does not guarantee faithful generation. In LeanCheck (formal theorem proving), rationale-only and proof-only pooling achieve perfect directional separation under counterfactual conflict. In KataGo (Go engine), commentary spans encode 10-way win-rate buckets at 81% accuracy. Yet in a code setting, the model achieves 98.6% coupling while its generated explanations remain unfaithful: fluent prose with correct structured claims, but describing unrelated algorithms; a controlled pretrained-vs-from-scratch comparison shows the gap is not capacity-driven. Synthetic activation patching confirms causal influence (73-89% vs. 31% baseline), FEVER reveals that evidence-only pooling isolates genuine evidence sensitivity at the cost of raw accuracy, and per-claim analysis shows that consistency loss disproportionately benefits fine-grained claims over binary ones. These results establish that consistency losses are effective diagnostics and representation-shaping tools, but not sufficient conditions for faithful reasoning.
title: Decodable but Not Faithful: Coupling Natural-Language Rationales to Programmatic Verifiers
comment: Accepted to the ICML 2026 AI4Math Workshop as a poster
title_translated: 可解码但不忠实：将自然语言推理与程序化验证器耦合
summary_translated: 语言模型可以为其预测生成看似合理的解释，但这些解释未必真实反映模型内部推理过程。我们提出验证器耦合推理框架，通过在推理轨迹中插入内联断言，并训练一个辅助一致性头，从推理片段隐藏状态预测程序化验证器的输出。核心发现是可解码性与忠实性之间的差距：一致性训练能可靠地使验证器信息从推理表示中可解码，但可解码性并不保证忠实生成。在LeanCheck（形式化定理证明）中，仅使用推理和仅使用证明的池化方法在反事实冲突下实现了完美的方向分离。在KataGo（围棋引擎）中，评论片段以81%的准确率编码了10类胜率桶。但在代码场景中，模型实现了98.6%的耦合度，其生成的解释却仍不忠实：虽然语言流畅且包含正确结构化的断言，但描述的是无关算法；通过预训练与从零训练的对比实验表明，该差距并非由模型容量驱动。合成激活修补证实了因果影响（73-89% vs. 31%基线），FEVER实验显示仅使用证据的池化方法虽牺牲原始准确率，但能隔离真实的证据敏感性，逐断言分析则表明一致性损失更有利于细粒度断言而非二元断言。这些结果表明，一致性损失是有效的诊断工具和表征塑造手段，但不足以保证忠实推理。

summary: Multi-agent LLM systems routinely produce hallucinated outputs that cannot be explained by model deficiencies alone. A significant class of these failures arises not from model incapacity but from context drift: the divergence of internal knowledge states between concurrent agents. When agents enter a collaborative task with mismatched or stale representations of shared world state, their joint reasoning produces contradictions that manifest as hallucination. We define the Context Divergence Score (CDS), a lightweight scalar metric quantifying knowledge-state discrepancy between agent pairs across spatial, temporal, and task dimensions, and propose the Shared State Verification Protocol (SSVP), which lets agents periodically exchange compressed state summaries and flag high-divergence conditions before joint reasoning. We evaluate SSVP across two domains (multi-agent travel and software project planning) using Claude Haiku. In controlled experiments (n=30 per condition, travel; n=10, software) across 8 scenarios, naive full-broadcast synchronization increases hallucination rate by 34% above the no-sync baseline (HR: 0.658 vs. 0.492, p=0.0022, d=1.18), a contamination effect from propagating erroneous agent states. SSVP avoids this failure mode while showing modest, consistent reduction (HR: 0.463, d=0.30) and achieves significantly lower hallucination than full-broadcast (p=0.0005, d=1.47) using 58% fewer API calls. The contamination effect does not replicate in the software domain, where all conditions converge to low HR (<0.2), confirming it is specific to tasks where one erroneous shared belief cascades across evaluation dimensions. Our results reframe hallucination mitigation as a distributed systems problem and establish context synchronization as a first-class primitive in multi-agent LLM design.
title: Hallucination as Context Drift: Synchronization Protocols for Multi-Agent LLM Systems
title_translated: 幻觉作为上下文漂移：多智能体大模型系统的同步协议
summary_translated: 多智能体大模型系统经常产生无法仅由模型缺陷解释的幻觉输出。这类失败中的一个重要类别并非源于模型能力不足，而是由于上下文漂移：并发智能体之间内部知识状态的偏离。当智能体在协作任务中拥有不匹配或过时的共享世界状态表示时，其联合推理会产生矛盾，表现为幻觉。我们定义了上下文分歧得分（CDS），一种轻量级标量指标，用于量化跨空间、时间及任务维度的智能体对之间的知识状态差异，并提出了共享状态验证协议（SSVP），让智能体定期交换压缩的状态摘要，在联合推理前标记高分歧状态。我们在两个领域（多智能体旅行规划和软件项目规划）使用Claude Haiku评估SSVP。在8个场景下的控制实验中（旅行任务每条件n=30，软件任务n=10），朴素的全广播同步使幻觉率比无同步基线高出34%（HR: 0.658 vs. 0.492，p=0.0022，d=1.18），这是错误智能体状态传播导致的污染效应。SSVP避免了这一失效模式，同时表现出适度且一致的降低（HR: 0.463，d=0.30），并以58%更少的API调用显著低于全广播同步的幻觉率（p=0.0005，d=1.47）。该污染效应在软件领域未复现，所有条件均收敛至低幻觉率（<0.2），证实其仅存在于一个错误共享信念在评估维度中持续传播的任务中。我们的结果将幻觉缓解重新定义为分布式系统问题，并确立上下文同步为多智能体大模型设计中的首要原语。

summary: Facial expressions are nonverbal social signals used in human interaction, but facial expression recognition datasets often focus on static images, basic emotion categories, or single deterministic annotations. We introduce Chehre, an emoji-prompted video dataset for analyzing dynamic facial expressions across a wide range of expressions for exploring inter-individual perceptual diversity. In Chehre, participants were prompted to express and record 40 facial emojis. Later, their facial motions were transferred onto synthetic faces to preserve privacy. A separate group of annotators analyzed the anonymized videos using emoji and label annotations, resulting in 2,111 high quality videos collected from 203 performers and validated by 902 annotators. We define two benchmark tasks: dominant expression recognition, which tests whether models recover the top human-rated labels, and distributional expression recognition, which tests whether models capture the diversity of human responses. We benchmark recent vision-language models using random sampling and persona prompting to generate multiple predictions per video. Results show that both tasks are challenging: among the models evaluated, the best-performing model achieves only 32.5% Top-1 accuracy on dominant expression recognition and a Spread Ratio well below the human reference on distributional recognition. Chehre provides a benchmark for evaluating diverse, dynamic, and distributional facial expression recognition
title: Chehre: An Emoji-Prompted Video Dataset for Perceptually Diverse Facial Expression Recognition
title_translated: Chehre：一种基于表情符号提示的视频数据集，用于感知多样性的面部表情识别
summary_translated: 面部表情是人类互动中的非语言社交信号，但现有的面部表情识别数据集通常聚焦于静态图像、基本情绪类别或单一确定性标注。我们引入Chehre，一个基于表情符号提示的视频数据集，用于分析广泛范围内的动态面部表情，探索个体间感知多样性。在Chehre中，参与者被要求表达并录制40个面部表情符号。随后，他们的面部动作被转移到合成人脸以保护隐私。另一组标注者使用表情符号和标签标注分析匿名化视频，最终从203名表演者处收集了2,111段高质量视频，并由902名标注者验证。我们定义了两个基准任务：主导表情识别，测试模型能否恢复人类评分最高的标签；分布式表情识别，测试模型是否能捕捉人类反应的多样性。我们使用随机采样和角色提示方法对近期视觉-语言模型进行基准测试，为每段视频生成多个预测。结果显示，两项任务均具挑战性：在所评估的模型中，表现最好的模型在主导表情识别上的Top-1准确率仅为32.5%，在分布式识别上的Spread Ratio远低于人类参考值。Chehre为评估多样化、动态化和分布式的面部表情识别提供了基准。

summary: Computer use agents are evaluated almost exclusively on atomic desktop tasks, but realistic desktop work requires sustaining state across multiple objectives. We study this gap with ChainWorld, which composes atomic OSWorld tasks into long horizon desktop workloads through directional compatibility search while preserving the source evaluators. The resulting workload contains 347 chains of length two to four and compares two renderings of the same task sequence. In single turn evaluation, all tasks are presented together in one prompt. In multi turn evaluation, tasks are revealed one at a time. Across four current computer use agents, maximum chain completion is 31%. Multi turn evaluation improves completion for three models, but both protocols remain challenging. The two protocols also expose different failure profiles. Single turn failures concentrate on artifact precision, while multi turn failures more often reflect session management problems such as fragmented progress and later turn disengagement.
title: ChainWorld: Composing Long-Horizon Desktop Workloads from Atomic OSWorld Tasks
title_translated: ChainWorld：从原子OSWorld任务组合长时程桌面工作负载
summary_translated: 计算机使用智能体几乎完全在原子桌面任务上进行评估，但真实的桌面工作需要在多个目标间维持状态。我们通过ChainWorld研究这一差距，该系统通过方向兼容性搜索将原子OSWorld任务组合成长时程桌面工作负载，同时保留原始评估器。生成的工作负载包含347条长度为二到四的任务链，并比较同一任务序列的两种渲染方式。在单轮评估中，所有任务一次性呈现于一个提示中；在多轮评估中，任务逐个揭示。在四种当前计算机使用智能体中，最长链完成度仅为31%。多轮评估提升了三个模型的完成度，但两种协议仍具挑战性。两种协议也暴露出不同的失败模式：单轮失败集中在产物精度，而多轮失败更多反映会话管理问题，如进度碎片化和后续轮次脱离。

summary: Open-weight Large Language Models (LLMs) enable scientific progress and broad deployment. However, they make it difficult to control access to sensitive capabilities. Current practice either suppresses dangerous capabilities before release or mediates access through closed services that use specialized model variants, input/output monitors, and API permissions. The former is susceptible to jailbreaks while sacrificing capability for all users to mitigate the risks posed by a few, and the latter is fundamentally incompatible with open-weight release. In this paper, we propose Tiered Language Models (TLMs), where a single set of released weights supports multiple capability levels. In its default public configuration, a TLM behaves as a conventional LLM. A compact secret key specifies a permutation over a small parameter subset, inducing an alternative computation graph over the same weights that exposes additional capabilities. We develop a training protocol that jointly pretrains both configurations from scratch, then fine-tunes the keyed configuration on private data with regularization to preserve the public model's behavior. We pretrain 180M- and 650M-parameter TLMs and demonstrate that the keyed configuration can acquire a new language, gain instruction-following ability, and memorize private factual knowledge, whereas the public configuration exhibits none of these capabilities. Moreover, we show that our approach extends naturally to multiple hierarchical tiers. Because authorization operates on the model's weight structure rather than in the input space, the mechanism resists fine-tuning-based extraction and partial key compromise. In general, TLMs take a step toward reconciling open-weight release with selective capability control.
title: Toward Open Weight Models Without Risks: Separating Public and Private Capabilities in LLMs
title_translated: 迈向无风险的开放权重模型：在大语言模型中分离公共与私有能力
summary_translated: 开放权重的大语言模型（LLMs）促进了科学进步和广泛部署。然而，它们使得对敏感能力的访问难以控制。当前做法要么在发布前抑制危险能力，要么通过封闭服务中介访问，后者使用专用模型变体、输入/输出监控和API权限。前者易受越狱攻击，且为防范少数用户风险而牺牲所有用户的性能；后者与开放权重发布根本冲突。本文提出分层语言模型（TLMs），其中一组发布的权重支持多种能力层级。默认公共配置下，TLM表现如常规LLM；一个紧凑的秘密密钥指定小参数子集的置换，诱导相同的权重上形成替代计算图，从而暴露额外能力。我们开发了一种训练协议，从头开始联合预训练两种配置，然后对密钥配置在私有数据上进行微调，并通过正则化保持公共模型的行为。我们预训练了180M和650M参数的TLM，并证明密钥配置可习得新语言、获得指令遵循能力并记忆私有事实知识，而公共配置则不具备这些能力。此外，我们展示该方法可自然扩展至多层级结构。由于授权作用于模型权重结构而非输入空间，该机制能抵抗基于微调的提取和部分密钥泄露。总体而言，TLM朝着实现开放权重发布与选择性能力控制的协调迈出一步。

summary: Conventional training losses for speech enhancement based on the signal-to-distortion ratio (SDR) treat all time-frequency (TF) regions uniformly, overlooking the fine-grained spectral cues that are relevant to specific phoneme intelligibility. We propose a TF weighting framework that modulates the SDR objective based on local speech presence, speech-to-interference ratio (SIR), and spectral flux. By integrating these factors into a differentiable objective, the framework emphasizes TF bins with high speech-noise competition while also accounting for transient cues such as consonant bursts. Experimental results show that our approach improves objective frequency-weighted enhancement metrics, as well as phoneme recognition accuracy, particularly for consonants. Spectral analysis shows better reconstruction of mid-frequency structures at less adverse SIR.
title: Time-Frequency Weighted Losses for Phoneme Reconstruction in DNN-Based Speech Enhancement
title_translated: 基于时间-频率加权损失的神经网络语音增强中的音素重构
summary_translated: 基于信噪比（SDR）的传统语音增强训练损失对所有时间-频率（TF）区域一视同仁，忽略了与特定音素可懂度相关的精细频谱线索。我们提出一种TF加权框架，根据局部语音存在度、语音-干扰比（SIR）和谱流速调节SDR目标。通过将这些因素整合进可微目标函数，该框架强调语音-噪声竞争激烈的TF单元，同时考虑瞬态线索如辅音爆发。实验结果表明，该方法在客观频率加权增强指标以及音素识别准确率方面均有提升，尤其在辅音识别上效果显著。谱分析显示，在不利SIR条件下，中频结构的重建更为良好。

summary: The open-source ecosystem on GitHub lacks a systematic hierarchical taxonomy of software repositories. GitHub Topics, the dominant organizational mechanism, is flat, inconsistent, and covers only 67% of projects. We present ATLAS, the first framework that automatically constructs a hierarchical taxonomy for software repositories and classifies projects into it end-to-end. By combining LLM global knowledge with real repository distributions, ATLAS proposes meaningful splitting dimensions and iteratively corrects those that fail to accommodate real projects. A Designer Agent proposes splitting dimensions while a Classifier Agent assigns repositories; a self-corrective refinement loop uses classification failures to drive dimension revision through escalating strategies. We evaluate ATLAS on 54,387 GitHub repositories against six baselines spanning four paradigms, two downstream tasks, and three model families. On a stratified 2,001-repository benchmark, ATLAS achieves a Taxonomy Quality F-score (TQF) of 83.13%, outperforming the best baseline by 15 percentage points (on the full 54k corpus the approximate TQF is 73.0%, a gap driven by Path Granularity's all-or-nothing scoring on longer paths rather than lower classification accuracy). It is the only method to simultaneously achieve high structural quality and high practical applicability. On downstream tasks, ATLAS enables alternative discovery with P@1 = 85.71%, surpassing even human-curated lists (62.34%), and achieves the highest P@1 for repository retrieval. The taxonomy further reveals structural ecosystem trends that are difficult to obtain from flat tags or similarity methods: the shift from libraries to AI/ML applications (now 61% of newly community-adopted projects) becomes visible only through hierarchical, type-based categorization. An interactive taxonomy explorer is available at https://atlas-taxonomy.netlify.app/
title: ATLAS: Agentic Taxonomy of Large-Scale Software Ecosystems
comment: Accepted at the 41st IEEE/ACM International Conference on Automated Software Engineering (ASE 2026)
title_translated: ATLAS：大规模软件生态系统的智能体分类体系
summary_translated: GitHub上的开源生态系统缺乏对软件仓库的系统性分层分类体系。目前主流的组织方式GitHub Topics是扁平的、不一致的，且仅覆盖了67%的项目。我们提出了ATLAS，这是首个能够自动构建软件仓库分层分类体系并端到端地将项目归类其中的框架。通过结合大语言模型的全局知识与真实仓库分布，ATLAS提出有意义的划分维度，并迭代修正无法容纳实际项目的划分方案。设计智能体（Designer Agent）提出划分维度，分类智能体（Classifier Agent）负责分配仓库；一个自我修正的优化循环利用分类失败来驱动维度修订，采用逐步升级的策略。我们在54,387个GitHub仓库上对ATLAS进行了评估，对比六种涵盖四种范式、两个下游任务和三种模型家族的基线方法。在包含2,001个仓库的分层基准测试中，ATLAS取得了83.13%的分类质量F分数（TQF），比最佳基线高出15个百分点（在完整的5.4万仓库数据集上，TQF约为73.0%，差距主要由路径粒度带来的全有或全无评分机制引起，而非分类准确率较低）。它是唯一同时实现高结构质量和高实用性的方法。在下游任务中，ATLAS实现了P@1 = 85.71%的替代发现能力，超过人工整理列表（62.34%），并在仓库检索任务中达到最高P@1。该分类体系还揭示了难以通过扁平标签或相似性方法获取的生态系统结构性趋势：从库向AI/ML应用的转变（如今新社区采纳项目中占比达61%）只有通过基于类型的分层分类才能显现。交互式分类探索工具可在 https://atlas-taxonomy.netlify.app/ 获取。

summary: This work examines sexualised AI-generated English-speaking voices offered by a popular commercial platform. New technologies may enable sexual empowerment and greater diversity in gender expression, yet toxic masculinity, heteronormativity, and the abuse of women and LGBTQ+ people remain pervasive online. Drawing on a Feminist HCI perspective, we examine how commercial voice AI systems reproduce and circulate particular performances of gender. We conducted a listening experiment with a diverse group of listeners, combining quantitative adjective selection, qualitative free-text responses, and acoustic analysis. Participants evaluated male- and female-coded voices presented with either sexualised scripts or neutral text. Results reveal a narrow range of gender expression, largely binary and heteronormative. Female-coded voices are more frequently described using sexualised and submissive terms, while male-coded voices are more often associated with dominance and positive traits.
title: Sexualised synthetic personas encode and amplify gendered power asymmetries through voice
title_translated: 被性化的合成人格通过语音编码并放大性别权力不对称
summary_translated: 本研究探讨了一款主流商业平台提供的性化AI生成英语语音。新技术可能带来性 empowerment 和更丰富的性别表达，但网络中的有毒男性气质、异性恋规范以及对女性和LGBTQ+群体的虐待依然普遍存在。基于女性主义人机交互（Feminist HCI）视角，我们分析了商业语音AI系统如何再现并传播特定的性别表现形式。通过对多样化听众群体开展听觉实验，结合定量形容词选择、定性自由文本反馈和声学分析，参与者评估了带有性化脚本或中性文本呈现的男女编码语音。结果表明，性别表达范围狭窄，大多呈二元对立且符合异性恋规范。女性编码语音更多被描述为性化和顺从，而男性编码语音则更常与支配性和积极特质相关联。

summary: Voice reconstruction using Text-to-Speech (TTS) offers a communication method for people with speech disorders, which aims to retain their speaker identity while improving intelligibility. Previous work generally relies on Mean Opinion Score (MOS) to evaluate naturalness and speaker similarity, but this has limited sensitivity and reliability. We propose an evaluation framework with subjective and objective components. Subjectively, we evaluate perceived intelligibility and speaker identity using Best Worst Scaling (BWS) with situational framing. Objectively, we demonstrate that standard measures fail to predict reconstruction success for highly unintelligible speakers, so we introduce a novel dual-reference distributional measure to assess the trade-off between intelligibility and speaker identity. By evaluating the output of 17 zero-shot TTS systems for 193 speakers, we show that our framework provides a reliable and task-aligned approach for assessing voice reconstruction.
title: An Evaluation Framework for Text-to-Speech Voice Reconstruction
title_translated: 一种文本转语音语音重建的评估框架
summary_translated: 使用文本转语音（TTS）技术进行语音重建为言语障碍者提供了一种沟通方式，旨在保留其说话人身份的同时提升可理解性。以往研究通常依赖平均意见得分（MOS）来评估自然度和说话人相似性，但该方法敏感性和可靠性有限。我们提出一个包含主观与客观两部分的评估框架。主观方面，采用带情境设定的最佳最差量表（BWS）评估感知可理解性和说话人身份；客观方面，我们发现标准指标无法有效预测高度不可理解说话人的重建成功率，因此引入一种新颖的双参考分布度量，以评估可理解性与说话人身份之间的权衡。通过对193名说话人使用17个零样本TTS系统的输出进行评估，证明该框架能提供可靠且任务对齐的语音重建评估方法。

summary: Deep neural network-based automatic speaker verification (ASV) systems achieve impressive performance but their embedding representations remain opaque, lacking a structured and perceptually verifiable explanation of the vocal characteristics they encode. Existing approaches either require annotation of speaker attributes or introduce alternative representations whose interpretability is unvalidated with listeners. We propose Listenable Interpretable Speaker Embeddings (LISE), a label-free framework that decomposes pretrained speaker embeddings into a small set of components. This decomposition yields a structured representation that supports the analysis of what information has been encoded by speaker embeddings. LISE preserves ASV performance with negligible EER degradation on x-vector and ECAPA-TDNN. Crucially, the interpretability of these components for human listeners is demonstrated through listening experiments, where participants distinguished speakers with 83.9% accuracy.
title: LISE : Listenable Interpretable Speaker Embeddings
title_translated: 可听可解释的说话人嵌入：LISE
summary_translated: 基于深度神经网络的自动说话人验证（ASV）系统取得了显著性能，但其嵌入表示仍不透明，缺乏对所编码语音特征的结构化且可感知验证的解释。现有方法要么需要标注说话人属性，要么引入未经听觉验证的替代表示。我们提出LISE（Listenable Interpretable Speaker Embeddings），一种无需标签的框架，可将预训练的说话人嵌入分解为一组少量组件。这种分解生成了结构化表示，支持分析说话人嵌入中编码的信息内容。LISE在x-vector和ECAPA-TDNN上保持了ASV性能，仅带来微小的EER退化。关键的是，通过听觉实验验证了这些组件对人类听者的可解释性，参与者以83.9%的准确率区分了不同说话人。

summary: Reinforcement learning for multi-step LLM agents often relies on scalar rewards that indicate success but cannot explain why a trajectory is good or bad. Rubric-based rewards improve interpretability through natural-language criteria, but existing methods score at the trajectory level and freeze the scorer behind a closed-source judge, leaving step-level credit assignment unresolved and the judge itself static. We propose ARCO (Adaptive Rubric CO-evolution), a rubric framework in which a same-scale model $μ$ shares a backbone with two heads: a generation head that produces per-step criteria, and a score head that predicts rubric-conditioned step-level rewards. A trajectory decomposition constraint ties the sum of step rewards to the terminal outcome, enabling credit assignment without step-level labels, while $μ$ and the policy $π$ are jointly updated on on-policy data so that the rubric content and the scoring function co-evolve at the parameter level. Across HotpotQA, 2WikiMultiHopQA, and MuSiQue with two open-source backbones, ARCO improves the best EM in every setting over strong outcome-, rubric-, and process-reward baselines, and analyses show that its rubrics are step-specific, robust to design choices, and useful for diagnosing agent behavior. Codes and data are available at https://github.com/zihangtian/ARCO.
title: ARCO: Adaptive Rubric with Co-Evolution for Multi-Step LLM-Based Agents
title_translated: ARCO：用于多步LLM智能体的自适应评分体系与共演化机制
summary_translated: 多步大语言模型（LLM）智能体的强化学习通常依赖于标量奖励信号，仅指示成功与否，却无法解释轨迹为何良好或不佳。基于评分体系的奖励虽可通过自然语言标准提升可解释性，但现有方法在轨迹层面打分且固定封闭源判官，导致步骤级信用分配未解决，且判官本身保持静态。我们提出ARCO（Adaptive Rubric CO-evolution），一种评分框架，其中同一模型μ共享主干网络，拥有两个分支：生成分支用于生成每一步的标准，评分分支用于预测条件化于评分体系的步骤级奖励。通过轨迹分解约束，使各步骤奖励之和等于最终结果，从而在无需步骤级标签的情况下实现信用分配；同时，μ与策略π在在线策略数据上联合更新，使得评分内容与评分函数在参数层面协同演化。在HotpotQA、2WikiMultiHopQA和MuSiQue三个数据集上，使用两种开源骨干模型，ARCO在每个设置下均优于强基线（包括基于结果、评分和过程奖励的方法），分析显示其评分体系具有步骤特异性、对设计选择鲁棒，并有助于诊断智能体行为。代码与数据已公开于 https://github.com/zihangtian/ARCO。

summary: Retrieval heads, attention heads that copy information from earlier context to the current position, have been proposed as the mechanistic substrate for long-context recall. Rotary position embeddings (RoPE) rotate queries and keys by frequencies decaying with a base hyperparameter theta, and a natural hypothesis is that this rotation either prevents retrieval heads from forming or degrades their function. We test both across four open-weight 7-8B models spanning multi-head and grouped-query attention and a 100x range of theta, using paired-seed needle-in-a-haystack tests, layer-clustered permutation, and causal head-masking. (i) Retrieval heads are causally necessary: masking the 87 detected heads in OLMo-2 collapses recall from 1.00 to 0.00, while masking matched random heads has no effect; this replicates in Qwen. (ii) Higher theta does not reduce retrieval-head count (LLaMA-3.1 at theta=500K has 47 heads vs LLaMA-2 at theta=10K with 42), refuting the prevention hypothesis. (iii) The norm-utility relation is family-specific and significant in opposite directions (Qwen d=-0.49, OLMo d=+0.50, both significant; LLaMA null); since OLMo and LLaMA-3.1 share theta=500K yet differ, the effect is not theta-driven. (iv) Building on Chiang and Yogatama (2025), a controlled patch shows that zeroing the lowest-frequency RoPE dimensions of retrieval heads degrades recall dose-dependently (1.00 to 0.18 when 32 of 128 dimensions are zeroed, vs 0.98 for random dimensions); the effect is head-specific and task-specific. The causal variable is RoPE frequency, not norm-utility. The direction holds in all five models patched (OLMo-2, Qwen2.5-7B/14B, Gemma-2, Mistral) across four lineages and two scales. We do not claim cross-model magnitude. Code and a paired-seed harness are released.
title: Does RoPE Prevent or Degrade Retrieval Heads? A Mechanistic Analysis Across Model Families
comment: 25 pages, 3 figures, 18 tables. Code, data, and a paired-seed reproducibility harness: this https URL
title_translated: RoPE 是否阻止或削弱检索头？跨模型家族的机制分析
summary_translated: 检索头是将早期上下文信息复制到当前位置的注意力头，被认为是长上下文回忆的机制基础。旋转位置嵌入（RoPE）通过以基超参数theta衰减的频率旋转查询和键，自然假设这种旋转要么阻止检索头形成，要么削弱其功能。我们在四个开放权重的7-8B模型（涵盖多头和分组查询注意力）及theta值100倍范围内进行了测试，使用成对种子的针在 haystack 测试、层聚类置换和因果头掩码方法。（i）检索头具有因果必要性：在OLMo-2中屏蔽检测到的87个头会使回忆率从1.00降至0.00，而屏蔽随机头无影响；该结果在Qwen中复现。（ii）更高的theta并未减少检索头数量（LLaMA-3.1在theta=500K时有47个头，而LLaMA-2在theta=10K时有42个），反驳了阻止假设。（iii）范数-效用关系因模型家族而异且方向相反（Qwen d=-0.49，OLMo d=+0.50，均显著；LLaMA无显著性）；由于OLMo和LLaMA-3.1共享theta=500K却表现不同，该效应并非由theta驱动。（iv）基于Chiang和Yogatama（2025）的工作，受控修补实验显示，将检索头的最低频RoPE维度置零会剂量依赖性地降低回忆率（128维中32维置零时从1.00降至0.18，而随机维度为0.98）；该效应具有头特异性和任务特异性。因果变量是RoPE频率，而非范数-效用。该方向在五个修补模型（OLMo-2、Qwen2.5-7B/14B、Gemma-2、Mistral）中所有五条线路和两种规模下均成立。我们不主张跨模型幅度。代码和成对种子工具已发布。

summary: Medical Vision-Language Models (Med-VLMs) achieve strong expert-level performance, yet their ability to generate patient-accessible descriptions remains underexplored. With the 21st Century Cures Act now mandating immediate patient access to diagnostic imaging results, evaluating whether Med-VLMs can bridge this Expert-Lay Gap is both urgent and clinically consequential for patient education and shared decision-making. To this end, we introduce MedLayXPlain, the first large-scale multimodal benchmark and evaluation framework for Medical Lay Language Generation (MLLG). MedLayXPlain-122K provides 122,789 region-grounded samples across 8 imaging modalities from 12 publicly available source datasets, each comprising a medical image with paired expert and lay captions anchored in a three-level Unified Medical Language System (UMLS) ontology hierarchy spanning 7 semantic groups, 43 semantic types, and 2,411 medical concepts. Lay captions are constructed via Hierarchical Ontology-Verified Refinement (HOVER), a three-step pipeline combining patient-centric vocabulary mapping, LLM-based constrained rewriting, and cross-model visual verification to enforce semantic equivalence while preventing hallucination. We further introduce MedLayEval, a lightweight 3B evaluator distilled from a 27B verifier that scores expert-lay alignment across five clinically grounded attributes, addressing the poor correlation between standard NLG metrics and clinical judgment. Benchmarking 33 VLMs on MedLayXPlain-122K reveals a systematic Expert-Lay Gap: medical VLMs achieve strong expert captioning but suffer significant lay-register degradation, while general-purpose VLMs produce more accessible language yet lack clinical precision, confirming that neither current paradigm adequately serves patient-facing communication.
title: MEDLAYXPLAIN: Benchmarking the Expert-Lay Gap in Medical Vision-Language Models
comment: 40 pages (10 pages main text, 30 pages appendix), 4 main figures, 33 vision-language models benchmarked
title_translated: MEDLAYXPLAIN：医学视觉-语言模型中专家与普通患者间差距的基准测试
summary_translated: 医学视觉-语言模型（Med-VLMs）在专家级性能上表现强劲，但其生成患者可理解描述的能力仍缺乏深入研究。随着21世纪治愈法案现在要求立即向患者提供诊断影像结果，评估Med-VLM是否能弥合这一‘专家-普通患者’差距，对于患者教育和共同决策具有紧迫且临床意义。为此，我们提出MedLayXPlain，首个大规模多模态基准与评估框架，用于医学通俗语言生成（MLLG）。MedLayXPlain-122K包含来自12个公开数据集的122,789个区域锚定样本，覆盖8种成像模态，每个样本包含医学图像及配对的专家与通俗描述，这些描述基于三层次统一医学语言系统（UMLS）本体层次结构，涵盖7个语义组、43个语义类型和2,411个医学概念。通俗描述通过分层本体验证精炼（HOVER）流程构建，该流程结合以患者为中心的词汇映射、基于LLM的约束重写以及跨模型视觉验证，确保语义等价性并防止幻觉。我们进一步引入MedLayEval，一个从27B验证器蒸馏出的轻量级3B评估器，可评分专家-通俗一致性在五个临床相关属性上的表现，解决了标准NLG指标与临床判断之间相关性差的问题。在MedLayXPlain-122K上对33个VLM进行基准测试揭示了系统性的专家-通俗差距：医学VLM在专家描述上表现良好，但在通俗语言表达上严重退化；而通用VLM虽语言更易懂，却缺乏临床精确性，证实当前任一范式均无法充分满足面向患者的沟通需求。

summary: Large language models can produce confident but protocol-invalid answers in domains where procedural compliance is critical. This paper presents Answer Engineering, a deterministic runtime and authoring layer that applies localized rule-guided interventions to the visible reasoning trajectory during standard autoregressive generation, without retraining, modifying model weights, or performing global search. The method is evaluated on a controlled clinical benchmark for sudden sensorineural hearing loss (SSNHL), where correct management depends on protocol-consistent interpretation of symptom timing, Weber/Rinne tuning-fork findings, and otoscopic findings. In the benchmark, step-by-step reasoning shifted rather than eliminated errors: compliant outcomes for SSNHL decreased from 54.5% under unguided generation to 25.1%, while acceptance on the conductive contrast condition increased from 1.6% to 58.9%. Local trajectory editing increased SSNHL compliance to 83.5% and conductive-case adherence to 77.9%, raising balanced accuracy from 42.0% under reasoning-only generation to 80.7%. The results support a systems-level view in which protocol adherence can be improved through auditable runtime control of reasoning trajectories, while also identifying limitations caused by rule coverage, trigger reliability, and persistent diagnosis-first generation dynamics.
title: Answer Engineering: Local Trajectory Editing for Protocol-Constrained Decision Making in Large Language Models
comment: 31 pages, 6 figures. Code and data: this https URL
title_translated: 答案工程：大型语言模型中协议约束决策的局部轨迹编辑
summary_translated: 大型语言模型在程序合规至关重要的领域可能产生自信但不符合协议的答案。本文提出答案工程（Answer Engineering），一种确定性的运行时和创作层，在标准自回归生成过程中对可见推理轨迹实施局部规则引导干预，无需重新训练、修改模型权重或执行全局搜索。该方法在针对突发性感音神经性耳聋（SSNHL）的受控临床基准上进行了评估，其中正确管理依赖于症状时间、Weber/Rinne音叉检查结果和耳镜检查结果的协议一致解释。在基准测试中，逐步推理的调整而非消除错误：在无引导生成下，SSNHL的合规结果从54.5%下降至25.1%，而在传导性对比条件下接受率从1.6%上升至58.9%。局部轨迹编辑使SSNHL合规率提升至83.5%，传导性病例依从性达77.9%，平衡准确率从仅推理生成的42.0%提升至80.7%。结果支持一种系统视角，即通过可审计的运行时控制推理轨迹，可以改善协议遵从性，同时识别出由规则覆盖率、触发可靠性以及持续存在的诊断优先生成动态带来的局限性。

summary: Production LLMs increasingly rely on toxicity-based moderation filters as a primary defense, assuming that harmful intent correlates with toxic surface wording. We show this assumption is fundamentally brittle: surface toxicity and adversarial intent can be decoupled by replacing as few as five tokens. We present OTTER (Obfuscated Toxicity-Evading Token Evolution for Rewriting), a black-box red-teaming framework requiring only standard API access, directly targeting the practical constraints of industry security audits. Evaluated on 457 AdvBench prompts across four GPT models, OTTER raises average ASR from 7.0% to 84.0%. We further provide the first quantitative analysis of the toxicity--bypass relationship and a per-category breakdown, translating our findings into actionable recommendations for classifier hardening in production deployments.
title: OTTER: A Red-Teaming System for Toxicity-Evading Jailbreak Prompt Optimization
title_translated: OTTER：规避毒性防御的越狱提示优化红队系统
summary_translated: 生产级大语言模型越来越多依赖基于毒性的内容过滤作为主要防御手段，假设有害意图与表面毒性词语存在关联。我们表明这一假设本质上脆弱：通过替换仅五个词元，即可解耦表面毒性与对抗性意图。我们提出OTTER（用于重写去毒化逃避的混淆毒性规避词元演化），一个仅需标准API访问的黑盒红队框架，直接针对行业安全审计的实际约束。在457个AdvBench提示对四个GPT模型的评估中，OTTER将平均攻击成功率（ASR）从7.0%提升至84.0%。我们还首次提供了毒性与绕过关系的定量分析及按类别分解，将发现转化为对生产部署中分类器加固的可操作建议。

summary: The empirical foundation of cyber deception relies on human-centered hypotheses, but the rapid emergence of autonomous, AI-enabled attackers challenges whether this foundation transfers to AI agents. To address this, we introduce an automated evaluation framework adapted from the Honeyquest instrument to assess LLM attacker judgment at scale. Our 21-LLM cohort spanned 10 providers, diverse architectures and specializations, open- and closed-weight models, and parameter scales from 8B to over 1T. We evaluated the performance of this LLM cohort (yielding 10,962 responses) against the 47-participant human baseline across an identical set of 174 reconnaissance queries. Our empirical evaluation reveals three key findings that establish LLMs as a distinct attacker class: (1) every model in our cohort falls for deceptive traps at a significantly higher rate than human attackers; (2) the defensive attention-diversion effect observed in humans is statistically absent in our LLM cohort; and (3) a critical recognition-action gap, where LLMs successfully articulate trap recognition in their reasoning but exploit the deceptive elements anyway 73.4\% of the time. Across the 21 models, trap recognition in reasoning text did not predict fell-for-trap behavior (Spearman $r = +0.08$, $p = 0.73$). Ultimately, these findings demonstrate that human-centered deception hypotheses do not reliably transfer to AI attackers, highlighting the critical need for new research into AI-native active defense frameworks.
title: Honeyquest for LLMs: Rethinking Cyber Deception for AI Attackers
title_translated: Honeyquest for LLMs：重新思考针对AI攻击者的网络欺骗策略
summary_translated: 网络欺骗的实证基础建立在以人为中心的假设之上，但自主、AI驱动的攻击者迅速出现，挑战了这一基础是否适用于AI代理。为解决此问题，我们引入一个基于Honeyquest工具自动化的评估框架，用于大规模评估LLM攻击者判断力。我们的21个LLM团队涵盖10家提供商，多种架构与专业化方向，开放与封闭权重模型，参数规模从8B到超过1T。我们评估了该LLM团队（共10,962个响应）在相同174个侦察查询集上相对于47名参与者的真人基线的表现。实证评估揭示三个关键发现，确立LLM为一类独特的攻击者：（1）我们团队中的每个模型陷入欺骗陷阱的比率显著高于人类攻击者；（2）人类中观察到的防御性注意力分散效应在我们的LLM团队中统计上不存在；（3）存在关键的“认知-行动”差距，即LLM在推理中成功识别陷阱，但仍会在73.4%的情况下利用欺骗元素。在21个模型中，推理文本中的陷阱识别无法预测陷入陷阱的行为（Spearman r = +0.08, p = 0.73）。最终，这些发现表明，以人为中心的欺骗假设无法可靠转移到AI攻击者，凸显了开展AI原生主动防御框架研究的迫切需求。

summary: Scientific discovery workflows often depend on structured curation from the literature. This is difficult for current agents because the key evidence is scattered across long text, dense tables, and figures, and the final records often require reasoning across multiple evidence fragments rather than copying a single span. We study scientific curation from multimodal sources and introduce Beaver, an agent harness that extracts structured information from scientific papers while preserving provenance to the supporting evidence. Beaver combines a frontier agent with multimodal evidence tooling, task scaffolding, and artifact-grounded autoresearch. These components turn curation into a staged, auditable workflow and enable an iterative evaluate--diagnose--revise loop, where persistent run artifacts expose stage-localized failures and guide harness updates. Experiments show that Beaver reaches 81.0 on Gold-Referenced Attribute Score (GRAS), an attribute-level measure of agreement with gold curated records, outperforming frontier agents by over 23 absolute points. Ablations show that task scaffolding, multimodal evidence tooling, and provenance traces each contribute meaningfully to performance, while attribute-level analysis shows the largest gains on high-value attributes that require cross-modal reasoning and normalization. These results show that, for scientific curation from papers with multimodal evidence, harness design is a central determinant of agent performance.
title: Building Agent Harnesses for Scientific Curation from Multimodal Sources
title_translated: 从多模态来源构建用于科学整理的智能体工具链
summary_translated: 科学发现流程通常依赖于文献中的结构化整理。然而，当前智能体难以完成这一任务，因为关键证据分散在长文本、密集表格和图表中，最终记录往往需要跨多个证据片段进行推理，而非简单复制单一片段。我们研究了从多模态来源进行科学整理的问题，并引入Beaver——一种智能体工具链，能够从科学论文中提取结构化信息，同时保留对支持证据的溯源。Beaver结合了前沿智能体、多模态证据工具、任务支架和基于产物的自研研究机制。这些组件将整理过程转化为分阶段、可审计的工作流，并支持迭代的评估-诊断-修订循环，其中持久化的运行产物暴露各阶段的局部失败，指导工具链更新。实验表明，Beaver在Gold-Referenced Attribute Score（GRAS）上达到81.0分，该指标衡量与黄金标准记录的属性级一致性，比前沿智能体高出超过23个百分点。消融实验显示，任务支架、多模态证据工具和溯源痕迹均对性能有显著贡献，而属性级分析表明，在需要跨模态推理和归一化的高价值属性上提升最大。结果表明，对于包含多模态证据的论文科学整理任务，工具链设计是决定智能体性能的核心因素。

summary: Large language models can store both outdated facts and newer superseding facts in their parameters, but standard prompting may still elicit the outdated answer. We formalize this problem as Parametric Temporal Conflict (PTC) and introduce Temporal Attractor Steering (TAS), a three-stage test-time intervention that detects likely conflicts, identifies a conflict-critical layer, and steers hidden states toward newer-fact representations without retraining or external retrieval. We construct an 8,746-record verified benchmark across five Wikidata relations and evaluate four open-weight language models from three families: Qwen-2.5-1.5B/7B, Mistral-7B-v0.3, and Llama-3.1-8B. Single-layer activation patching achieves answer-flip rates of 0.72-0.85 across all models. End-to-end TAS resolves 29-57% of PTC cases while preserving 85-99% accuracy on non-conflict queries, outperforming a matched ITI baseline on three of four models. These results show that outdated parametric knowledge can be selectively overridden at inference time.
title: Right Knowledge, Wrong Answer: Test-Time Steering for Temporal Fact Conflicts in Open-Weight Language Models
title_translated: 正确的知识，错误的答案：面向开放权重语言模型中时间事实冲突的测试时引导方法
summary_translated: 大型语言模型可以在其参数中存储过时的事实和更新后的替代事实，但标准提示仍可能引发过时的回答。我们将此问题形式化为参数化时间冲突（PTC），并提出时间吸引子引导（TAS）——一种三阶段测试时干预方法，用于检测潜在冲突、识别冲突关键层，并在不重新训练或外部检索的情况下，将隐藏状态引导至新事实表示。我们构建了一个涵盖五个Wikidata关系的8,746条记录验证基准，评估了来自三个家族的四种开放权重语言模型：Qwen-2.5-1.5B/7B、Mistral-7B-v0.3和Llama-3.1-8B。单层激活修补在所有模型上实现了0.72–0.85的答案翻转率。端到端的TAS解决了29%–57%的PTC案例，同时在非冲突查询上保持85%–99%的准确率，优于三种模型上的匹配ITI基线。结果表明，过时的参数化知识可在推理时被选择性覆盖。

summary: Document-grounded assistants built on large language models are increasingly used in high-stakes, knowledge-intensive work. Their usefulness, however, may depend on how evidence is allocated before generation. We investigate such a claim by comparing two grounding architectures: (a) retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) that retrieves a few relevant passages, and (b) long-context prompting, which loads the whole document collection in context. We view these as two regimes of "epistemic access" on an accuracy--cost frontier. We use "epistemic accuracy" to capture model correctness that depends on having the right evidence. We posit that broader access (via long context) can increase it, but with a "token tax" (i.e., a substantial increase in cost due to larger input token consumption). We probe this framing with a case study in manufacturing safety training. Using an expert-validated benchmark, we evaluate 972 answers across three machines, two small language models, and three retrieval/in-context prompting approaches. Long-context prompting achieved the highest correctness (73.1% vs. 65.4% for semantic RAG), but at 26 times the per-query token cost. We interpret this gap as the token tax of broader evidentiary access. We carefully discuss the implications of our findings for resource-constrained organizations.
title: The Token Tax of Epistemic Accuracy: Comparing RAG and Long-Context Architectures for Document-Grounded Generative AI Applications
title_translated: 认知准确性的Token代价：对比RAG与长上下文架构在文档基础生成式AI应用中的表现
summary_translated: 基于大语言模型的文档基础助手在高风险、知识密集型工作中日益普及。然而，其有效性可能取决于生成前证据的分配方式。我们通过比较两种接地架构来检验这一假设：(a) 检索增强生成（RAG），即检索少量相关段落；(b) 长上下文提示，即将整个文档集合加载到上下文中。我们将这两种方式视为“认知访问”在准确率与成本权衡前沿上的两种范式。我们使用“认知准确性”来捕捉模型正确性对获取正确证据的依赖。我们认为更广泛的访问（通过长上下文）可提高准确性，但需付出“Token代价”（即因输入token数量大幅增加而导致的成本上升）。我们在制造业安全培训场景中通过案例研究验证这一框架。使用专家验证的基准，我们评估了三台机器、两个小型语言模型以及三种检索/上下文提示方法下的972个回答。长上下文提示在正确率上达到最高（73.1% vs. RAG的65.4%），但每查询token成本高出26倍。我们将其差距解释为更广泛证据访问的Token代价。我们深入讨论了研究结果对资源受限组织的启示。

summary: Vision foundation tools such as open-vocabulary detectors, segmentation models, and post-processing operators are powerful building blocks for computer vision, but their effectiveness depends heavily on how they are orchestrated: which tools are used, in what order, with what parameters, and under what visual conditions. Existing visual-programming agents typically generate a fixed solution pipeline, making them brittle under dense objects, occlusion, small targets, and domain shift. We introduce VTOS (Vision Tools Orchestration Search), a framework for adaptive visual tool orchestration through joint solution--observer search. VTOS co-searches executable solution programs that compose vision tools such as Grounding DINO, SAM, NMS, and slice-and-detect, together with observer programs that diagnose candidate solutions, identify failure modes, and generate actionable feedback. These observations are accumulated in a shared VisionThoughts knowledge base to guide subsequent search. We evaluate VTOS through two case studies: dense object counting on LVIS-Count and zero-shot plant-disease segmentation on PlantSeg-OOD, which stress different orchestration challenges including threshold calibration, NMS, slicing, mask refinement, and domain generalization. Across both tasks, VTOS outperforms static tool pipelines and agentic visual-programming baselines, showing that co-searching solutions and observers is an effective strategy for adapting vision tools to challenging computer vision tasks.
title: VTOS: Learning to Orchestrate Vision Tools by Co-Searching Solutions and Observers
title_translated: VTOS：通过联合搜索解决方案与观察者来学习编排视觉工具
summary_translated: 如开放词汇检测器、分割模型和后处理算子等视觉基础工具是计算机视觉的强大构建模块，但其有效性高度依赖于如何编排：使用哪些工具、以何种顺序、采用何种参数、在何种视觉条件下。现有视觉编程智能体通常生成固定的解决方案流水线，导致在密集物体、遮挡、小目标和领域偏移下表现脆弱。我们提出VTOS（视觉工具编排搜索）框架，通过联合解决方案-观察者搜索实现自适应视觉工具编排。VTOS共同搜索可执行的解决方案程序（组合Grounding DINO、SAM、NMS、切片-检测等视觉工具）以及观察者程序（诊断候选方案、识别失败模式并生成可操作反馈）。这些观察结果积累在共享的VisionThoughts知识库中，以指导后续搜索。我们在两个案例研究中评估VTOS：LVIS-Count上的密集物体计数和PlantSeg-OOD上的零样本植物病害分割，分别考验阈值校准、NMS、切片、掩码优化和领域泛化等不同编排挑战。在两项任务中，VTOS均优于静态工具流水线和代理式视觉编程基线，表明联合搜索解决方案与观察者是应对复杂计算机视觉任务的有效策略。

summary: Grayscale images are commonly found in historical photography restoration, medical imaging, and artistic media. However, automatically applying color to these images remains a significant challenge in computer vision because many plausible colorizations can correspond to the same grayscale input.   In this work, we quantify the effect of text conditioning on pixel-level and perceptual metrics for grayscale-to-color image models. Specifically, we compare two architectures, a U-Net and Stable Diffusion 1.5, each tested with and without CLIP text conditioning while holding all other variables constant. Our results show that text conditioning improves PSNR by 5.6%, SSIM by 1.2%, and colorfulness by 36.6%, while reducing LPIPS by 7.6% in the U-Net tier. In the Stable Diffusion tier, text conditioning improves PSNR by 5.8%, SSIM by 1.5%, and colorfulness by 0.6%, while reducing LPIPS by 11.3%. These results indicate that text conditioning provides consistent, measurable improvements to colorization quality across both architecture scales.
title: Multimodal Image Colorization: Quantifying the Impact of Text-Conditioned Guidance on Grayscale-to-Color Translation
title_translated: 多模态图像着色：量化文本条件引导对灰度到彩色转换的影响
summary_translated: 灰度图像常见于历史摄影修复、医学成像和艺术媒体中。然而，自动为这些图像上色仍是计算机视觉中的重大挑战，因为同一灰度输入可能对应多种合理的着色方案。在本研究中，我们量化了文本条件对灰度到彩色图像模型在像素级和感知度量上的影响。具体而言，我们比较了两种架构：U-Net和Stable Diffusion 1.5，每种架构在有无CLIP文本条件的情况下进行测试，其余变量保持不变。结果显示，文本条件使U-Net层级的PSNR提升5.6%，SSIM提升1.2%，色彩丰富度提升36.6%，LPIPS降低7.6%；在Stable Diffusion层级，PSNR提升5.8%，SSIM提升1.5%，色彩丰富度提升0.6%，LPIPS降低11.3%。这些结果表明，文本条件在两种架构尺度上均能提供一致且可测量的着色质量提升。

summary: LLM-as-user-simulation has become core infrastructure for conversational AI: agent benchmarks (tau-bench), training pipelines, and a growing body of fidelity studies all rely on LLMs role-playing the human side of dialogue. Existing frameworks measure communicative fidelity -- whether simulators talk like humans -- against ground truth from paid participants role-playing assigned goals. We argue this has a structural blind spot: when the goal is assigned, the user's willingness is exogenous, so no framework can test whether simulators make decisions like real users whose motivation is endogenous, latent, and decaying. We introduce decision fidelity -- whether a simulated population reproduces the decision-state dynamics of real users facing real, consequential choices -- and measure it on a unique testbed: 2,790 production conversations between an LLM sales agent and real customers, including 793 with verified payment outcomes. Using a teacher-forced probe protocol that holds context and instrument fixed, we find a systematic, outcome-correlated failure we call the disengagement deficit: simulators reproduce eventual buyers almost exactly (depth bias +0.09) but inflate eventual non-buyers toward the purchase frame (depth bias +0.40; d=0.38, p<0.001), halving expressed resistance (25.1% to 13.5%) and nearly doubling deliberation (21.9% to 40.1%) while fabricating no purchases. The deficit replicates across model families (DeepSeek: d=0.41, p=0.002) and resists the obvious fix: instructing the simulator that it may disengage cuts marginal bias five-fold but barely moves the outcome-conditioned contrast (d=0.34, p=0.008). Real non-buyers say "not now" and stop; simulated non-buyers ask about price. Evaluating or training sales and persuasion agents against such simulators overstates funnel progress exactly where it matters most -- the customers who walk away.
title: Simulated Customers Never Walk Away: Decision Fidelity of LLM User Simulators Measured Against Real Purchase Outcomes
title_translated: 模拟用户从不离开：基于真实购买结果评估LLM用户模拟器的决策保真度
summary_translated: 基于大语言模型的用户模拟已成为对话式AI的核心基础设施，广泛应用于智能体基准测试（tau-bench）、训练流程以及保真度研究中。现有框架主要衡量沟通保真度——即模拟器是否像人类一样交流——但其依赖于付费参与者扮演特定目标的真实数据。我们指出这一方法存在结构性盲点：当目标被赋予时，用户的意愿是外生的，因此无法检验模拟器是否像真实用户那样做出决策，而真实用户的动机是内生、隐含且随时间衰减的。为此，我们提出‘决策保真度’概念——即模拟群体是否再现了真实用户在面临真实、重要选择时的决策状态动态变化。我们在一个独特的测试平台上进行了测量：包含793个已验证支付结果的2,790次LLM销售代理与真实客户之间的生产级对话。通过固定上下文和工具的教师强制探测协议，我们发现一种系统性且与结果相关的失败，称为‘脱机缺陷’：模拟器几乎精确地再现了最终购买者（深度偏差+0.09），但将最终未购买者向购买框架倾斜（深度偏差+0.40；d=0.38，p<0.001），使表达出的抗拒减少一半（25.1%降至13.5%），并几乎使思考时间翻倍（21.9%升至40.1%），却从未生成实际购买行为。该缺陷在不同模型家族中均重现（DeepSeek：d=0.41，p=0.002），且难以修复：即使指示模拟器可退出，仅将边际偏差降低五倍，对结果条件下的对比影响甚微（d=0.34，p=0.008）。真实未购买者会说“现在不行”并停止；而模拟未购买者则询问价格。在这些模拟器上评估或训练销售与说服类智能体，会错误夸大转化漏斗进展，尤其是在最关键的流失客户环节。

summary: LLM-based agents mark a shift from passive question answering to active task completion: they perceive environments, invoke tools, maintain state, and act over extended horizons. As agent systems have evolved from prompt engineering to workflows and context engineering, harness engineering, and agent-native training with co-evolution, a central question has become increasingly important: where does the bottleneck in agent performance reside, in the foundation model, in the execution harness, or in the coupling between them? This survey examines LLM-based agents through a model-harness lens. We first clarify the functional definition of agents and the implementation view of an LLM-based agent as a foundation model coupled with an execution harness. We then analyze the limits of model-centric scaling, trace four paradigms of agent engineering, and decompose the execution harness into six coupled runtime responsibilities: observation, context, control, action, state, and verification. Using this decomposition, we map task properties and domain pressures to harness configurations, review benchmark and evaluation practices, and synthesize model-harness evidence on how runtime design affects long-horizon task completion, efficiency, and reliability. Finally, we identify open challenges in value-aware evaluation, safety, harness generalization, and model-harness co-evolution. Rather than treating agents as models with auxiliary tools, this survey argues that agent quality -- including success, efficiency, safety, and generalization -- emerges from the interaction between model capability, runtime infrastructure, task structure, and evaluation design. A collection of papers discussed in this survey is provided in https://github.com/ggjy/Awesome-Agent-Engineering.
title: From Question Answering to Task Completion: A Survey on Agent System and Harness Design
title_translated: 从问答到任务完成：智能体系统与执行框架设计综述
summary_translated: 基于大语言模型的智能体标志着从被动问答向主动任务完成的转变：它们能够感知环境、调用工具、维持状态，并在长周期内采取行动。随着智能体系统从提示工程演进到工作流、上下文工程、执行框架工程及与模型共同演化的原生训练，一个核心问题日益突出：智能体性能瓶颈究竟存在于基础模型、执行框架，还是二者之间的耦合关系中？本综述从模型-框架视角审视基于大语言模型的智能体。我们首先厘清智能体的功能定义及其作为基础模型与执行框架耦合的实现视图。随后分析以模型为中心扩展的局限性，梳理智能体工程的四种范式，并将执行框架分解为六个相互关联的运行时职责：观察、上下文、控制、动作、状态与验证。基于此分解，我们将任务特性与领域压力映射到框架配置，回顾基准测试与评估实践，并综合模型-框架证据，揭示运行时设计如何影响长周期任务完成、效率与可靠性。最后，我们识别出价值感知评估、安全性、框架泛化及模型-框架协同演化的开放挑战。本文主张不应将智能体视为带有辅助工具的模型，而是强调智能体质量（包括成功率、效率、安全性和泛化能力）源于模型能力、运行时基础设施、任务结构与评估设计之间的交互作用。本文讨论的相关论文集合见 https://github.com/ggjy/Awesome-Agent-Engineering。

summary: MLLM-as-a-Judge is conventionally validated by agreement with human annotations, but this metric is undefined when the human pool is culturally heterogeneous. We introduce VOIR DIRE, a multimodal benchmark of 626 culturally paired image--prompt artifacts spanning U.S. and mainland Chinese contexts across food, fashion, and architecture, with annotator pools that are within-pool reliable (a = 0.86/0.74) but cross-pool divergent on evaluation (Q1 r = -0.12). Across six MLLMs, the bias decomposes into two failures: a positivity-floor calibration failure (compressed scale use) and an orientation failure (default to one cultural norm). On this corpus, where contested items are sampled to split the two pools, the floor mechanically validates the more-permissive Chinese reading; persona prompting partially recovers calibration, but the orientation residual survives, evidence the tilt is not reducible to scale compression. Reference-pool in-context demonstrations deepen the orientation residual and inflate the high end rather than restoring use of the low end. Model origin adds a small additive tilt (~0.10 MAE) that is approximately invariant under demonstration. We recommend reporting alignment against each reference pool separately and treating cross-pool divergence as a judge property.
title: Jury Duty: Calibration and Orientation Failures in MLLM-as-a-Judge Under Cultural Ambiguity
title_translated: 陪审员职责：多模态大模型作为裁判在文化模糊情境下的校准与定向失败
summary_translated: 多模态大模型作为裁判通常通过与人类标注的一致性来验证，但在人类标注池具有文化异质性时，该指标变得无定义。我们引入VOIR DIRE，一个包含626个跨文化配对的图像-提示样本的多模态基准，覆盖美国与中国大陆在食物、时尚与建筑三个领域的语境，其标注者池内部可靠（a = 0.86/0.74），但跨池评价存在显著分歧（Q1 r = -0.12）。在六种多模态大模型上，偏差可分解为两种失败：正向下限校准失败（尺度压缩使用）和定向失败（默认采用单一文化规范）。在该语料库中，争议项被采样以平衡两个标注池，结果表明，下限机制机械性地验证了更宽松的中国解读；角色提示部分恢复了校准，但定向残差依然存在，证明这种偏移并非仅由尺度压缩导致。参考池内的上下文示范反而加深了定向残差，并抬高了高值端而非恢复低值端的使用。模型来源带来约0.10 MAE的小幅加性偏移，且在示范条件下基本不变。我们建议分别报告与每个参考池的对齐情况，并将跨池分歧视为裁判本身的属性。

summary: Large Language Models have the potential to expand and improve the access to clinical information by enabling new ways of interacting with medical knowledge in natural language. However, their deployment in medical question-answering settings is safety-critical, since misaligned outputs can lead to severe patient harm. AI control is an emerging approach that introduces external safeguards to mitigate unsafe behaviours in misaligned systems and has been shown to be effective in domains such as code generation. However, its applicability and effectiveness in medical settings have not been systematically studied. In this work, we present a pipeline for evaluating AI control protocols to mitigate medication-related harm. To this end, we introduce DrugBench, an AI control evaluation benchmark which combines 3,671 multi-turn medical conversations from HealthBench with drug information from official FDA labels, covering four categories of medication-related harm: drug interactions, contraindications, dosing constraints, and patient action restrictions. Furthermore, inspired by the medical domain, we argue that safety should account for the severity of unsafe outputs, not just their probability. Under this revised definition, we show that existing control protocols can be subverted and propose severity-based monitoring to address this limitation.
title: DrugBench: Evaluating AI Control Protocols for Medication Harm Mitigation
title_translated: DrugBench：评估AI控制协议在药物伤害缓解中的表现
summary_translated: 大语言模型有潜力通过自然语言方式拓展和改善临床信息的获取途径。然而，在医疗问答场景中部署时，其安全性至关重要，因为对齐偏差可能导致严重患者伤害。AI控制是一种新兴方法，通过引入外部防护机制来缓解对齐偏差系统中的不安全行为，已在代码生成等领域能够证明有效。但其在医疗场景中的适用性与有效性尚未系统研究。本文提出一个用于评估AI控制协议以减轻药物相关伤害的流程。为此，我们构建了DrugBench，一个AI控制评估基准，结合来自HealthBench的3,671个多轮医疗对话与官方FDA药品说明书中的药物信息，涵盖四类药物相关伤害：药物相互作用、禁忌症、剂量限制和患者行为限制。此外，受医疗领域启发，我们认为安全性应考虑不安全输出的严重程度，而不仅仅是其概率。在此新定义下，我们发现现有控制协议可能被绕过，并提出基于严重性的监控机制以应对这一局限。

summary: The integration of external tools has transitioned LLM agents from passive responders to autonomous systems. However, current benchmarks prioritize execution success, neglecting self-awareness capability, the ability to discern whether a problem requires necessary external resources or can be solved via internal parametric knowledge. To address this, we introduce KAPRO (Knowing-Acting Quadrant PRObe), a framework that evaluates cognitive-behavioral alignment by decoupling an agent's metacognitive judgment (Knowing) from its spontaneous execution (Acting). We further construct KAware, a dataset rigorously partitioning tasks into external, internal, and hybrid subspaces to systematically probe these epistemic boundaries. Extensive experiments across diverse agent architectures show that self-awareness capability is strongly correlated with task success but degrades sharply in internal-capability settings. Moreover, open-source and instruction-following models exhibit stronger tool overuse due to shallow pattern matching, while proprietary and reasoning-oriented models demonstrate more reliable cognitive gating. Benchmark and codes are available at https://github.com/AI-Santiago/KAware.
title: From Knowing to Acting: Benchmarking Self-Awareness Capability of LLM Agents
title_translated: 从认知到行动：评估LLM智能体自我意识能力的基准测试
summary_translated: 外部工具的集成使LLM智能体从被动响应者转变为自主系统。然而，当前基准测试侧重于执行成功，忽视了自我意识能力——即判断一个问题是否需要必要外部资源，或能否仅通过内部参数知识解决。为解决此问题，我们提出KAPRO（Knowing-Acting Quadrant PRObe）框架，通过解耦智能体的元认知判断（认知）与其自发执行（行动），评估认知-行为一致性。我们进一步构建KAware数据集，严格划分任务至外部、内部与混合空间，系统探测这些认识论边界。在多种智能体架构上的大量实验表明，自我意识能力与任务成功率强相关，但在内部能力设定下急剧下降。开源与指令遵循模型因浅层模式匹配表现出更强的工具滥用倾向，而专有与推理导向模型则展现出更可靠的认知门控。基准测试与代码已公开于 https://github.com/AI-Santiago/KAware。

summary: Computer-Use Agents (CUAs) are increasingly deployed in dynamic interactive environments, creating a growing need for continual skill learning during interaction. Recent approaches address this challenge by learning reusable skills from successful trajectories. However, these skill learning methods largely assume static and safe environments, overlooking risks from adversarial interactions (e.g., prompt injections) and environmental dynamics (e.g., pop-ups). In dynamic settings, such assumptions can lead to risky skill learning and brittle execution, undermining the reliability of CUAs. This raises the question: how can CUAs learn and use skills safely in dynamic environments? To address this problem, we propose SkillHarness, a framework for safe skill harnessing in dynamic environments. SkillHarness moves beyond static skill abstractions by modeling skill learning and utilization as a safety-constrained interaction process. Specifically, we introduce the skill boundary that leverages multi-source supervision signals to identify safe skills from interaction trajectories, and construct self-improving safety constraints throughout the skill lifecycle. In addition, SkillHarness introduces selective skill reuse, where tasks are guided to decompose according to context and completed through the selective activation of skill subsets. Our experiments demonstrate that SkillHarness significantly reduces the unsafe rate of learned skills by 57.1% and consistently improves execution stability under dynamic environmental changes, outperforming existing baselines.
title: SkillHarness: Harnessing Safe Skills for Computer-Use Agents
title_translated: SkillHarness：安全技能的智能体使用框架
summary_translated: 计算机使用智能体（CUAs）在动态交互环境中日益广泛应用，这带来了在交互过程中持续学习新技能的需求。现有方法通过从成功轨迹中学习可复用技能来应对这一挑战，但这些方法大多假设环境是静态且安全的，忽略了对抗性交互（如提示注入）和环境动态性（如弹窗）带来的风险。在动态环境下，此类假设可能导致危险的技能学习和脆弱的执行，从而削弱CUAs的可靠性。因此，问题在于：如何使CUAs在动态环境中安全地学习和使用技能？为此，我们提出了SkillHarness，一个面向动态环境的安全技能利用框架。SkillHarness超越了静态技能抽象，将技能学习与使用建模为一种受安全约束的交互过程。具体而言，我们引入了‘技能边界’概念，利用多源监督信号从交互轨迹中识别安全技能，并在整个技能生命周期内构建自我改进的安全约束。此外，SkillHarness引入了选择性技能复用机制，根据上下文引导任务分解，并通过选择性激活技能子集完成任务。实验表明，SkillHarness将学习到的技能不安全率降低了57.1%，并在动态环境变化下显著提升了执行稳定性，优于现有基线方法。

summary: LLM agents are promising for alpha mining via combining financial priors, symbolic reasoning, executable factor generation, and feedback-driven refinement. Yet, they face a combinatorial search space, noisy non-stationary feedback, redundant discoveries, and overfitting risks from naively reusing past successes. To address these challenges, we propose AlphaMemo, a self-evolving alpha mining agent with Structured Search-Process Memory. Rather than memorizing only final factors or full trajectories, AlphaMemo records reusable evidence about which edit motifs work or fail under specific parent-factor contexts. It extracts motifs from Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) differences, applies confidence-gated residual memory on top of a search-ledger prior, and uses asymmetric veto control to suppress high-confidence failure patterns. Experiments on CSI 500 and S\&P 500 show improved out-of-sample performance and fixed-budget discovery efficiency, with ablations validating the roles of residual learning, confidence gating, AST-diff motifs, and veto memory. Code is at https://github.com/jarrettyu/AlphaMemo.
title: AlphaMemo: Structured Search-Process Memory for Self-Evolving Alpha Mining Agents
title_translated: AlphaMemo：用于自演化Alpha挖掘智能体的结构化搜索过程记忆
summary_translated: 大型语言模型（LLM）智能体在结合金融先验知识、符号推理、可执行因子生成和反馈驱动优化方面展现出挖掘Alpha策略的巨大潜力。然而，它们面临组合搜索空间庞大、非平稳噪声反馈、重复发现以及盲目复用过往成功经验导致过拟合的风险。为解决这些问题，我们提出AlphaMemo，一种具备结构化搜索过程记忆的自演化Alpha挖掘智能体。不同于仅记忆最终因子或完整轨迹，AlphaMemo记录在特定父因子上下文中哪些编辑模式有效或无效的可复用证据。它从抽象语法树（AST）差异中提取模式，基于搜索账本先验对残差记忆施加置信度门控，并采用非对称否决控制抑制高置信度的失败模式。在CSI 500和S&P 500上的实验显示，AlphaMemo提升了样本外表现和固定预算下的发现效率，消融实验验证了残差学习、置信度门控、AST差异模式和否决记忆的作用。代码已开源。

summary: Significant progress has been made in aligning LLMs with target value functions. We argue that, even when an LLM has been well aligned in (post-)training, it may still fail to maximise the aligned value in reasoning. We mathematically formalise this gap as rational value risk: the utility discrepancy between a model's deployed reasoning strategy and its rational counterpart, which is defined to be the responses that maximise expected utility in the steepest direction. The estimation error of rational value risk is further decomposed into three components from finite candidates, finite prompts, and imperfect verifiers. Extensive experiments are conducted, covering models Llama-3.1, Qwen-2.5, T{\"}ulu-3 families (7B-72B), GPT-5.2, GPT-5.5, and DeepSeek-V4, and benchmarks UltraFeedback, AlpacaEval, GSM8K, MATH, HumanEval, and MathArena. The results validate that (1) rational value risk is widespread; (2) value alignment can reduce, but cannot eliminate, it; (3) the risk is highly sensitive to inference-time reasoning strategy; and (4) longer reasoning improves rationality with diminishing returns. The code is at https://github.com/EVIEHub/LLM-Rationality.
title: In LLM Reasoning, there is Irrationality on top of Value Misalignment
title_translated: 在大语言模型推理中，价值错位之上存在非理性现象
